IfcConstructionEquipmentResource.shortDefinition: _IfcConstructionEquipmentResource_ is usage of construction equipment to assist in the performance of construction. Construction Equipment resources are wholly or partially consumed or occupied in the performance of construction.

IfcConstructionEquipmentResourceType.name: IfcConstructionEquipmentResourceType
IfcConstructionEquipmentResourceType.shortDefinition: The resource type _IfcConstructionEquipmentResourceType_ defines commonly shared information for occurrences of construction equipment resources. The set of shared information may include: * common productivities * common cost rates * common properties within shared property sets

IfcConstructionMaterialResource.name: IfcConstructionMaterialResource
IfcConstructionMaterialResource.shortDefinition: _IfcConstructionMaterialResource_ identifies a material resource type in a construction project.
history: IFC4 CHANGE The attribute _Suppliers_ has been deleted; use _IfcRelAssignsToResource_ to assign an _IfcActor_ to fulfill the role as a supplier. The attribute _UsageRatio_ has been deleted; use _BaseQuantityConsumed_ and _BaseQuantityProduced_ to indicate material usage.

IfcConstructionMaterialResourceType.name: IfcConstructionMaterialResourceType
IfcConstructionMaterialResourceType.shortDefinition: The resource type _IfcConstructionMaterialResourceType_ defines commonly shared information for occurrences of construction material resources. The set of shared information may include: * common productivities * common cost rates * common properties within shared property sets

IfcConstructionProductResource.name: IfcConstructionProductResource
IfcConstructionProductResource.shortDefinition: _IfcConstructionProductResource_ defines the role of a product that is consumed (wholly or partially), or occupied in the performance of construction.
history: HISTORY New entity in IFC2.0. Renamed from IfcProductResource in IFC2x.

IfcConstructionProductResourceType.name: IfcConstructionProductResourceType
IfcConstructionProductResourceType.shortDefinition: The resource type _IfcConstructionProductResourceType_ defines commonly shared information for occurrences of construction product resources. The set of shared information may include: * common productivities * common cost rates * common properties within shared property sets

IfcConstructionResource.name: IfcConstructionResource
IfcConstructionResource.shortDefinition: _IfcConstructionResource_ is an abstract generalization of the different resources used in construction projects, mainly labour, material, equipment and product resources, plus subcontracted resources and aggregations such as a crew resource.
history: IFC4 CHANGE Modified in to promote _ResourceIdentifer_ and _ResourceGroup_ (renamed to _LongDescription_) to supertype _IfcResource_ and add attributes as described.

IfcConstructionResourceType.name: IfcConstructionResourceType
IfcConstructionResourceType.shortDefinition: _IfcConstructionResourceType_ is an abstract generalization of the different resource types used in construction projects, mainly labor, material, equipment and product resource types, plus subcontracted resource types and aggregations such as a crew resource type.

IfcCrewResource.name: IfcCrewResource
IfcCrewResource.shortDefinition: _IfcCrewResource_ represents a collection of internal resources used in construction processes.

IfcCrewResourceType.name: IfcCrewResourceType
IfcCrewResourceType.shortDefinition: The resource type _IfcCrewResourceType_ defines commonly shared information for occurrences of crew resources. The set of shared information may include: * common productivities * common cost rates * common properties within shared property sets

IfcLaborResource.name: IfcLaborResource
IfcLaborResource.shortDefinition: An _IfcLaborResource_ is used in construction with particular skills or crafts required to perform certain types of construction or management related work.
history: IFC4 CHANGE The attribute _Skillset_ has been deleted; use LongDescription to describe the skillset.

IfcLaborResourceType.name: IfcLaborResourceType
IfcLaborResourceType.shortDefinition: The resource type _IfcLaborResourceType_ defines commonly shared information for occurrences of labour resources. The set of shared information may include: * common productivities * common cost rates * common properties within shared property sets

IfcSubContractResource.name: IfcSubContractResource
IfcSubContractResource.shortDefinition: _IfcSubContractResource_ is a construction resource needed in a construction process that represents a sub-contractor.
history: IFC4 CHANGE The attribute _SubContractor_ has been deleted; use _IfcRelAssignsToResource_ to assign an _IfcActor_ to fulfill the role as the subcontractor. The attribute _JobDescription_ has been deleted; use _LongDescription_ to describe the job.

IfcSubContractResourceType.name: IfcSubContractResourceType
IfcSubContractResourceType.shortDefinition: The resource type _IfcSubContractResourceType_ defines commonly shared information for occurrences of subcontract resources. The set of shared information may include: * common productivities * common cost rates * common properties within shared property sets

IfcAudioVisualAppliance.name: IfcAudioVisualAppliance
IfcAudioVisualAppliance.shortDefinition: An audio-visual appliance is a device that displays, captures, transmits, or receives audio or video.

IfcAudioVisualApplianceType.name: IfcAudioVisualApplianceType
IfcAudioVisualApplianceType.shortDefinition: The flow terminal type **IfcAudioVisualApplianceType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of audio visual appliances. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports

IfcCableCarrierFitting.name: IfcCableCarrierFitting
IfcCableCarrierFitting.shortDefinition: A cable carrier fitting is a fitting that is placed at junction or transition in a cable carrier system.

IfcCableCarrierFittingType.name: IfcCableCarrierFittingType
IfcCableCarrierFittingType.shortDefinition: The flow fitting type **IfcCableCarrierFittingType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of cable carrier fittings. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports

IfcCableCarrierSegment.name: IfcCableCarrierSegment
IfcCableCarrierSegment.shortDefinition: A cable carrier segment is a flow segment that is specifically used to carry and support cabling.

IfcCableCarrierSegmentType.name: IfcCableCarrierSegmentType
IfcCableCarrierSegmentType.shortDefinition: The flow segment type **IfcCableCarrierSegmentType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of cable carrier segments. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports

IfcCableFitting.name: IfcCableFitting
IfcCableFitting.shortDefinition: A cable fitting is a fitting that is placed at a junction, transition or termination in a cable system.

IfcCableFittingType.name: IfcCableFittingType
IfcCableFittingType.shortDefinition: The flow fitting type **IfcCableFittingType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of cable fittings. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports

IfcCableSegment.name: IfcCableSegment
IfcCableSegment.shortDefinition: A cable segment is a flow segment used to carry electrical power, data, or telecommunications signals.

IfcCableSegmentType.name: IfcCableSegmentType
IfcCableSegmentType.shortDefinition: The flow segment type **IfcCableSegmentType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of cable segments. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports

IfcCommunicationsAppliance.name: IfcCommunicationsAppliance
IfcCommunicationsAppliance.shortDefinition: A communications appliance transmits and receives electronic or digital information as data or sound.

IfcCommunicationsApplianceType.name: IfcCommunicationsApplianceType
IfcCommunicationsApplianceType.shortDefinition: The flow terminal type **IfcCommunicationsApplianceType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of communications appliances. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports

IfcDistributionBoard.name: IfcDistributionBoard
IfcDistributionBoard.shortDefinition: A distribution board is a flow controller in which instances of electrical or communication devices are brought together at a single place for a particular purpose.

IfcDistributionBoardType.name: IfcDistributionBoardType
IfcDistributionBoardType.shortDefinition: The flow controller type _IfcDistributionBoardType_ defines commonly shared information for occurrences of distribution boards. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports

IfcElectricAppliance.name: IfcElectricAppliance
IfcElectricAppliance.shortDefinition: An electric appliance is a device intended for consumer usage that is powered by electricity.

IfcElectricApplianceType.name: IfcElectricApplianceType
IfcElectricApplianceType.shortDefinition: The flow terminal type **IfcElectricApplianceType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of electric appliances. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports

IfcElectricDistributionBoard.name: IfcElectricDistributionBoard
IfcElectricDistributionBoard.shortDefinition: A distribution board is a flow controller in which instances of electrical devices are brought together at a single place for a particular purpose.

IfcElectricDistributionBoardType.name: IfcElectricDistributionBoardType
IfcElectricDistributionBoardType.shortDefinition: The flow controller type **IfcElectricDistributionBoardType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of electric distribution boards. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports

IfcElectricFlowStorageDevice.name: IfcElectricFlowStorageDevice
IfcElectricFlowStorageDevice.shortDefinition: An electric flow storage device is a device in which electrical energy is stored and from which energy may be progressively released.

IfcElectricFlowStorageDeviceType.name: IfcElectricFlowStorageDeviceType
IfcElectricFlowStorageDeviceType.shortDefinition: The flow storage device type **IfcElectricFlowStorageDeviceType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of electric flow storage devices. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports

IfcElectricFlowTreatmentDevice.name: IfcElectricFlowTreatmentDevice
IfcElectricFlowTreatmentDevice.shortDefinition: An electric flow treatment device is used to remove unwanted matter from an electric or electronic signal in a flow distribution system.

IfcElectricFlowTreatmentDeviceType.name: IfcElectricFlowTreatmentDeviceType
IfcElectricFlowTreatmentDeviceType.shortDefinition: The flow treatment device type _IfcElectricFlowTreatmentDeviceType_ defines commonly shared information for occurrences of mobile telecommunications appliances. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports

IfcElectricGenerator.name: IfcElectricGenerator
IfcElectricGenerator.shortDefinition: An electric generator is an engine that is a machine for converting mechanical energy into electrical energy.

IfcElectricGeneratorType.name: IfcElectricGeneratorType
IfcElectricGeneratorType.shortDefinition: The energy conversion device type **IfcElectricGeneratorType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of electric generators. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports

IfcElectricMotor.name: IfcElectricMotor
IfcElectricMotor.shortDefinition: An electric motor is an engine that is a machine for converting electrical energy into mechanical energy.

IfcElectricMotorType.name: IfcElectricMotorType
IfcElectricMotorType.shortDefinition: The energy conversion device type **IfcElectricMotorType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of electric motors. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports

IfcElectricTimeControl.name: IfcElectricTimeControl
IfcElectricTimeControl.shortDefinition: An electric time control is a device that applies control to the provision or flow of electrical energy over time.

IfcElectricTimeControlType.name: IfcElectricTimeControlType
IfcElectricTimeControlType.shortDefinition: The flow controller type **IfcElectricTimeControlType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of electric time controls. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports

IfcJunctionBox.name: IfcJunctionBox
IfcJunctionBox.shortDefinition: A junction box is an enclosure within which cables are connected.
history: IFC4 ADD1 CHANGE Junction boxes no longer have ports defined, but rely on element nesting for indicating containment of electrical devices.

IfcJunctionBoxType.name: IfcJunctionBoxType
IfcJunctionBoxType.shortDefinition: The flow fitting type **IfcJunctionBoxType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of junction boxes. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports

IfcLamp.name: IfcLamp
IfcLamp.shortDefinition: A lamp is an artificial light source such as a light bulb or tube.

IfcLampType.name: IfcLampType
IfcLampType.shortDefinition: The flow terminal type **IfcLampType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of lamps. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports

IfcLightFixture.name: IfcLightFixture
IfcLightFixture.shortDefinition: A light fixture is a container that is designed for the purpose of housing one or more lamps and optionally devices that control, restrict or vary their emission.

IfcLightFixtureType.name: IfcLightFixtureType
IfcLightFixtureType.shortDefinition: The flow terminal type **IfcLightFixtureType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of light fixtures. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports

IfcMobileTelecommunicationsAppliance.name: IfcMobileTelecommunicationsAppliance
IfcMobileTelecommunicationsAppliance.shortDefinition: A mobile telecommunications appliance is a device that transmits, converts, amplifies or receives signals used in mobile networks.

IfcMobileTelecommunicationsApplianceType.name: IfcMobileTelecommunicationsApplianceType
IfcMobileTelecommunicationsApplianceType.shortDefinition: The flow terminal type _IfcMobileTelecommunicationsApplianceType_ defines commonly shared information for occurrences of mobile telecommunications appliances. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports

IfcMotorConnection.name: IfcMotorConnection
IfcMotorConnection.shortDefinition: A motor connection provides the means for connecting a motor as the driving device to the driven device.

IfcMotorConnectionType.name: IfcMotorConnectionType
IfcMotorConnectionType.shortDefinition: The energy conversion device type **IfcMotorConnectionType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of motor connections. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports

IfcOutlet.name: IfcOutlet
IfcOutlet.shortDefinition: An outlet is a device installed at a point to receive one or more inserted plugs for electrical power or communications.

IfcOutletType.name: IfcOutletType
IfcOutletType.shortDefinition: The flow terminal type **IfcOutletType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of outlets. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports

IfcProtectiveDevice.name: IfcProtectiveDevice
IfcProtectiveDevice.shortDefinition: A protective device breaks an electrical circuit when a stated electric current that passes through it is exceeded.

IfcProtectiveDeviceTrippingUnit.name: IfcProtectiveDeviceTrippingUnit
IfcProtectiveDeviceTrippingUnit.shortDefinition: A protective device tripping unit breaks an electrical circuit at a separate breaking unit when a stated electric current that passes through the unit is exceeded.

IfcProtectiveDeviceTrippingUnitType.name: IfcProtectiveDeviceTrippingUnitType
IfcProtectiveDeviceTrippingUnitType.shortDefinition: The distribution control element type **IfcProtectiveDeviceTrippingUnitType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of protective device tripping units. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports

IfcProtectiveDeviceType.name: IfcProtectiveDeviceType
IfcProtectiveDeviceType.shortDefinition: The flow controller type **IfcProtectiveDeviceType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of protective devices. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports

IfcSolarDevice.name: IfcSolarDevice
IfcSolarDevice.shortDefinition: A solar device converts solar radiation into other energy such as electric current or thermal energy.

IfcSolarDeviceType.name: IfcSolarDeviceType
IfcSolarDeviceType.shortDefinition: The energy conversion device type **IfcSolarDeviceType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of solar devices. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports

IfcSwitchingDevice.name: IfcSwitchingDevice
IfcSwitchingDevice.shortDefinition: A switch is used in a cable distribution system (electrical circuit) to control or modulate the flow of electricity.

IfcSwitchingDeviceType.name: IfcSwitchingDeviceType
IfcSwitchingDeviceType.shortDefinition: The flow controller type **IfcSwitchingDeviceType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of switching devices. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports

IfcTransformer.name: IfcTransformer
IfcTransformer.shortDefinition: A transformer is an inductive stationary device that transfers electrical energy from one circuit to another.

IfcTransformerType.name: IfcTransformerType
IfcTransformerType.shortDefinition: The energy conversion device type **IfcTransformerType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of transformers. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports

IfcAirTerminal.name: IfcAirTerminal
IfcAirTerminal.shortDefinition: An air terminal is a terminating or origination point for the transfer of air between distribution system(s) and one or more spaces. It can also be used for the transfer of air between adjacent spaces.

IfcAirTerminalBox.name: IfcAirTerminalBox
IfcAirTerminalBox.shortDefinition: An air terminal box typically participates in an HVAC duct distribution system and is used to control or modulate the amount of air delivered to its downstream ductwork. An air terminal box type is often referred to as an "air flow regulator".

IfcAirTerminalBoxType.name: IfcAirTerminalBoxType
IfcAirTerminalBoxType.shortDefinition: The flow controller type **IfcAirTerminalBoxType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of air terminal boxes. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports

IfcAirTerminalType.name: IfcAirTerminalType
IfcAirTerminalType.shortDefinition: The flow terminal type **IfcAirTerminalType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of air terminals. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports

IfcAirToAirHeatRecovery.name: IfcAirToAirHeatRecovery
IfcAirToAirHeatRecovery.shortDefinition: An air-to-air heat recovery device employs a counter-flow heat exchanger between inbound and outbound air flow. It is typically used to transfer heat from warmer air in one chamber to cooler air in the second chamber (i.e., typically used to recover heat from the conditioned air being exhausted and the outside air being supplied to a building), resulting in energy savings from reduced heating (or cooling) requirements.

IfcAirToAirHeatRecoveryType.name: IfcAirToAirHeatRecoveryType
IfcAirToAirHeatRecoveryType.shortDefinition: The energy conversion device type **IfcAirToAirHeatRecoveryType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of air to air heat recoverys. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports

IfcBoiler.name: IfcBoiler
IfcBoiler.shortDefinition: A boiler is a closed, pressure-rated vessel in which water or other fluid is heated using an energy source such as natural gas, heating oil, or electricity. The fluid in the vessel is then circulated out of the boiler for use in various processes or heating applications.

IfcBoilerType.name: IfcBoilerType
IfcBoilerType.shortDefinition: The energy conversion device type **IfcBoilerType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of boilers. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports

IfcBurner.name: IfcBurner
IfcBurner.shortDefinition: A burner is a device that converts fuel into heat through combustion. It includes gas, oil, and wood burners.

IfcBurnerType.name: IfcBurnerType
IfcBurnerType.shortDefinition: The energy conversion device type **IfcBurnerType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of burners. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports

IfcChiller.name: IfcChiller
IfcChiller.shortDefinition: A chiller is a device used to remove heat from a liquid via a vapor-compression or absorption refrigeration cycle to cool a fluid, typically water or a mixture of water and glycol. The chilled fluid is then used to cool and dehumidify air in a building.

IfcChillerType.name: IfcChillerType
IfcChillerType.shortDefinition: The energy conversion device type **IfcChillerType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of chillers. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports

IfcCoil.name: IfcCoil
IfcCoil.shortDefinition: A coil is a device used to provide heat transfer between non-mixing media. A common example is a cooling coil, which utilizes a finned coil in which circulates chilled water, antifreeze, or refrigerant that is used to remove heat from air moving across the surface of the coil. A coil may be used either for heating or cooling purposes by placing a series of tubes (the coil) carrying a heating or cooling fluid into an airstream. The coil may be constructed from tubes bundled in a serpentine form or from finned tubes that give a extended heat transfer surface.

IfcCoilType.name: IfcCoilType
IfcCoilType.shortDefinition: The energy conversion device type **IfcCoilType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of coils. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports

IfcCompressor.name: IfcCompressor
IfcCompressor.shortDefinition: A compressor is a device that compresses a fluid typically used in a refrigeration circuit.

IfcCompressorType.name: IfcCompressorType
IfcCompressorType.shortDefinition: The flow moving device type **IfcCompressorType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of compressors. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports

IfcCondenser.name: IfcCondenser
IfcCondenser.shortDefinition: A condenser is a device that is used to dissipate heat, typically by condensing a substance such as a refrigerant from its gaseous to its liquid state.

IfcCondenserType.name: IfcCondenserType
IfcCondenserType.shortDefinition: The energy conversion device type **IfcCondenserType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of condensers. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports

IfcCooledBeam.name: IfcCooledBeam
IfcCooledBeam.shortDefinition: A cooled beam (or chilled beam) is a device typically used to cool air by circulating a fluid such as chilled water through exposed finned tubes above a space. Typically mounted overhead near or within a ceiling, the cooled beam uses convection to cool the space below it by acting as a heat sink for the naturally rising warm air of the space. Once cooled, the air naturally drops back to the floor where the cycle begins again.

IfcCooledBeamType.name: IfcCooledBeamType
IfcCooledBeamType.shortDefinition: The energy conversion device type **IfcCooledBeamType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of cooled beams. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports

IfcCoolingTower.name: IfcCoolingTower
IfcCoolingTower.shortDefinition: A cooling tower is a device which rejects heat to ambient air by circulating a fluid such as water through it to reduce its temperature by partial evaporation.

IfcCoolingTowerType.name: IfcCoolingTowerType
IfcCoolingTowerType.shortDefinition: The energy conversion device type **IfcCoolingTowerType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of cooling towers. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports

IfcDamper.name: IfcDamper
IfcDamper.shortDefinition: A damper typically participates in an HVAC duct distribution system and is used to control or modulate the flow of air.

IfcDamperType.name: IfcDamperType
IfcDamperType.shortDefinition: The flow controller type **IfcDamperType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of dampers. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports

IfcDuctFitting.name: IfcDuctFitting
IfcDuctFitting.shortDefinition: A duct fitting is a junction or transition in a ducted flow distribution system or used to connect duct segments, resulting in changes in flow characteristics to the fluid such as direction and flow rate.

IfcDuctFittingType.name: IfcDuctFittingType
IfcDuctFittingType.shortDefinition: The flow fitting type **IfcDuctFittingType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of duct fittings. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports

IfcDuctSegment.name: IfcDuctSegment
IfcDuctSegment.shortDefinition: A duct segment is used to typically join two sections of duct network.

IfcDuctSegmentType.name: IfcDuctSegmentType
IfcDuctSegmentType.shortDefinition: The flow segment type **IfcDuctSegmentType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of duct segments. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports

IfcDuctSilencer.name: IfcDuctSilencer
IfcDuctSilencer.shortDefinition: A duct silencer is a device that is typically installed inside a duct distribution system for the purpose of reducing the noise levels from air movement, fan noise, etc. in the adjacent space or downstream of the duct silencer device.

IfcDuctSilencerType.name: IfcDuctSilencerType
IfcDuctSilencerType.shortDefinition: The flow treatment device type **IfcDuctSilencerType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of duct silencers. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports

IfcEngine.name: IfcEngine
IfcEngine.shortDefinition: An engine is a device that converts fuel into mechanical energy through combustion.

IfcEngineType.name: IfcEngineType
IfcEngineType.shortDefinition: The energy conversion device type **IfcEngineType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of engines. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports

IfcEvaporativeCooler.name: IfcEvaporativeCooler
IfcEvaporativeCooler.shortDefinition: An evaporative cooler is a device that cools air by saturating it with water vapor.

IfcEvaporativeCoolerType.name: IfcEvaporativeCoolerType
IfcEvaporativeCoolerType.shortDefinition: The energy conversion device type **IfcEvaporativeCoolerType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of evaporative coolers. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports

IfcEvaporator.name: IfcEvaporator
IfcEvaporator.shortDefinition: An evaporator is a device in which a liquid refrigerent is vaporized and absorbs heat from the surrounding fluid.

IfcEvaporatorType.name: IfcEvaporatorType
IfcEvaporatorType.shortDefinition: The energy conversion device type **IfcEvaporatorType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of evaporators. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports

IfcFan.name: IfcFan
IfcFan.shortDefinition: A fan is a device which imparts mechanical work on a gas. A typical usage of a fan is to induce airflow in a building services air distribution system.

IfcFanType.name: IfcFanType
IfcFanType.shortDefinition: The flow moving device type **IfcFanType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of fans. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports

IfcFilter.name: IfcFilter
IfcFilter.shortDefinition: A filter is an apparatus used to remove particulate or gaseous matter from fluids and gases.

IfcFilterType.name: IfcFilterType
IfcFilterType.shortDefinition: The flow treatment device type **IfcFilterType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of filters. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports

IfcFlowMeter.name: IfcFlowMeter
IfcFlowMeter.shortDefinition: A flow meter is a device that is used to measure the flow rate in a system.

IfcFlowMeterType.name: IfcFlowMeterType
IfcFlowMeterType.shortDefinition: The flow controller type **IfcFlowMeterType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of flow meters. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports

IfcHeatExchanger.name: IfcHeatExchanger
IfcHeatExchanger.shortDefinition: A heat exchanger is a device used to provide heat transfer between non-mixing media such as plate and shell and tube heat exchangers.

IfcHeatExchangerType.name: IfcHeatExchangerType
IfcHeatExchangerType.shortDefinition: The energy conversion device type **IfcHeatExchangerType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of heat exchangers. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports

IfcHumidifier.name: IfcHumidifier
IfcHumidifier.shortDefinition: A humidifier is a device that adds moisture into the air.

IfcHumidifierType.name: IfcHumidifierType
IfcHumidifierType.shortDefinition: The energy conversion device type **IfcHumidifierType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of humidifiers. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports

IfcMedicalDevice.name: IfcMedicalDevice
IfcMedicalDevice.shortDefinition: A medical device is attached to a medical piping system and operates upon medical gases to perform a specific function. Medical gases include medical air, medical vacuum, oxygen, carbon dioxide, nitrogen, and nitrous oxide.

IfcMedicalDeviceType.name: IfcMedicalDeviceType
IfcMedicalDeviceType.shortDefinition: The flow terminal type **IfcMedicalDeviceType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of medical devices. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports

IfcPipeFitting.name: IfcPipeFitting
IfcPipeFitting.shortDefinition: A pipe fitting is a junction or transition in a piping flow distribution system used to connect pipe segments, resulting in changes in flow characteristics to the fluid such as direction or flow rate.

IfcPipeFittingType.name: IfcPipeFittingType
IfcPipeFittingType.shortDefinition: The flow fitting type **IfcPipeFittingType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of pipe fittings. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports

IfcPipeSegment.name: IfcPipeSegment
IfcPipeSegment.shortDefinition: A pipe segment is used to typically join two sections of a piping network.

IfcPipeSegmentType.name: IfcPipeSegmentType
IfcPipeSegmentType.shortDefinition: The flow segment type **IfcPipeSegmentType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of pipe segments. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports

IfcPump.name: IfcPump
IfcPump.shortDefinition: A pump is a device which imparts mechanical work on fluids or slurries to move them through a channel or pipeline. A typical use of a pump is to circulate chilled water or heating hot water in a building services distribution system.

IfcPumpType.name: IfcPumpType
IfcPumpType.shortDefinition: The flow moving device type **IfcPumpType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of pumps. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports

IfcSpaceHeater.name: IfcSpaceHeater
IfcSpaceHeater.shortDefinition: Space heaters utilize a combination of radiation and/or natural convection using a heating source such as electricity, steam or hot water to heat a limited space or area. Examples of space heaters include radiators, convectors, baseboard and finned-tube heaters.
history: IFC4 CHANGE Electric heaters formerly defined by _IfcElectricHeaterType_ are now represented by this entity with _PredefinedType_ set to _CONVECTOR_ and _Pset_SpaceHeaterCommon_._HeatTransferDimension_ reflecting _IfcElectricHeaterTypeEnum_ as follows: _ELECTRICPOINTHEATER_ = _POINT_, _ELECTRICCABLEHEATER_ = _CURVE_, _ELECTRICMATHEATER_ = _SURFACE_.

IfcSpaceHeaterType.name: IfcSpaceHeaterType
IfcSpaceHeaterType.shortDefinition: The flow terminal type **IfcSpaceHeaterType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of space heaters. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports
history: IFC4 CHANGE Supertype changed from _IfcEnergyConversionDeviceType_ to _IfcFlowTerminalType_

IfcTank.name: IfcTank
IfcTank.shortDefinition: A tank is a vessel or container in which a fluid or gas is stored for later use.

IfcTankType.name: IfcTankType
IfcTankType.shortDefinition: The flow storage device type **IfcTankType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of tanks. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports

IfcTubeBundle.name: IfcTubeBundle
IfcTubeBundle.shortDefinition: A tube bundle is a device consisting of tubes and bundles of tubes used for heat transfer and contained typically within other energy conversion devices, such as a chiller or coil.

IfcTubeBundleType.name: IfcTubeBundleType
IfcTubeBundleType.shortDefinition: The energy conversion device type **IfcTubeBundleType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of tube bundles. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports

IfcUnitaryEquipment.name: IfcUnitaryEquipment
IfcUnitaryEquipment.shortDefinition: Unitary equipment typically combine a number of components into a single product, such as air handlers, pre-packaged rooftop air-conditioning units, heat pumps, and split systems.

IfcUnitaryEquipmentType.name: IfcUnitaryEquipmentType
IfcUnitaryEquipmentType.shortDefinition: The energy conversion device type **IfcUnitaryEquipmentType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of unitary equipment. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports

IfcValve.name: IfcValve
IfcValve.shortDefinition: A valve is used in a building services piping distribution system to control or modulate the flow of the fluid.

IfcValveType.name: IfcValveType
IfcValveType.shortDefinition: The flow controller type **IfcValveType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of valves. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports

IfcVibrationIsolator.name: IfcVibrationIsolator
IfcVibrationIsolator.shortDefinition: A vibration isolator is a device used to minimize the effects of vibration transmissibility in a structure.

IfcVibrationIsolatorType.name: IfcVibrationIsolatorType
IfcVibrationIsolatorType.shortDefinition: The element component type **IfcVibrationIsolatorType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of vibration isolators. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements

IfcFireSuppressionTerminal.name: IfcFireSuppressionTerminal
IfcFireSuppressionTerminal.shortDefinition: A fire suppression terminal has the purpose of delivering a fluid (gas or liquid) that will suppress a fire.

IfcFireSuppressionTerminalType.name: IfcFireSuppressionTerminalType
IfcFireSuppressionTerminalType.shortDefinition: The flow terminal type **IfcFireSuppressionTerminalType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of fire suppression terminals. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports

IfcInterceptor.name: IfcInterceptor
IfcInterceptor.shortDefinition: An interceptor is a device designed and installed in order to separate and retain deleterious, hazardous or undesirable matter while permitting normal sewage or liquids to discharge into a collection system by gravity.

IfcInterceptorType.name: IfcInterceptorType
IfcInterceptorType.shortDefinition: The flow treatment device type **IfcInterceptorType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of interceptors. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports

IfcSanitaryTerminal.name: IfcSanitaryTerminal
IfcSanitaryTerminal.shortDefinition: A sanitary terminal is a fixed appliance or terminal usually supplied with water and used for drinking, cleaning or foul water disposal or that is an item of equipment directly used with such an appliance or terminal.
history: IFC4 ADD1 CHANGE Element nesting is now used for attaching faucets. Hot and cold water ports have been removed from subtypes that use attached faucets.

IfcSanitaryTerminalType.name: IfcSanitaryTerminalType
IfcSanitaryTerminalType.shortDefinition: The flow terminal type **IfcSanitaryTerminalType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of sanitary terminals. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports

IfcStackTerminal.name: IfcStackTerminal
IfcStackTerminal.shortDefinition: A stack terminal is placed at the top of a ventilating stack (such as to prevent ingress by birds or rainwater) or rainwater pipe (to act as a collector or hopper for discharge from guttering).

IfcStackTerminalType.name: IfcStackTerminalType
IfcStackTerminalType.shortDefinition: The flow terminal type **IfcStackTerminalType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of stack terminals. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports

IfcWasteTerminal.name: IfcWasteTerminal
IfcWasteTerminal.shortDefinition: A waste terminal has the purpose of collecting or intercepting waste from one or more sanitary terminals or other fluid waste generating equipment and discharging it into a single waste/drainage system.

IfcWasteTerminalType.name: IfcWasteTerminalType
IfcWasteTerminalType.shortDefinition: The flow terminal type **IfcWasteTerminalType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of waste terminals. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports

IfcConveyorSegment.name: IfcConveyorSegment
IfcConveyorSegment.shortDefinition: A conveyor segment defines an occurrence of a flow segment/ continuous run within a conveyor system that joins two sections of the system. these can utilise different carrying methods such as belt, rope, chain, screw etc.

IfcConveyorSegmentType.name: IfcConveyorSegmentType
IfcConveyorSegmentType.shortDefinition: The _IfcConveyorSegmentType_ provides the type information for _IfcConveyorSegment_ occurrences.

IfcLiquidTerminal.name: IfcLiquidTerminal
IfcLiquidTerminal.shortDefinition: A liquid terminal is a terminating or origination point for the transfer of liquid between distribution system(s). this is the point where the liquid distribution system interacts with the external environment. An example of this is a loading arm for the transfer of liquid from a docked vessel.

IfcLiquidTerminalType.name: IfcLiquidTerminalType
IfcLiquidTerminalType.shortDefinition: The _LiquidTerminalType_ provides the type information for _LiquidTerminal_ occurrences.

IfcMarineFacility.name: IfcMarineFacility
IfcMarineFacility.shortDefinition: A marine facility represents any major structure or entity that is specific to the ports and waterways domain. examples of this include quays, jetties, shipyards, breakwaters etc.

IfcMooringDevice.name: IfcMooringDevice
IfcMooringDevice.shortDefinition: A mooring device is an active or passive built element who's primary function is to participate in the mooring of a vessel, this could be in the form of a bollard used as an attachment point for lines or active equipment such as quick release hooks.

IfcMooringDeviceType.name: IfcMooringDeviceType
IfcMooringDeviceType.shortDefinition: The _IfcMooringDeviceType_ provides the type information for _IfcMooringDevice_ occurrences.

IfcNavigationElement.name: IfcNavigationElement
IfcNavigationElement.shortDefinition: A navigation element is an active or passive built element who's primary function is to provide navigational instructions and warnings to vessels, this could be in the form of a floating buoy, a fixed beacon.

IfcNavigationElementType.name: IfcNavigationElementType
IfcNavigationElementType.shortDefinition: The _IfcNavigationElementType_ provides the type information for _IfcNavigationElement_ occurrences.

IfcRail.name: IfcRail
IfcRail.shortDefinition: A rail is a predominately linear built element that has a special section profile. Rail is distinctive from built elements with similar geometric shapes (e.g. beam, member) that its major function is to ensure guidance of moving for vehicles or other kinds of machineries.

IfcRailType.name: IfcRailType
IfcRailType.shortDefinition: The element type _IfcRailType_ defines commonly shared information for occurrences of rails. The set of shared information may include: * common properties within shared property sets * common material information * common profile definitions * common shape representations

IfcRailway.name: IfcRailway
IfcRailway.shortDefinition: An IfcRailway is a spatial structure element as a route from one location to another for guided passage of wheeled vehicles on rails. An IfcRailway acts as a basic spatial structure element that supports to break down a railway project into manageable parts.

IfcTrackElement.name: IfcTrackElement
IfcTrackElement.shortDefinition: A track element is a built element used specifically in the track domain in railway.

IfcTrackElementType.name: IfcTrackElementType
IfcTrackElementType.shortDefinition: The element type _IfcTrackElementType_ defines commonly shared information for occurrences of track elements. The set of shared information may include: * common properties within shared property sets * common material information * common profile definitions * common shape representations

IfcKerb.name: IfcKerb
IfcKerb.shortDefinition: A border of stone, concrete or other rigid material formed at the edge of the carriageway or footway.

IfcKerbType.name: IfcKerbType
IfcKerbType.shortDefinition: The _IfcKerbType_ provides the type information for the _IfcKerb_ element.

IfcRoad.name: IfcRoad
IfcRoad.shortDefinition: A route built on land to allow travel from one location to another, including highways, streets, cycle and foot paths, but excluding railways. As a type of Facility, Road provides the basic element in the project structure hierarchy for the components of a road project (i.e. any undertaking such as design, construction or maintenance).

IfcRelConnectsStructuralActivity.name: IfcRelConnectsStructuralActivity
IfcRelConnectsStructuralActivity.shortDefinition: The _IfcRelConnectsStructuralActivity_ relationship connects a structural activity (either an action or reaction) to a structural member, structural connection, or element.

IfcRelConnectsStructuralMember.name: IfcRelConnectsStructuralMember
IfcRelConnectsStructuralMember.shortDefinition: The entity _IfcRelConnectsStructuralMember_ defines all needed properties describing the connection between structural members and structural connection objects (nodes or supports).

IfcRelConnectsWithEccentricity.name: IfcRelConnectsWithEccentricity
IfcRelConnectsWithEccentricity.shortDefinition: The entity _IfcRelConnectsWithEccentricity_ adds the definition of eccentricity to the connection between a structural member and a structural connection (representing either a node or support).
history: IFC4 CHANGE Use definitions changed to always require two topology items.

IfcStructuralAction.name: IfcStructuralAction
IfcStructuralAction.shortDefinition: A structural action is a structural activity that acts upon a structural item or building element.
history: IFC4 CHANGE Attribute _DestabilizingLoad_ made optional. Attribute _CausedBy_ deleted; use _IfcRelAssignsToProduct_ via _ReferencedBy_ instead.

IfcStructuralActivity.name: IfcStructuralActivity
IfcStructuralActivity.shortDefinition: The abstract entity _IfcStructuralActivity_ combines the definition of actions (such as forces, displacements, etc.) and reactions (support reactions, internal forces, deflections, etc.) which are specified by using the basic load definitions from the _IfcStructuralLoadResource_.
history: IFC4 CHANGE Cardinality of attribute _AssignedToStructuralItem_ relaxed from 1 to 0..1 in order to allow for schema-compliant incomplete models as well as conceptual models without load—item relationships.

IfcStructuralAnalysisModel.name: IfcStructuralAnalysisModel
IfcStructuralAnalysisModel.shortDefinition: The _IfcStructuralAnalysisModel_ is used to assemble all information needed to represent a structural analysis model. It encompasses certain general properties (such as analysis type), references to all contained structural members, structural supports or connections, as well as loads and the respective load results.
history: IFC4 CHANGE Attribute _SharedPlacement_ and informal propositions added, allowing for easy retrieval of the common object placement and for specification of the analysis model's coordinate system before any structural item is instantiated. WHERE rule added.

IfcStructuralConnection.name: IfcStructuralConnection
IfcStructuralConnection.shortDefinition: An _IfcStructuralConnection_ represents a structural connection object (node connection, edge connection, or surface connection) or supports.

IfcStructuralCurveAction.name: IfcStructuralCurveAction
IfcStructuralCurveAction.shortDefinition: A structural curve action defines an action which is distributed over a curve. A curve action may be connected with a curve member or curve connection, or surface member or surface connection.
history: IFC4 CHANGE Former entity _IfcStructuralLinearActionVarying_ from IFC2x2 has been removed and are replaced by this entity.

IfcStructuralCurveConnection.name: IfcStructuralCurveConnection
IfcStructuralCurveConnection.shortDefinition: Instances of _IfcStructuralCurveConnection_ describe edge 'nodes', i.e. edges where two or more surface members are joined, or edge supports. Edge curves may be straight or curved.
history: IFC4 CHANGE Attribute _Axis_ added, allowing for skewed supports. Use definitions added.

IfcStructuralCurveMember.name: IfcStructuralCurveMember
IfcStructuralCurveMember.shortDefinition: Instances of _IfcStructuralCurveMember_ describe edge members, i.e. structural analysis idealizations of beams, columns, rods etc.. Curve members may be straight or curved.
history: IFC4 CHANGE Attribute _Axis_ and WHERE rule added. Use definitions changed.

IfcStructuralCurveMemberVarying.name: IfcStructuralCurveMemberVarying
IfcStructuralCurveMemberVarying.shortDefinition: This entity describes edge members with varying profile properties. Each instance of _IfcStructuralCurveMemberVarying_ is composed of two or more instances of _IfcStructuralCurveMember_ with differing profile properties. These subordinate members relate to the instance of _IfcStructuralCurveMemberVarying_ by _IfcRelAggregates_.

IfcStructuralCurveReaction.name: IfcStructuralCurveReaction
IfcStructuralCurveReaction.shortDefinition: This entity defines a reaction which occurs distributed over a curve. A curve reaction may be connected with a curve member or curve connection, or surface member or surface connection.

IfcStructuralItem.name: IfcStructuralItem
IfcStructuralItem.shortDefinition: The abstract entity _IfcStructuralItem_ is the generalization of structural members and structural connections, that is, analysis idealizations of elements in the building model. It defines the relation between structural members and connections with structural activities (actions and reactions).
history: IFC4 CHANGE Use definitions and informal proposition added.

IfcStructuralLinearAction.name: IfcStructuralLinearAction
IfcStructuralLinearAction.shortDefinition: This entity defines an action with constant value which is distributed over a curve.

IfcStructuralLoadCase.name: IfcStructuralLoadCase
IfcStructuralLoadCase.shortDefinition: A load case is a load group, commonly used to group loads from the same action source.

IfcStructuralLoadGroup.name: IfcStructuralLoadGroup
IfcStructuralLoadGroup.shortDefinition: The entity _IfcStructuralLoadGroup_ is used to structure the physical impacts. By using the grouping features inherited from _IfcGroup_, instances of _IfcStructuralAction_ (or its subclasses) and of _IfcStructuralLoadGroup_ can be used to define load groups, load cases and load combinations. (See also _IfcLoadGroupTypeEnum_.)
history: IFC4 CHANGE Subtype _IfcStructuralLoadCase_ added. Informal propositions and WHERE rule added. Predefined type LOAD_COMBINATION_GROUP made obsolete and removed.

IfcStructuralMember.name: IfcStructuralMember
IfcStructuralMember.shortDefinition: The abstract entity _IfcStructuralMember_ is the superclass of all structural items which represent the idealized structural behaviour of building elements.
history: IFC4 CHANGE Use definitions moved to supertype and subtypes.

IfcStructuralPlanarAction.name: IfcStructuralPlanarAction
IfcStructuralPlanarAction.shortDefinition: This entity defines an action with constant value which is distributed over a surface.

IfcStructuralPointAction.name: IfcStructuralPointAction
IfcStructuralPointAction.shortDefinition: This entity defines an action which acts on a point. A point action is typically connected with a point connection. It may also be connected with a curve member or curve connection, or surface member or surface connection.
history: IFC4 CHANGE Attributes in the supertypes _IfcStructuralActivity_ and _IfcStructuralAction_ changed. Use definitions changed, informal propositions added.

IfcStructuralPointConnection.name: IfcStructuralPointConnection
IfcStructuralPointConnection.shortDefinition: Instances of _IfcStructuralPointConnection_ describe structural nodes or point supports.
history: IFC4 CHANGE Attribute _ConditionCoordinateSystem_ added, allowing for skewed supports. Use definitions added.

IfcStructuralPointReaction.name: IfcStructuralPointReaction
IfcStructuralPointReaction.shortDefinition: This entity defines a reaction which occurs at a point. A point reaction is typically connected with a point connection. It may also be connected with a curve member or curve connection, or surface member or surface connection.
history: IFC4 CHANGE Attributes in the supertypes _IfcStructuralActivity_ and _IfcStructuralReaction_ changed. Use definitions changed, informal propositions added.

IfcStructuralReaction.name: IfcStructuralReaction
IfcStructuralReaction.shortDefinition: A structural reaction is a structural activity that results from a structural action imposed to a structural item or building element. Examples are support reactions, internal forces, and deflections.
history: IFC4 CHANGE Inverse attribute _Causes_ deleted; use _IfcRelAssignsToProduct_ via _HasAssignments_ instead.

IfcStructuralResultGroup.name: IfcStructuralResultGroup
IfcStructuralResultGroup.shortDefinition: Instances of the entity _IfcStructuralResultGroup_ are used to group results of structural analysis calculations and to capture the connection to the underlying basic load group. The basic functionality for grouping inherited from _IfcGroup_ is used to collect instances from _IfcStructuralReaction_ or its respective subclasses.

IfcStructuralSurfaceAction.name: IfcStructuralSurfaceAction
IfcStructuralSurfaceAction.shortDefinition: This entity defines an action which is distributed over a surface. A surface action may be connected with a surface member or surface connection.
history: IFC4 CHANGE Former entity _IfcStructuralPlanarActionVarying_ from IFC2x2 has been removed and are replaced by this entity.

IfcStructuralSurfaceConnection.name: IfcStructuralSurfaceConnection
IfcStructuralSurfaceConnection.shortDefinition: Instances of _IfcStructuralSurfaceConnection_ describe face 'nodes', i.e. faces where two or more surface members are joined, or face supports. Face surfaces may be planar or curved.

IfcStructuralSurfaceMember.name: IfcStructuralSurfaceMember
IfcStructuralSurfaceMember.shortDefinition: Instances of _IfcStructuralSurfaceMember_ describe face members, that is, structural analysis idealizations of slabs, walls, and shells. Surface members may be planar or curved.
history: IFC4 CHANGE Use definitions changed, WHERE rule added.

IfcStructuralSurfaceMemberVarying.name: IfcStructuralSurfaceMemberVarying
IfcStructuralSurfaceMemberVarying.shortDefinition: This entity describes surface members with varying section properties. The properties are provided by means of _Pset_StructuralSurfaceMemberVaryingThickness_ via _IfcRelDefinesByProperties_, or by means of aggregation: An instance of _IfcStructuralSurfaceMemberVarying_ may be composed of two or more instances of _IfcStructuralSurfaceMember_ with differing section properties. These subordinate members relate to the instance of _IfcStructuralSurfaceMemberVarying_ by _IfcRelAggregates_.
history: IFC4 CHANGE Use definition changed and attributes deleted.

IfcStructuralSurfaceReaction.name: IfcStructuralSurfaceReaction
IfcStructuralSurfaceReaction.shortDefinition: This entity defines a reaction which occurs distributed over a surface. A surface reaction may be connected with a surface member or surface connection.

IfcCaissonFoundation.name: IfcCaissonFoundation
IfcCaissonFoundation.shortDefinition: CaissonFoundation essentially is a hollow box that can be either open or closed.

IfcCaissonFoundationType.name: IfcCaissonFoundationType
IfcCaissonFoundationType.shortDefinition: Enumeration defining the Caisson Foundation Types.

IfcDeepFoundation.name: IfcDeepFoundation
IfcDeepFoundation.shortDefinition: Deep foundation is a type of foundation that transfers loads deeper than shallow foundation below the soft soils not capable of bearing the above structure. Depending on the soil strength it might have to reach down to the rock layer.

IfcFooting.name: IfcFooting
IfcFooting.shortDefinition: A footing is a part of the foundation of a structure that spreads and transmits the load to the soil. A footing is also characterized as shallow foundation, where the loads are transferred to the ground near the surface.
history: IFC4 CHANGE Attribute made optional. Type information can be provided by _IfcRelDefinesByType_ and _IfcFootingType_.

IfcFootingType.name: IfcFootingType
IfcFootingType.shortDefinition: The building element type **IfcFootingType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of footings. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements

IfcPile.name: IfcPile
IfcPile.shortDefinition: A pile is a slender timber, concrete, or steel structural element, driven, jetted, or otherwise embedded on end in the ground for the purpose of supporting a load. A pile is also characterized as deep foundation, where the loads are transferred to deeper subsurface layers.
history: IFC4 CHANGE Attribute made optional. Type information can be provided by _IfcRelDefinesByType_ and _IfcPileType_.

IFC4 CHANGE Material profile association capability by means of _IfcRelAssociatesMaterial_ has been added. The attribute _ConstructionType_ should not be used whenever its information can be provided by a material profile set, either associated with the _IfcPile_ object or, if present, with a corresponding instance of _IfcPileType_.

IfcPileType.name: IfcPileType
IfcPileType.shortDefinition: The building element type **IfcPileType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of piles. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements

IfcReinforcementDefinitionProperties.name: IfcReinforcementDefinitionProperties
IfcReinforcementDefinitionProperties.shortDefinition: _IfcReinforcementDefinitionProperties_ defines the cross section properties of reinforcement included in reinforced concrete building elements. The property set definition may be used both in conjunction with insitu and precast structures.
history: IFC4 CHANGE Supertype changed from _IfcPropertySetDefinition_ to _IfcPreDefinedPropertySet_

IfcReinforcingBar.name: IfcReinforcingBar
IfcReinforcingBar.shortDefinition: A reinforcing bar is usually made of steel with manufactured deformations in the surface, and used in concrete and masonry construction to provide additional strength. A single instance of this class may represent one or many of actual rebars, for example a row of rebars.
history: IFC 2x4 CHANGE All attributes are optional now. Several attributes are deprecated; their information now provided by _IfcReinforcingBarType_. Attribute _BarRole_ renamed to _PredefinedType_.
IFC4 CHANGE Attribute made optional and deprecated. Use respective attribute at _IfcReinforcingBarType_ instead.
IFC4 CHANGE Attribute deprecated. Use respective attribute at _IfcReinforcingBarType_ instead.
IFC4 CHANGE Attribute renamed from _BarRole_ to _PredefinedType_ and made optional. Type changed from _IfcReinforcingBarRoleEnum_ without changes to the range of enumeration items.
IFC4 CHANGE Attribute made optional and deprecated. Use respective attribute at _IfcReinforcingBarType_ instead.

IfcReinforcingBarType.name: IfcReinforcingBarType
IfcReinforcingBarType.shortDefinition: The reinforcing element type **IfcReinforcingBarType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of reinforcing bars. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements

IfcReinforcingElement.name: IfcReinforcingElement
IfcReinforcingElement.shortDefinition: A reinforcing element represents bars, wires, strands, meshes, tendons, and other components embedded in concrete in such a manner that the reinforcement and the concrete act together in resisting forces.
history: IFC4 CHANGE Attribute deprecated. Use material association at _IfcReinforcingElementType_ instead.

IfcReinforcingElementType.name: IfcReinforcingElementType
IfcReinforcingElementType.shortDefinition: The element component type **IfcReinforcingElementType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of reinforcing elements. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements

IfcReinforcingMesh.name: IfcReinforcingMesh
IfcReinforcingMesh.shortDefinition: A reinforcing mesh is a series of longitudinal and transverse wires or bars of various gauges, arranged at right angles to each other and welded at all points of intersection; usually used for concrete slab reinforcement. It is also known as welded wire fabric. In scope are plane meshes as well as bent meshes.
history: IFC4 CHANGE All attributes are optional now. Several attributes are deprecated; their information is now provided by _IfcReinforcingMeshType_. Attribute _PredefinedType_ added.
IFC4 CHANGE Attribute deprecated. Use respective attribute at _IfcReinforcingMeshType_ instead.
IFC4 CHANGE Attribute deprecated. Use respective attribute at _IfcReinforcingMeshType_ instead.
IFC4 CHANGE Attribute made optional and deprecated. Use respective attribute at _IfcReinforcingMeshType_ instead.
IFC4 CHANGE Attribute made optional and deprecated. Use respective attribute at _IfcReinforcingMeshType_ instead.
IFC4 CHANGE Attribute made optional and deprecated. Use respective attribute at _IfcReinforcingMeshType_ instead.
IFC4 CHANGE Attribute made optional and deprecated. Use respective attribute at _IfcReinforcingMeshType_ instead.
IFC4 CHANGE Attribute made optional and deprecated. Use respective attribute at _IfcReinforcingMeshType_ instead.
IFC4 CHANGE Attribute made optional and deprecated. Use respective attribute at _IfcReinforcingMeshType_ instead.

IfcReinforcingMeshType.name: IfcReinforcingMeshType
IfcReinforcingMeshType.shortDefinition: The reinforcing element type **IfcReinforcingMeshType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of reinforcing meshs. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements

IfcSurfaceFeature.name: IfcSurfaceFeature
IfcSurfaceFeature.shortDefinition: # IfcSurfaceFeature A surface feature is a modification at (onto, or into) of the surface of an element. Parts of the surface of the entire surface may be affected. The volume and mass of the element may be increased, remain unchanged, or be decreased by the surface feature, depending on manufacturing technology. However, any increase or decrease of volume is small compared to the total volume of the element.

IfcTendon.name: IfcTendon
IfcTendon.shortDefinition: A tendon is a steel element such as a wire, cable, bar, rod, or strand used to impart prestress to concrete when the element is tensioned.
history: IFC4 CHANGE Attribute _PredefinedType_ made optional. _NominalDiameter_ and _CrossSectionArea_ made optional and deprecated; this information can now be provided by _IfcTendonType_. Description of _FrictionCoefficient_ corrected.
IFC4 CHANGE Attribute made optional and deprecated. Use respective attribute at _IfcTendonType_ instead.
IFC4 CHANGE Attribute made optional and deprecated. Use respective attribute at _IfcTendonType_ instead.

IfcTendonAnchor.name: IfcTendonAnchor
IfcTendonAnchor.shortDefinition: A tendon anchor is the end connection for tendons in prestressed or posttensioned concrete.

IfcTendonAnchorType.name: IfcTendonAnchorType
IfcTendonAnchorType.shortDefinition: The reinforcing element type **IfcTendonAnchorType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of tendon anchors. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements

IfcTendonConduit.name: IfcTendonConduit
IfcTendonConduit.shortDefinition: A TendonConduit represents the components of the conduit system for tendons embedded in concrete structure.

IfcTendonType.name: IfcTendonType
IfcTendonType.shortDefinition: The reinforcing element type **IfcTendonType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of tendons. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements

IfcVoidingFeature.name: IfcVoidingFeature
IfcVoidingFeature.shortDefinition: A voiding feature is a modification of an element which reduces its volume. Such a feature may be manufactured in different ways, for example by cutting, drilling, or milling of members made of various materials, or by inlays into the formwork of cast members made of materials such as concrete.

IfcActorRole.name: IfcActorRole
IfcActorRole.shortDefinition: This entity indicates a role which is performed by an actor, either a person, an organization or a person related to an organization.

IfcAddress.name: IfcAddress
IfcAddress.shortDefinition: This abstract entity represents various kinds of postal and telecom addresses.

IfcOrganization.name: IfcOrganization
IfcOrganization.shortDefinition: A named and structured grouping with a corporate identity.
history: IFC4.3.0.0 DEPRECATION This attribute is deprecated and shall no longer be used. Use Pset_Address instead related to an IfcActor with _TheActor_ pointing to this entity.

IfcOrganizationRelationship.name: IfcOrganizationRelationship
IfcOrganizationRelationship.shortDefinition: The _IfcOrganizationRelationship_ establishes an association between one relating organization and one or more related organizations.
history: IFC4 CHANGE Attributes _Name_ and _Description_ promoted to new supertype _IfcResourceLevelRelationship_.

IfcPerson.name: IfcPerson
IfcPerson.shortDefinition: This entity represents an individual human being.
history: IFC4 CHANGE Attribute _Id_ renamed to _Identification_. WHERE rule relaxed to allow omission of names if _Identification_ is provided.
IFC4.3.0.0 DEPRECATION This attribute is deprecated and shall no longer be used. Use Pset_Address instead related to an IfcActor with _TheActor_ pointing to this entity.

IfcPersonAndOrganization.name: IfcPersonAndOrganization
IfcPersonAndOrganization.shortDefinition: This entity represents a person acting on behalf of an organization.

IfcPostalAddress.name: IfcPostalAddress
IfcPostalAddress.shortDefinition: This entity represents an address for delivery of paper based mail and other postal deliveries.
history: IFC4.3.0.0 DEPRECATION This entity is deprecated. Use Pset_Address instead, which is applicable to IfcActor, IfcBuilding and IfcSite.

IfcTelecomAddress.name: IfcTelecomAddress
IfcTelecomAddress.shortDefinition: This entity represents an address to which telephone, electronic mail and other forms of telecommunications should be addressed.
history: IFC4 CHANGE Added attribute _MessagingIDs_. Type of attribute _WWWHomePageURL_ compatibly changed from _IfcLabel_ to _IfcURIReference_.
IFC4.3.0.0 DEPRECATION This entity is deprecated. Use Pset_Address instead, which is applicable to IfcActor, IfcBuilding and IfcSite.

IfcApproval.name: IfcApproval
IfcApproval.shortDefinition: An _IfcApproval_ represents information about approval processes such as for a plan, a design, a proposal, or a change order in a construction or facilities management project. _IfcApproval_ is referenced by _IfcRelAssociatesApproval_ in _IfcControlExtension_ schema, and thereby can be related to all subtypes of _IfcRoot_. An approval may also be given to resource objects using _IfcResourceApprovalRelationship_
history: IFC4 CHANGE Attributes Identifier and Name made optional, where rule added to require at least one of them being asserted. Inverse attributes ApprovedObjects, ApprovedResources and HasExternalReferences added. Inverse attribute Properties deleted (more general relationship via inverse ApprovedResources to be used instead).
IFC4 CHANGE Attribute data type changed to _IfcDateTime_ using ISO 8601 representation, renamed from ApprovalDateTime and made OPTIONAL.
IFC4 CHANGE New attribute for approval request replacing IfcApprovalActorRelationship (being deleted).
IFC4 CHANGE New attribute for approval provision replacing IfcApprovalActorRelationship (being deleted).

IfcApprovalRelationship.name: IfcApprovalRelationship
IfcApprovalRelationship.shortDefinition: An _IfcApprovalRelationship_ associates approvals (one relating approval and one or more related approvals), each having different status or level as the approval process or the approved objects evolve.
history: IFC4 CHANGE Subtyped from _IfcResourceLevelRelationship_, order of attributes changed.
IFC4 CHANGE The cardinality of this attribute has been changed to SET.

IfcResourceApprovalRelationship.name: IfcResourceApprovalRelationship
IfcResourceApprovalRelationship.shortDefinition: An _IfcResourceApprovalRelationship_ is used for associating an approval to resource objects. A single approval might be given to one or many items via _IfcResourceObjectSelect_.

IfcConstraint.name: IfcConstraint
IfcConstraint.shortDefinition: An _IfcConstraint_ is used to define a constraint or limiting value or boundary condition that may be applied to an object or to the value of a property.
history: IFC4 CHANGE CreationTime changed to IfcDateTime for ISO 8601 representation, HasExternalReferences new inverse attribute.

IfcMetric.name: IfcMetric
IfcMetric.shortDefinition: An _IfcMetric_ is used to capture quantitative resultant metrics that can be applied to objectives.
history: IFC4 CHANGE ReferencePath attribute added for indicating the value to be constrained along a path of attribute references.
IFC4 ADD1 CHANGE This attribute is now optional.

IfcObjective.name: IfcObjective
IfcObjective.shortDefinition: An _IfcObjective_ captures qualitative information for an objective-based constraint.
history: IFC4 CHANGE Attribute _BenchmarkValues_ modified to be a LIST of _IfcConstraint_, attribute _ResultValues_ replaced with _IfcLogicalOperatorEnum_.
IFC2X4 CHANGE Modified to be a LIST of nested constraints, which replaces the former _IfcConstraintAggregationRelationship_.
IFC2X4 CHANGE This attribute replaces replaces the former _ResultValues_ attribute and indicates the aggregation behaviour formerly defined at _IfcConstraintAggregationRelationship_.

IfcReference.name: IfcReference
IfcReference.shortDefinition: This entity is used to refer to a value of an attribute on an instance. It may refer to the value of a scalar attribute or a value within a collection-based attribute. Referenced attributes may be direct values, object references, collections, inverse object references, and inverse collections. References may be chained to form a path of object-attribute references.

IfcResourceConstraintRelationship.name: IfcResourceConstraintRelationship
IfcResourceConstraintRelationship.shortDefinition: An _IfcResourceConstraintRelationship_ is a relationship entity that enables a constraint to be related to one or more resource level objects.
history: IFC4 CHANGE Renamed from IfcResourceConstraintRelationship and extended to apply to all resource level entities. Subtyped from _IfcResourceLevelRelationship_.

IfcAppliedValue.name: IfcAppliedValue
IfcAppliedValue.shortDefinition: This entity captures a value driven by a formula, with additional qualifications including unit basis, valid date range, and categorization.
history: IFC4 CHANGE Entity made non-abstract to support general formula expressions of constraints, data type of date-based attributes changed into _IfcDate_, _ValueType_ and _Condition_ promoted from _IfcCostValue_, _Components_ and _ArithmeticOperator_ attributes added to replace _IfcAppliedValueRelationship_ for more efficient encoding and reference tracking.
IFC4 CHANGE Type changed from IfcDateTimeSelect.
IFC4 CHANGE Type changed from IfcDateTimeSelect.

IfcCostValue.name: IfcCostValue
IfcCostValue.shortDefinition: _IfcCostValue_ is an amount of money or a value that affects an amount of money.

IfcCurrencyRelationship.name: IfcCurrencyRelationship
IfcCurrencyRelationship.shortDefinition: _IfcCurrencyRelationship_ defines the rate of exchange that applies between two designated currencies at a particular time and as published by a particular source.
history: IFC4 CHANGE Subtyped from _IfcResourceLevelRelationship_, attribute order changed.
IFC4 CHANGE Type changed from IfcDateTimeSelect. Attribute made optional.

IfcEventTime.name: IfcEventTime
IfcEventTime.shortDefinition: _IfcEventTime_ captures the time-related information about an event including the different types of event dates (i.e. actual, scheduled, early, and late).

IfcIrregularTimeSeries.name: IfcIrregularTimeSeries
IfcIrregularTimeSeries.shortDefinition: In an irregular time series, unpredictable bursts of data arrive at unspecified points in time, or most time stamps cannot be characterized by a repeating pattern.

IfcIrregularTimeSeriesValue.name: IfcIrregularTimeSeriesValue
IfcIrregularTimeSeriesValue.shortDefinition: The _IfcIrregularTimeSeriesValue_ describes a value (or set of values) at a particular time point.

IfcLagTime.name: IfcLagTime
IfcLagTime.shortDefinition: _IfcLagTime_ describes the time parameters that may exist within a sequence relationship between two processes.

IfcRecurrencePattern.name: IfcRecurrencePattern
IfcRecurrencePattern.shortDefinition: _IfcRecurrencePattern_ defines repetitive time periods on the basis of regular recurrences such as each Monday in a week, or every third Tuesday in a month. The population of the remaining attributes such as _DayComponent_, _Position_, and _Interval_ depend on the specified recurrence type.

IfcRegularTimeSeries.name: IfcRegularTimeSeries
IfcRegularTimeSeries.shortDefinition: In a regular time series, the data arrives predictably at predefined intervals. In a regular time series there is no need to store multiple time stamps and the algorithms for analyzing the time series are therefore significantly simpler. Using the start time provided in the supertype, the time step is used to identify the frequency of the occurrences of the list of values.

IfcResourceTime.name: IfcResourceTime
IfcResourceTime.shortDefinition: _IfcResourceTime_ captures the time-related information about a construction resource.

IfcSchedulingTime.name: IfcSchedulingTime
