IfcRelCoversSpaces.shortDefinition: The objectified relationship, _IfcRelCoversSpace_, relates a space object to one or many coverings, which faces (or is assigned to) the space.
history: IFC4 DEPRECATION The relationship _IfcRelCoversSpace_ shall not be used anymore, use _IfcRelContainedInSpatialStructure_ instead.
IFC4 CHANGE The attribute name has been changed from _RelatedSpace_ to _RelatingSpace_ with upward compatibility for file based exchange.

IfcRoof.name: IfcRoof
IfcRoof.shortDefinition: A roof is the covering of the top part of a building, it protects the building against the effects of weather.
history: IFC4 CHANGE The attribute has been renamed from _ShapeType_ and changed to be OPTIONAL with upward compatibility for file based exchange.

IfcRoofType.name: IfcRoofType
IfcRoofType.shortDefinition: The building element type _IfcRoofType_ defines commonly shared information for occurrences of roofs. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements

IfcShadingDevice.name: IfcShadingDevice
IfcShadingDevice.shortDefinition: Shading devices are purpose built devices to protect from the sunlight, from natural light, or screening them from view. Shading devices can form part of the facade or can be mounted inside the building, they can be fixed or operable.

IfcShadingDeviceType.name: IfcShadingDeviceType
IfcShadingDeviceType.shortDefinition: The building element type _IfcShadingDeviceType_ defines commonly shared information for occurrences of shading devices. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements

IfcSlab.name: IfcSlab
IfcSlab.shortDefinition: A slab is a component of the construction that may enclose a space vertically. The slab may provide the lower support (floor) or upper construction (roof slab) in any space in a building.
history: HISTORY New entity in IFC2.0; it is a merger of the two previous entities _IfcFloor_, _IfcRoofSlab_, introduced in IFC1.0
IFC2x CHANGE The attribute has been changed into an OPTIONAL attribute.

IfcSlabType.name: IfcSlabType
IfcSlabType.shortDefinition: The element type _IfcSlabType_ defines commonly shared information for occurrences of slabs. The set of shared information may include: * common properties within shared property sets * common material information * common material layer definitions * common shape representations

IfcStair.name: IfcStair
IfcStair.shortDefinition: A stair is a vertical passageway allowing occupants to walk (step) from one floor level to another floor level at a different elevation. It may include a landing as an intermediate floor slab.
history: IFC4 CHANGE The attribute has been renamed from _ShapeType_ and changed to be OPTIONAL with upward compatibility for file based exchange.

IfcStairFlight.name: IfcStairFlight
IfcStairFlight.shortDefinition: A stair flight is an assembly of building components in a single "run" of stair steps (not interrupted by a landing). The stair steps and any stringers are included in the stair flight. A winder is also regarded a part of a stair flight.
history: IFC4 CHANGE The attribute has been deprecated it shall only be exposed with a NIL value. Use _Pset_StairFlightCommon.NumberOfRisers_ instead.
IFC4 CHANGE The attribute has been deprecated it shall only be exposed with a NIL value. Use _Pset_StairFlightCommon.NumberOfTreads_ instead.
IFC4 CHANGE The attribute has been deprecated it shall only be exposed with a NIL value. Use _Pset_StairFlightCommon.RiserHeight_ instead.
IFC4 CHANGE The attribute has been deprecated it shall only be exposed with a NIL value. Use _Pset_StairFlightCommon.TreadLength_ instead.
IFC4 CHANGE The attribute has been added at the end of the entity definition.

IfcStairFlightType.name: IfcStairFlightType
IfcStairFlightType.shortDefinition: The building element type _IfcStairFlightType_ defines commonly shared information for occurrences of stair flights. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements

IfcStairType.name: IfcStairType
IfcStairType.shortDefinition: The building element type _IfcStairType_ defines commonly shared information for occurrences of stairs. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements

IfcWall.name: IfcWall
IfcWall.shortDefinition: The wall represents a vertical construction that may bound or subdivide spaces. Wall are usually vertical, or nearly vertical, planar elements, often designed to bear structural loads. A wall is however not required to be load bearing.
history: IFC4 CHANGE The attribute has been added at the end of the entity definition.

IfcWallStandardCase.name: IfcWallStandardCase
IfcWallStandardCase.shortDefinition: The _IfcWallStandardCase_ defines a wall with certain constraints for the provision of parameters and with certain constraints for the geometric representation. The _IfcWallStandardCase_ handles all cases of walls, that are extruded vertically: * along the positive z axis of the wall object coordinate system, and * along the positive z axis of the global (world) coordinate system and have a single thickness along the path for each wall layer, i.e.: * parallel sides for straight walls * co-centric sides for curved walls. and have either: * a straight line axis (straight wall), or * a circular arc axis (round wall). and shall not have: * aggregated components, that is, parts aggregated to a wall by _IfcRelAggregates_ * shape representation for 'Body' not being an extrusion, or clipped extrusion

IfcWallType.name: IfcWallType
IfcWallType.shortDefinition: The element type _IfcWallType_ defines commonly shared information for occurrences of walls. The set of shared information may include: * common properties within shared property sets * common material information * common material layer definitions * common shape representations

IfcWindow.name: IfcWindow
IfcWindow.shortDefinition: The window is a building element that is predominately used to provide natural light and fresh air. It includes vertical opening but also horizontal opening such as skylights or light domes. It includes constructions with swinging, pivoting, sliding, or revolving panels and fixed panels. A window consists of a lining and one or several panels. A window can: * be a "free standing" window, contained in an _IfcSpatialElement_ such as an _IfcBuildingStorey_. * fill an opening, typically in a wall. The window will then have a _FillsVoids_ attribute which uses the _IfcRelFillsElement_ relationship to relate the _IfcWindow_ with the _IfcOpeningElement_; * be part of an element assembly, typically an _IfcCurtainWall_. The window will then have a _Decomposes_ attribute which uses the the _IfcRelAggregates_ relationship to relate the window with the assembly of elements;
history: IFC4 CHANGE The attributes _PredefinedType_ and _OperationType_ are added, the applicable type object has been changed to _IfcWindowType_.
IFC4 CHANGE The attribute has been added at the end of the entity definition.
IFC4 CHANGE The attribute has been added at the end of the entity definition.

IfcWindowType.name: IfcWindowType
IfcWindowType.shortDefinition: The element type _IfcWindowType_ defines commonly shared information for occurrences of windows. The set of shared information may include: * common properties within shared property sets * common material information * common partitioning of panels * common operation types of panels * common shape representations
history: HISTORY New entity in IFC4. The entity _IfcWindowType_ replaces the previous definition _IfcWindowStyle_ (which is deprecated in IFC4).

IfcDistributionChamberElement.name: IfcDistributionChamberElement
IfcDistributionChamberElement.shortDefinition: A distribution chamber element defines a place at which distribution systems and their constituent elements may be inspected or through which they may travel.

IfcDistributionChamberElementType.name: IfcDistributionChamberElementType
IfcDistributionChamberElementType.shortDefinition: The distribution flow element type **IfcDistributionChamberElementType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of distribution chamber elements. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements * common ports

IfcDistributionCircuit.name: IfcDistributionCircuit
IfcDistributionCircuit.shortDefinition: A distribution circuit is a partition of a distribution system that is conditionally switched such as an electrical circuit.
history: IFC4 CHANGE For electrical power systems, _IfcElectricalCircuit_ has been used for low-voltage (12-1000 V) power circuits and has been replaced by _IfcDistributionCircuit_ in IFC4; _IfcDistributionSystem_ with PredefinedType 'ELECTRICAL' should be used for overall power systems, and _IfcDistributionCircuit_ with PredefinedType 'ELECTRICAL' should be used for each switched circuit.

IfcDistributionControlElement.name: IfcDistributionControlElement
IfcDistributionControlElement.shortDefinition: The distribution element _IfcDistributionControlElement_ defines occurrence elements of a building automation control system that are used to impart control over elements of a distribution system.
history: IFC4 CHANGE Attribute _ControlElementId_ attribute deleted; replaced by classification usage. Ports are now primarily defined using _IfcRelNests_ to enable definition of ports at type definitions (both forward and backward compatible), provide a logical order, and reduce the number of relationship objects needed. The relationship _IfcRelConnectsPortToElement_ is still supported, however is now specific to dynamically connected ports.
IFC4.3.0.0 CHANGE Library references are now to be used instead of a classification system references for referencing external systems such as Building Automation Systems.

IfcDistributionControlElementType.name: IfcDistributionControlElementType
IfcDistributionControlElementType.shortDefinition: The element type _IfcDistributionControlElementType_ defines a list of commonly shared property set definitions of an element and an optional set of product representations. It is used to define an element specification (the specific product information that is common to all occurrences of that product type).
history: IFC4 CHANGE Ports may now be defined using _IfcRelNests_ to enable definition of ports at type definitions (both forward and backward compatible), provide a logical order, and reduce the number of relationship objects needed. The relationship _IfcRelConnectsPortToElement_ is still supported on occurrence objects, however is now specific to dynamically connected ports.

IfcDistributionFlowElement.name: IfcDistributionFlowElement
IfcDistributionFlowElement.shortDefinition: The distribution element _IfcDistributionFlowElement_ defines occurrence elements of a distribution system that facilitate the distribution of energy or matter, such as air, water or power.
history: IFC4 CHANGE Ports are now primarily defined using _IfcRelNests_ to enable definition of ports at type definitions (both forward and backward compatible), provide a logical order, and reduce the number of relationship objects needed. The relationship _IfcRelConnectsPortToElement_ is still supported, however is now specific to dynamically connected ports.

IfcDistributionFlowElementType.name: IfcDistributionFlowElementType
IfcDistributionFlowElementType.shortDefinition: The element type _IfcDistributionFlowElementType_ defines a list of commonly shared property set definitions of an element and an optional set of product representations. It is used to define an element specification (the specific product information that is common to all occurrences of that product type).
history: IFC4 CHANGE Ports may now be defined using _IfcRelNests_ to enable definition of ports at type definitions (both forward and backward compatible), provide a logical order, and reduce the number of relationship objects needed. The relationship _IfcRelConnectsPortToElement_ is still supported on occurrence objects, however is now specific to dynamically connected ports.

IfcDistributionPort.name: IfcDistributionPort
IfcDistributionPort.shortDefinition: A distribution port is an inlet or outlet of a product through which a particular substance may flow.

IfcDistributionSystem.name: IfcDistributionSystem
IfcDistributionSystem.shortDefinition: A distribution system is a network designed to receive, store, maintain, distribute, or control the flow of a distribution media. A common example is a heating hot water system that consists of a pump, a tank, and an interconnected piping system for distributing hot water to terminals.
history: IFC4 CHANGE For electrical power systems, _IfcElectricalCircuit_ has been used for low-voltage (12-1000 V) power circuits and has been replaced by _IfcDistributionCircuit_ in IFC4; _IfcDistributionSystem_ with PredefinedType 'ELECTRICAL' should be used for overall power systems, and _IfcDistributionCircuit_ with PredefinedType 'ELECTRICAL' should be used for each switched circuit.

IfcEnergyConversionDevice.name: IfcEnergyConversionDevice
IfcEnergyConversionDevice.shortDefinition: The distribution flow element _IfcEnergyConversionDevice_ defines the occurrence of a device used to perform energy conversion or heat transfer and typically participates in a flow distribution system. Its type is defined by _IfcEnergyConversionDeviceType_ or its subtypes.
history: IFC4 CHANGE This entity has been deprecated for instantiation and will become ABSTRACT in a future release; new subtypes should now be used instead.

IfcEnergyConversionDeviceType.name: IfcEnergyConversionDeviceType
IfcEnergyConversionDeviceType.shortDefinition: The element type _IfcEnergyConversionDeviceType_ defines a list of commonly shared property set definitions of an energy conversion device and an optional set of product representations. It is used to define an energy conversion device specification (the specific product information, that is common to all occurrences of that product type).

IfcFlowController.name: IfcFlowController
IfcFlowController.shortDefinition: The distribution flow element _IfcFlowController_ defines the occurrence of elements of a distribution system that are used to regulate flow through a distribution system. Examples include dampers, valves, switches, and relays. Its type is defined by _IfcFlowControllerType_ or subtypes.
history: IFC4 CHANGE This entity has been deprecated for instantiation and will become ABSTRACT in a future release; new subtypes should now be used instead.

IfcFlowControllerType.name: IfcFlowControllerType
IfcFlowControllerType.shortDefinition: The element type _IfcFlowControllerType_ defines a list of commonly shared property set definitions of a flow controller and an optional set of product representations. It is used to define a flow controller specification (i.e. the specific product information, that is common to all occurrences of that product type).

IfcFlowFitting.name: IfcFlowFitting
IfcFlowFitting.shortDefinition: The distribution flow element _IfcFlowFitting_ defines the occurrence of a junction or transition in a flow distribution system, such as an elbow or tee. Its type is defined by _IfcFlowFittingType_ or its subtypes.
history: IFC4 CHANGE This entity has been deprecated for instantiation and will become ABSTRACT in a future release; new subtypes should now be used instead.

IfcFlowFittingType.name: IfcFlowFittingType
IfcFlowFittingType.shortDefinition: The element type _IfcFlowFittingType_ defines a list of commonly shared property set definitions of a flow fitting and an optional set of product representations. It is used to define a flow fitting specification (i.e. the specific product information, that is common to all occurrences of that product type).

IfcFlowMovingDevice.name: IfcFlowMovingDevice
IfcFlowMovingDevice.shortDefinition: The distribution flow element _IfcFlowMovingDevice_ defines the occurrence of an apparatus used to distribute, circulate or perform conveyance of fluids, including liquids and gases (such as a pump or fan), and typically participates in a flow distribution system. Its type is defined by _IfcFlowMovingDeviceType_ or its subtypes.
history: IFC4 CHANGE This entity has been deprecated for instantiation and will become ABSTRACT in a future release; new subtypes should now be used instead.

IfcFlowMovingDeviceType.name: IfcFlowMovingDeviceType
IfcFlowMovingDeviceType.shortDefinition: The element type _IfcFlowMovingDeviceType_ defines a list of commonly shared property set definitions of a flow moving device and an optional set of product representations. It is used to define a flow moving device specification (i.e. the specific product information, that is common to all occurrences of that product type).

IfcFlowSegment.name: IfcFlowSegment
IfcFlowSegment.shortDefinition: The distribution flow element _IfcFlowSegment_ defines the occurrence of a segment of a flow distribution system.
history: IFC4 CHANGE This entity has been deprecated for instantiation and will become ABSTRACT in a future release; new subtypes should now be used instead.

IfcFlowSegmentType.name: IfcFlowSegmentType
IfcFlowSegmentType.shortDefinition: The element type _IfcFlowSegmentType_ defines a list of commonly shared property set definitions of a flow segment and an optional set of product representations. It is used to define a flow segment specification (the specific product information, that is common to all occurrences of that product type).

IfcFlowStorageDevice.name: IfcFlowStorageDevice
IfcFlowStorageDevice.shortDefinition: The distribution flow element _IfcFlowStorageDevice_ defines the occurrence of a device that participates in a distribution system and is used for temporary storage (such as a tank). Its type is defined by _IfcFlowStorageDeviceType_ or its subtypes.
history: IFC4 CHANGE This entity has been deprecated for instantiation and will become ABSTRACT in a future release; new subtypes should now be used instead.

IfcFlowStorageDeviceType.name: IfcFlowStorageDeviceType
IfcFlowStorageDeviceType.shortDefinition: The element type _IfcFlowStorageDeviceType_ defines a list of commonly shared property set definitions of a flow storage device and an optional set of product representations. It is used to define a flow storage device specification (the specific product information that is common to all occurrences of that product type).

IfcFlowTerminal.name: IfcFlowTerminal
IfcFlowTerminal.shortDefinition: The distribution flow element _IfcFlowTerminal_ defines the occurrence of a permanently attached element that acts as a terminus or beginning of a distribution system (such as an air outlet, drain, water closet, or sink). A terminal is typically a point at which a system interfaces with an external environment. Its type is defined by _IfcFlowTerminalType_ or its subtypes.
history: IFC4 CHANGE This entity has been deprecated for instantiation and will become ABSTRACT in a future release; new subtypes should now be used instead.

IfcFlowTerminalType.name: IfcFlowTerminalType
IfcFlowTerminalType.shortDefinition: The element type _IfcFlowTerminalType_ defines a list of commonly shared property set definitions of a flow terminal and an optional set of product representations. It is used to define a flow terminal specification (the specific product information that is common to all occurrences of that product type).

IfcFlowTreatmentDevice.name: IfcFlowTreatmentDevice
IfcFlowTreatmentDevice.shortDefinition: The distribution flow element _IfcFlowTreatmentDevice_ defines the occurrence of a device typically used to remove unwanted matter from a fluid, either liquid or gas, and typically participates in a flow distribution system. Its type is defined by _IfcFlowTreatmentDeviceType_ or its subtypes.
history: IFC4 CHANGE This entity has been deprecated for instantiation and will become ABSTRACT in a future release; new subtypes should now be used instead.

IfcFlowTreatmentDeviceType.name: IfcFlowTreatmentDeviceType
IfcFlowTreatmentDeviceType.shortDefinition: The element type _IfcFlowTreatmentDeviceType_ defines a list of commonly shared property set definitions of a flow treatment device and an optional set of product representations. It is used to define a flow treatment device specification (the specific product information that is common to all occurrences of that product type).

IfcRelFlowControlElements.name: IfcRelFlowControlElements
IfcRelFlowControlElements.shortDefinition: This objectified relationship between a distribution flow element occurrence and one-to-many control element occurrences indicates that the control element(s) sense or control some aspect of the flow element. It is applied to _IfcDistributionFlowElement_ and _IfcDistributionControlElement_.

IfcBuildingElementPart.name: IfcBuildingElementPart
IfcBuildingElementPart.shortDefinition: _IfcBuildingElementPart_ represents major components as subordinate parts of a building element. Typical usage examples include precast concrete sandwich walls, where the layers may have different geometry representations. In this case the layered material representation does not sufficiently describe the element. Each layer is represented by an own instance of the _IfcBuildingElementPart_ with its own geometry description.
history: IFC4 CHANGE Moved from _IfcStructuralElementsDomain_ schema to _IfcSharedComponentElements_ schema, compatible change of supertype, attribute _PredefinedType_ added.

IfcBuildingElementPartType.name: IfcBuildingElementPartType
IfcBuildingElementPartType.shortDefinition: The building element part type defines lists of commonly shared property set definitions and representation maps of parts of a building element.

IfcDiscreteAccessory.name: IfcDiscreteAccessory
IfcDiscreteAccessory.shortDefinition: A discrete accessory is a representation of different kinds of accessories included in or added to elements.

IfcDiscreteAccessoryType.name: IfcDiscreteAccessoryType
IfcDiscreteAccessoryType.shortDefinition: The element component type **IfcDiscreteAccessoryType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of discrete accessories. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements

IfcElementComponent.name: IfcElementComponent
IfcElementComponent.shortDefinition: An element component is a representation for minor items included in, added to or connecting to or between elements, which usually are not of interest from the overall building structure viewpoint. However, these small parts may have vital and load carrying functions within the construction. These items do not provide any actual space boundaries. Typical examples of _IfcElementComponent_s include different kinds of fasteners and various accessories.

IfcElementComponentType.name: IfcElementComponentType
IfcElementComponentType.shortDefinition: The element type **IfcElementComponentType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of element components. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements

IfcFastener.name: IfcFastener
IfcFastener.shortDefinition: Representations of fixing parts which are used as fasteners to connect or join elements with other elements. Excluded are mechanical fasteners which are modeled by a separate entity (_IfcMechanicalFastener_).

IfcFastenerType.name: IfcFastenerType
IfcFastenerType.shortDefinition: The element component type **IfcFastenerType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of fasteners. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements

IfcMechanicalFastener.name: IfcMechanicalFastener
IfcMechanicalFastener.shortDefinition: A mechanical fasteners connecting building elements or parts mechanically. A single instance of this class may represent one or many of actual mechanical fasteners, for example an array of bolts or a row of nails.
history: IFC4 CHANGE Supertype changed from _IfcFastener_ to _IfcElementComponent_. Attribute _PredefinedType_ added. Attributes _NominalDiameter_ and _NominalLength_ deprecated.
IFC4 CHANGE Deprecated; the respective attribute of _IfcMechanicalFastenerType_ should be used instead.
IFC4 CHANGE Deprecated; the respective attribute of _IfcMechanicalFastenerType_ should be used instead.

IfcMechanicalFastenerType.name: IfcMechanicalFastenerType
IfcMechanicalFastenerType.shortDefinition: The element component type **IfcMechanicalFastenerType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of mechanical fasteners. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements
history: IFC4 CHANGE Supertype changed from _IfcFastenerType_ to _IfcElementComponentType_. Attributes _PredefinedType_, _NominalDiameter_, _NominalLength_ added.

IfcAsset.name: IfcAsset
IfcAsset.shortDefinition: An asset is a uniquely identifiable grouping of elements acting as a single entity that has a financial value or that can be operated on as a single unit.
history: IFC4 CHANGE All attributes made optional and date values changed to use _IfcDate_.
IFC4 CHANGE Type changed from IfcDateTimeSelect.

IfcFurniture.name: IfcFurniture
IfcFurniture.shortDefinition: Furniture defines complete furnishings such as a table, desk, chair, or cabinet, which may or may not be permanently attached to a building structure.

IfcFurnitureType.name: IfcFurnitureType
IfcFurnitureType.shortDefinition: The furnishing element type **IfcFurnitureType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of furnitures. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements

IfcInventory.name: IfcInventory
IfcInventory.shortDefinition: An inventory is a list of items within an enterprise.
history: IFC4 CHANGE All attributes optional, Where Rule removed.
IFC4 CHANGE Type changed from IfcDateTimeSelect.

IfcOccupant.name: IfcOccupant
IfcOccupant.shortDefinition: An occupant is a type of actor that defines the form of occupancy of a property.

IfcSystemFurnitureElement.name: IfcSystemFurnitureElement
IfcSystemFurnitureElement.shortDefinition: A system furniture element defines components of modular furniture which are not directly placed in a building structure but aggregated inside furniture.

IfcSystemFurnitureElementType.name: IfcSystemFurnitureElementType
IfcSystemFurnitureElementType.shortDefinition: The furnishing element type **IfcSystemFurnitureElementType** defines commonly shared information for occurrences of system furniture elements. The set of shared information may include: * common properties with shared property sets * common representations * common materials * common composition of elements

IfcBorehole.name: IfcBorehole
IfcBorehole.shortDefinition: Representation of the concept of a linear geological and geotechnical model, usually an interpretation but sometimes created direct from ground penetrating measurement

IfcCourse.name: IfcCourse
IfcCourse.shortDefinition: A built element whose length greatly exceeds its thickness and often also its width, usually of a single material laid on site on top of another horizontal or nearly horizontal built element. A course is distinctive from a earthworks element in that a course is a graded granular (which can be bound or unbound) material that is generally processed in some fashion, where as earthworks elements are soil earthen based structure that can be formed by removal and transport of general ground material.

IfcCourseType.name: IfcCourseType
IfcCourseType.shortDefinition: The _IfcCourseType_ provides the type information for _IfcCourse_ occurrences.

IfcEarthworksCut.name: IfcEarthworksCut
IfcEarthworksCut.shortDefinition: The resulting void from modification of existing terrain or road structure by excavation or by other means of removing material.

IfcEarthworksElement.name: IfcEarthworksElement
IfcEarthworksElement.shortDefinition: A type of built element created by earthwork activities to build subgrade, to raise the level of the ground in general or reinforce or stabilize soil by some mechanical or chemical method.

IfcEarthworksFill.name: IfcEarthworksFill
IfcEarthworksFill.shortDefinition: A type of earthworks element created by earthwork activities to build subgrade or to raise the level of the ground in general.

IfcGeomodel.name: IfcGeomodel
IfcGeomodel.shortDefinition: Representation of the concept of a volumetric geological and geotechnical model, usually an interpretation but sometimes created direct from ground penetrating measurement.

IfcGeoslice.name: IfcGeoslice
IfcGeoslice.shortDefinition: Representation of the concept of a sectional planar geological and geotechnical model, usually an interpretation but sometimes created direct from ground penetrating measurement. The assembly may contain one of more strata and anthropic elements. The contained subtypes of _IfcGeotechnicalStratum_ will have shape representations made from polygons reflecting the visible section or poly lines if a 'Yabuki' top surface model is being used.

IfcGeotechnicalAssembly.name: IfcGeotechnicalAssembly
IfcGeotechnicalAssembly.shortDefinition: Representation of the abstract concept of a geological and geotechnical model, usually an interpretation but sometimes created direct from ground penetrating measurement.

IfcGeotechnicalStratum.name: IfcGeotechnicalStratum
IfcGeotechnicalStratum.shortDefinition: Representation of the concept of an identified discrete almost homogeneous geological feature with either an irregular solid or 'Yabuki' top surface shape or a regular voxel cubic shape. A stratum is represented as a discrete entity, specialised (sub typed) from _IfcElement_. A stratum may be broken down into smaller entities if properties vary across the stratum or alternatively properties may be described with bounded numeric ranges. A stratum may carry information about the physical form and its interpretation as a Geological Item (GML).

IfcPavement.name: IfcPavement
IfcPavement.shortDefinition: Type of built element in a road or other paved area to provide an even surface sustaining loads from vehicles or pedestrians, usually comprising several courses.

IfcPavementType.name: IfcPavementType
IfcPavementType.shortDefinition: The _IfcPavementType_ provides the type information for _IfcPavement_ occurrences.

IfcReinforcedSoil.name: IfcReinforcedSoil
IfcReinforcedSoil.shortDefinition: Soil reinforced or stabilized by some mechanical or chemical method.

IfcSign.name: IfcSign
IfcSign.shortDefinition: A sign is a notice on display that gives information or instructions in a written, symbolic or other form. Signs are passive with the most common form of a pictorial panel. An instance of _IfcSign_ refers to the occurrence of an individual panel which can be applied to a surface such as a wall or be aggregated within a Signal Assembly which can include multiple sign occurrences and the associated supporting structural elements (see Signal Assembly for examples).

IfcSignType.name: IfcSignType
IfcSignType.shortDefinition: The _IfcSignType_ provides the type information for _IfcSign_ occurrences.

IfcSignal.name: IfcSignal
IfcSignal.shortDefinition: A signal is an active device that conveys information or instructions to users, by means of an audio, visual signal or a combination of both.

IfcSignalType.name: IfcSignalType
IfcSignalType.shortDefinition: The _IfcSignalType_ provides the type information for _IfcSignal_ occurrences.

IfcActionRequest.name: IfcActionRequest
IfcActionRequest.shortDefinition: A request is the act or instance of asking for something, such as a request for information, bid submission, or performance of work.
history: IFC4 CHANGE Attribute _RequestID_ renamed to _Identification_ and promoted to supertype _IfcControl_, attributes _PredefinedType_, _Status_, and _LongDescription_ added.
IFC4 CHANGE The attribute has been added.
IFC4 CHANGE The attribute has been added.
IFC4 CHANGE The attribute has been added.

IfcCostItem.name: IfcCostItem
IfcCostItem.shortDefinition: An _IfcCostItem_ describes a cost or financial value together with descriptive information that describes its context in a form that enables it to be used within a cost schedule. An _IfcCostItem_ can be used to represent the cost of goods and services, the execution of works by a process, lifecycle cost and more.
history: IFC4 CHANGE The attribute has been added.
IFC4 CHANGE The attribute has been added.
IFC4 CHANGE The attribute has been added.

IfcCostSchedule.name: IfcCostSchedule
IfcCostSchedule.shortDefinition: An _IfcCostSchedule_ brings together instances of _IfcCostItem_ either for the purpose of identifying purely cost information as in an estimate for constructions costs or for including cost information within another presentation form such as a work order.
history: IFC4 CHANGE Attribute _ID_ renamed to _Identification_ and promoted to supertype _IfcControl_, _PredefinedType_ made optional, attributes _PreparedBy_, _SubmittedBy_, _TargetUsers_ removed.
IFC4 CHANGE The attribute has been made optional.
IFC4 CHANGE Type changed from IfcDateTimeSelect.
IFC4 CHANGE Type changed from IfcDateTimeSelect.

IfcPermit.name: IfcPermit
IfcPermit.shortDefinition: A permit is a permission to perform work in places and on artifacts where regulatory, security or other access restrictions apply.
history: IFC4 CHANGE Attribute _PermitID_ renamed to _Identification_ and promoted to supertype _IfcControl_, attributes _PredefinedType_, _Status_, and _LongDescription_ added.
IFC4 CHANGE The attribute has been added.
IFC4 CHANGE The attribute has been added.
IFC4 CHANGE The attribute has been added.

IfcProjectOrder.name: IfcProjectOrder
IfcProjectOrder.shortDefinition: A project order is a directive to purchase products and/or perform work, such as for construction or facilities management.
history: IFC4 CHANGE Attribute _ID_ renamed to _Identification_ and promoted to supertype _IfcControl_. Attribute 'LongDescription' added.
IFC4 CHANGE The attribute has been made optional.

IfcPerformanceHistoryTypeEnum.name: IfcPerformanceHistoryTypeEnum
IfcPerformanceHistoryTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration is used to identify the primary purpose of performance history.

IfcComplexPropertyTemplateTypeEnum.name: IfcComplexPropertyTemplateTypeEnum
IfcComplexPropertyTemplateTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration defines the applicable subtype of instances of _IfcComplexProperty_ or _IfcPhysicalComplexQuantity_ that may be created and defined by an _IfcComplexPropertyTemplate_.

IfcDefinitionSelect.name: IfcDefinitionSelect
IfcDefinitionSelect.shortDefinition: _IfcDefinitionSelect_ provides the option to either select an object or type object _IfcObjectDefinition_, or a property set template or property set, _IfcPropertyDefinition_.
history: HISTORY  New select type in IFC4.

IfcProcessSelect.name: IfcProcessSelect
IfcProcessSelect.shortDefinition: _IfcProcessSelect_ provides the option to either select a process or activity occurrence, _IfcProcess_, or a process or activity type, _IfcTypeProcess_.
history: HISTORY  New select type in IFC4.

IfcProductSelect.name: IfcProductSelect
IfcProductSelect.shortDefinition: _IfcProductSelect_ provides the option to either select a product occurrence, _IfcProduct_, or a product type, _IfcTypeProduct_.
history: HISTORY  New select type in IFC4.

IfcPropertySetDefinitionSelect.name: IfcPropertySetDefinitionSelect
IfcPropertySetDefinitionSelect.shortDefinition: The purpose of this select type is enabling th assignment of a set of _IfcPropertySet_'s using the relationship _IfcRelDefinesByProperties_ relationship in addition to a single _IfcPropertySet_.
history: HISTORY New select type in IFC4.

IfcPropertySetDefinitionSet.name: IfcPropertySetDefinitionSet
IfcPropertySetDefinitionSet.shortDefinition: The purpose of this defined type is enabling the assignment of a set of _IfcPropertySetDefinition_'s to an _IfcRelDefinesByProperties_ relationship.

IfcPropertySetTemplateTypeEnum.name: IfcPropertySetTemplateTypeEnum
IfcPropertySetTemplateTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration defines the general applicability of instances of _IfcPropertySet_, or _IfcElementQuantity_ defined by this _IfcPropertySetTemplate_, to subtypes of _IfcObjectDefinition_.

IfcResourceSelect.name: IfcResourceSelect
IfcResourceSelect.shortDefinition: _IfcResourceSelect_ provides the option to either select a resource occurrence, _IfcResource_, or a resource type, _IfcTypeResource_.
history: HISTORY  New select type in IFC4.

IfcSimplePropertyTemplateTypeEnum.name: IfcSimplePropertyTemplateTypeEnum
IfcSimplePropertyTemplateTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration defines the correct subtype of instances of _IfcSimpleProperty_ or _IfcPhysicalSimpleQuantity_ that are created and are assigned to this _IfcSimplePropertyTemplate_. It also determines how the attributes of _IfcPropertyTemplate_, _PrimaryUnit_, _SecondaryUnit_, _Enumerators_, _PrimaryDataType_, _SecondaryDataType_, should be used.

IfcStrippedOptional.name: IfcStrippedOptional
IfcStrippedOptional.shortDefinition: IfcStrippedOptional is a type never to be instantiated in population models, but serves a purpose for compatibility of exchanged models.

IfcEventTriggerTypeEnum.name: IfcEventTriggerTypeEnum
IfcEventTriggerTypeEnum.shortDefinition: The _IfcEventTriggerTypeEnum_ defines the range of different types of event trigger that can be specified. The definition of event trigger types has been adopted from the Business Process Modeling Notation (BPMN), which is also used in the Information Delivery Manual (IDM) for defining business processes. More detailed information about the use of event trigger types can be found in these specifications.

IfcEventTypeEnum.name: IfcEventTypeEnum
IfcEventTypeEnum.shortDefinition: The _IfcEventTypeEnum_ defines the range of different types of event that can be specified.

IfcProcedureTypeEnum.name: IfcProcedureTypeEnum
IfcProcedureTypeEnum.shortDefinition: The _IfcProcedureTypeEnum_ defines the range of different types of procedure that can be specified.

IfcSequenceEnum.name: IfcSequenceEnum
IfcSequenceEnum.shortDefinition: _IfcSequenceEnum_ is an enumeration that defines the different ways in which a time lag is applied to a sequence between two processes.

IfcTaskTypeEnum.name: IfcTaskTypeEnum
IfcTaskTypeEnum.shortDefinition: The _IfcTaskTypeEnum_ defines the range of different types of task that can be specified.

IfcWorkCalendarTypeEnum.name: IfcWorkCalendarTypeEnum
IfcWorkCalendarTypeEnum.shortDefinition: An _IfcWorkCalendarTypeEnum_ is an enumeration data type that specifies the types of work calendar from which the relevant control can be selected. If given it should help to identify base calendars.

IfcWorkPlanTypeEnum.name: IfcWorkPlanTypeEnum
IfcWorkPlanTypeEnum.shortDefinition: An _IfcWorkPlanTypeEnum_ is an enumeration data type that specifies the types of work plan from which the relevant control can be selected.
history: HISTORY Introduced in IFC4. Derived from _IfcWorkControlTypeEnum_ that was introduced in IFC2.0.

IfcWorkScheduleTypeEnum.name: IfcWorkScheduleTypeEnum
IfcWorkScheduleTypeEnum.shortDefinition: An _IfcWorkScheduleTypeEnum_ is an enumeration data type that specifies the types of work schedule from which the relevant process can be selected.
history: HISTORY Introduced in IFC4. Derived from _IfcWorkControlTypeEnum_ that was introduced in IFC2.0.

IfcAlignmentTypeEnum.name: IfcAlignmentTypeEnum
IfcAlignmentTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration defines the different types of alignments.

IfcAnnotationTypeEnum.name: IfcAnnotationTypeEnum
IfcAnnotationTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration defines the different types of Annotation elements an _IfcAnnotation_ object can represent.

IfcAssemblyPlaceEnum.name: IfcAssemblyPlaceEnum
IfcAssemblyPlaceEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration defines where the assembly is intended to take place, either in a factory or on the building site.

IfcBuiltSystemTypeEnum.name: IfcBuiltSystemTypeEnum
IfcBuiltSystemTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration identifies different types of built systems.

IfcElementAssemblyTypeEnum.name: IfcElementAssemblyTypeEnum
IfcElementAssemblyTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration defines the basic configuration types for element assemblies.

IfcElementCompositionEnum.name: IfcElementCompositionEnum
IfcElementCompositionEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration indicates the composition of a spatial structure element or proxy.

IfcExternalSpatialElementTypeEnum.name: IfcExternalSpatialElementTypeEnum
IfcExternalSpatialElementTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration defines the different types of external spatial elements.

IfcFacilityPartCommonTypeEnum.name: IfcFacilityPartCommonTypeEnum
IfcFacilityPartCommonTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This container defines the different common predefined types of facility parts that can further specify an _IfcFacilityPartCommon_.

IfcFacilityUsageEnum.name: IfcFacilityUsageEnum
IfcFacilityUsageEnum.shortDefinition: This container defines the different usage types of conveyor segments that can further specify an _IfcFacilityPart_.

IfcGeographicElementTypeEnum.name: IfcGeographicElementTypeEnum
IfcGeographicElementTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration defines the different predefined types of geographic elements that can further specify an _IfcGeographicElement_ or an _IfcGeographicElementType_.

IfcGridTypeEnum.name: IfcGridTypeEnum
IfcGridTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration defines the different layout types of grids. Restriction on the correct use of _IfcGrid_ instantiations may be imposed depending on the value of the _PredefinedType_ being _IfcGridTypeEnum_.

IfcInterferenceSelect.name: IfcInterferenceSelect
IfcInterferenceSelect.shortDefinition: A select type that groups together physical and spatial elements for the purpose of defining interferences between these elements.
history: HISTORY  New select type in IFC4x3.

IfcInternalOrExternalEnum.name: IfcInternalOrExternalEnum
IfcInternalOrExternalEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration defines the different types of space boundaries in terms of either being inside the building or outside the building.
history: IFC4 CHANGE Enumeration no longer applicable to _IfcSpace_. The following enumerators are added: EXTERNAL_EARTH, EXTERNAL_WATER, EXTERNAL_FIRE.

IfcOpeningElementTypeEnum.name: IfcOpeningElementTypeEnum
IfcOpeningElementTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration defines the basic types for opening elements.
history: HISTORY New enumeration type in IFC4.

IfcPhysicalOrVirtualEnum.name: IfcPhysicalOrVirtualEnum
IfcPhysicalOrVirtualEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration defines the different types of space boundaries in terms of its physical manifestation. A space boundary can either be physically dividing or can be a virtual divider.

IfcProjectionElementTypeEnum.name: IfcProjectionElementTypeEnum
IfcProjectionElementTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration defines the basic types of projection elements.

IfcReferentTypeEnum.name: IfcReferentTypeEnum
IfcReferentTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration defines the different types of referents.

IfcSpaceBoundarySelect.name: IfcSpaceBoundarySelect
IfcSpaceBoundarySelect.shortDefinition: The _IfcSpaceBoundarySelect_ selects either an internal space for internal or external space boundaries, or an external spatial element for external space boundaries at the outer envelop of the building.
history: HISTORY New select type in IFC4.

IfcSpaceTypeEnum.name: IfcSpaceTypeEnum
IfcSpaceTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration defines the available generic types for _IfcSpace_ and _IfcSpaceType_.
history: IFC4 CHANGE The enumerators INTERNAL and EXTERNAL have been added for upward compatibility to replace _InteriorOrExteriorSpace_ usage.
IFC4.3.2.0 DEPRECATION INTERNAL and EXTERNAL are now deprecated. Use Pset_SpaceCommon.IsExternal instead.
IFC4.3.2.0 DEPRECATION INTERNAL and EXTERNAL are now deprecated. Use Pset_SpaceCommon.IsExternal instead.

IfcSpatialReferenceSelect.name: IfcSpatialReferenceSelect
IfcSpatialReferenceSelect.shortDefinition: _IfcSpatialReferenceSelect_ provides the option to either select a group occurrence, _IfcGroup_ (and all relevant subtypes), or a product occurrence, _IfcProduct_, for referencing to a spatial element.
history: HISTORY  New select type in IFC4x3.

IfcSpatialZoneTypeEnum.name: IfcSpatialZoneTypeEnum
IfcSpatialZoneTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration defines the range of different types of spatial zones that can further specify an _IfcSpatialZone_.

IfcTransportElementTypeEnum.name: IfcTransportElementTypeEnum
IfcTransportElementTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration is used to identify primary transport element types.

IfcVehicleTypeEnum.name: IfcVehicleTypeEnum
IfcVehicleTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration is used to identify **non-fixed** or **mobile** transport element types.

IfcDoorPanelOperationEnum.name: IfcDoorPanelOperationEnum
IfcDoorPanelOperationEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration defines the basic ways how individual door panels operate as shown in Figure 1.

IfcDoorPanelPositionEnum.name: IfcDoorPanelPositionEnum
IfcDoorPanelPositionEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration defines the basic ways to describe the location of a door panel within a door lining.

IfcPermeableCoveringOperationEnum.name: IfcPermeableCoveringOperationEnum
IfcPermeableCoveringOperationEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration defines the valid types of permeable coverings.

IfcWindowPanelOperationEnum.name: IfcWindowPanelOperationEnum
IfcWindowPanelOperationEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration defines the basic ways to describe how window panels operate, as shown in Figure 2.

IfcWindowPanelPositionEnum.name: IfcWindowPanelPositionEnum
IfcWindowPanelPositionEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration defines the basic configuration of the window type in terms of the location of window panels. The window configurations are given for windows with one, two or three panels (including fixed panels) as shown in Figure 1. It corresponds to the _OperationType_ of the _IfcWindowType_ definition, which references the _IfcWindowPanelProperties_.

IfcActuatorTypeEnum.name: IfcActuatorTypeEnum
IfcActuatorTypeEnum.shortDefinition: The _IfcActuatorTypeEnum_ defines the range of different types of actuator that can be specified.

IfcAlarmTypeEnum.name: IfcAlarmTypeEnum
IfcAlarmTypeEnum.shortDefinition: The _IfcAlarmTypeEnum_ defines the range of different types of alarm that can be specified.

IfcControllerTypeEnum.name: IfcControllerTypeEnum
IfcControllerTypeEnum.shortDefinition: The _IfcControllerTypeEnum_ defines the range of different types of controller that can be specified.
history: IFC4 CHANGE PROPORTIONALINTEGRAL and PROPORTIONALINTEGRALDERIVATIVE values deleted (property set enumeration now used). MULTIPOSITION added.

IfcFlowInstrumentTypeEnum.name: IfcFlowInstrumentTypeEnum
IfcFlowInstrumentTypeEnum.shortDefinition: The _IfcFlowInstrumentTypeEnum_ defines the range of different types of flow instrument that can be specified.

IfcSensorTypeEnum.name: IfcSensorTypeEnum
IfcSensorTypeEnum.shortDefinition: The _IfcSensorTypeEnum_ defines the range of different types of sensor that can be specified.

IfcUnitaryControlElementTypeEnum.name: IfcUnitaryControlElementTypeEnum
IfcUnitaryControlElementTypeEnum.shortDefinition: The _IfcUnitaryControlElementTypeEnum_ defines the range of different types and/or functions of unitary control elements possible.

IfcConstructionEquipmentResourceTypeEnum.name: IfcConstructionEquipmentResourceTypeEnum
IfcConstructionEquipmentResourceTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration is used to identify the primary purpose of a construction equipment resource. It is limited to the most common equipment used in construction.

IfcConstructionMaterialResourceTypeEnum.name: IfcConstructionMaterialResourceTypeEnum
IfcConstructionMaterialResourceTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration is used to identify the primary purpose of a construction material resource. It is limited to the most common raw materials used in construction and excludes materials commonly sold as finished products.

IfcConstructionProductResourceTypeEnum.name: IfcConstructionProductResourceTypeEnum
IfcConstructionProductResourceTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration is used to identify the primary purpose of a construction product resource. It describes use of products created for construction, and excludes products of the finished building model.

IfcCrewResourceTypeEnum.name: IfcCrewResourceTypeEnum
IfcCrewResourceTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration is used to identify the primary purpose of a crew resource.

IfcLaborResourceTypeEnum.name: IfcLaborResourceTypeEnum
IfcLaborResourceTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration is used to identify the primary purpose of a labour resource, and is limited to high-level categories based upon common skill sets.

IfcSubContractResourceTypeEnum.name: IfcSubContractResourceTypeEnum
IfcSubContractResourceTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration is used to identify the primary purpose of a subcontract resource.

IfcAudioVisualApplianceTypeEnum.name: IfcAudioVisualApplianceTypeEnum
IfcAudioVisualApplianceTypeEnum.shortDefinition: Defines the range of different types of audio-video devices that can be specified.

IfcCableCarrierFittingTypeEnum.name: IfcCableCarrierFittingTypeEnum
IfcCableCarrierFittingTypeEnum.shortDefinition: The _IfcCableCarrierFittingTypeEnum_ defines the range of different types of cable carrier fitting that can be specified.

IfcCableCarrierSegmentTypeEnum.name: IfcCableCarrierSegmentTypeEnum
IfcCableCarrierSegmentTypeEnum.shortDefinition: The _IfcCableCarrierSegmentTypeEnum_ defines the range of different types of cable carrier segment that can be specified.

IfcCableFittingTypeEnum.name: IfcCableFittingTypeEnum
IfcCableFittingTypeEnum.shortDefinition: The _IfcCableFittingTypeEnum_ defines the range of different types of cable fitting that can be specified.

IfcCableSegmentTypeEnum.name: IfcCableSegmentTypeEnum
IfcCableSegmentTypeEnum.shortDefinition: The _IfcCableSegmentTypeEnum_ defines the range of different types of cable segment that can be specified.
history: HISTORY New type in IFC2x2. Core and busbar segment added in IFC4.

IfcCommunicationsApplianceTypeEnum.name: IfcCommunicationsApplianceTypeEnum
IfcCommunicationsApplianceTypeEnum.shortDefinition: Defines the range of different types of communications appliance that can be specified.

IfcElectricApplianceTypeEnum.name: IfcElectricApplianceTypeEnum
IfcElectricApplianceTypeEnum.shortDefinition: The _IfcElectricApplianceTypeEnum_ defines the range of different types of electrical appliance that can be specified.
history: HISTORY New type in IFC2.0. Renamed from IfcElectricalApplianceTypeEnum in IFC2x2.
IFC2x2 Addendum 1: Missing enumeration values added (ELECTRICHEATER, TUMBLEDRYER and WATERHEATER)

IFC4 CHANGE ELECTRICHEATER changed to FREESTANDINGELECTRICHEATER and noted as being for occasional use. RADIANTHEATER removed as part of general 'heater consolidation'. WATERHEATER, DIRECTWATERHEATER and INDIRECTWATERHEATER rationalized to FREESTANDINGWATERHEATER. WATERCOOLER changed to FREESTANDINGWATERCOOLER.

IfcElectricDistributionBoardTypeEnum.name: IfcElectricDistributionBoardTypeEnum
IfcElectricDistributionBoardTypeEnum.shortDefinition: The _IfcElectricDistributionBoardTypeEnum_ defines different types and/or functions of electric distribution boards.
history: HISTORY New type in IFC4. Replaces IfcElectricDistributionPointTypeEnum.

IfcElectricFlowStorageDeviceTypeEnum.name: IfcElectricFlowStorageDeviceTypeEnum
IfcElectricFlowStorageDeviceTypeEnum.shortDefinition: The _IfcElectricFlowStorageDeviceTypeEnum_ defines different types of electrical flow storage devices.

IfcElectricFlowTreatmentDeviceTypeEnum.name: IfcElectricFlowTreatmentDeviceTypeEnum
IfcElectricFlowTreatmentDeviceTypeEnum.shortDefinition: The IfcElectricFlowTreatmentDeviceTypeEnum defines the range of different types of electric flow treatment device that can be specified.

IfcElectricGeneratorTypeEnum.name: IfcElectricGeneratorTypeEnum
IfcElectricGeneratorTypeEnum.shortDefinition: The _IfcElectricGeneratorTypeEnum_ defines different types of electric generators.
history: HISTORY New type in IFC2x2. Values added in IFC4.

IfcElectricMotorTypeEnum.name: IfcElectricMotorTypeEnum
IfcElectricMotorTypeEnum.shortDefinition: The _IfcElectricMotorTypeEnum_ defines the range of different types of electric motor that can be specified.

IfcElectricTimeControlTypeEnum.name: IfcElectricTimeControlTypeEnum
IfcElectricTimeControlTypeEnum.shortDefinition: The _IfcElectricTimeControlTypeEnum_ defines different types of electrical time control devices.

IfcJunctionBoxTypeEnum.name: IfcJunctionBoxTypeEnum
IfcJunctionBoxTypeEnum.shortDefinition: The _IfcJunctionBoxTypeEnum_ defines different types of junction boxes.
history: HISTORY New type in IFC2x2. Values added in IFC4.

IfcLampTypeEnum.name: IfcLampTypeEnum
IfcLampTypeEnum.shortDefinition: The _IfcLampTypeEnum_ defines the range of different types of lamp available.
history: HISTORY New type in IFC2x2 Addendum.

IfcLightFixtureTypeEnum.name: IfcLightFixtureTypeEnum
IfcLightFixtureTypeEnum.shortDefinition: The _IfcLightFixtureTypeEnum_ defines the different types of light fixtures.

IfcMobileTelecommunicationsApplianceType.name: IfcMobileTelecommunicationsApplianceTypeEnum
IfcMobileTelecommunicationsApplianceType.shortDefinition: The IfcMobileTelecommunicationsApplianceTypeEnum defines the range of different types of mobile telecommunications appliance that can be specified.

IfcMotorConnectionTypeEnum.name: IfcMotorConnectionTypeEnum
IfcMotorConnectionTypeEnum.shortDefinition: The _IfcMotorConnectionTypeEnum_ defines the range of different types of motor connection that can be specified.

IfcOutletTypeEnum.name: IfcOutletTypeEnum
IfcOutletTypeEnum.shortDefinition: The _IfcOutletTypeEnum_ defines the range of different types of outlet that can be specified.
history: IFC4 CHANGE Telephone and Data outlets added.

IfcProtectiveDeviceTrippingUnitTypeEnum.name: IfcProtectiveDeviceTrippingUnitTypeEnum
IfcProtectiveDeviceTrippingUnitTypeEnum.shortDefinition: Defines the range of different tripping unit types that can be used in conjunction with a protective device.

IfcProtectiveDeviceTypeEnum.name: IfcProtectiveDeviceTypeEnum
IfcProtectiveDeviceTypeEnum.shortDefinition: The _IfcProtectiveDeviceTypeEnum_ specifically defines the range of different breaker unit types that can be used in conjunction with protective device. Types may also be used as a reference to a complete protective device in circumstances where tripping units are not separately identified (typically expected to be the case during earlier stages of design).
history: HISTORY New type in IFC2x2. Modified definition and usage in IFC4.

IfcSolarDeviceTypeEnum.name: IfcSolarDeviceTypeEnum
IfcSolarDeviceTypeEnum.shortDefinition: The _IfcSolarDeviceTypeEnum_ defines different types of solar devices.

IfcSwitchingDeviceTypeEnum.name: IfcSwitchingDeviceTypeEnum
IfcSwitchingDeviceTypeEnum.shortDefinition: The _IfcSwitchingDeviceTypeEnum_ defines the range of different types of switch that can be specified.

IfcTransformerTypeEnum.name: IfcTransformerTypeEnum
IfcTransformerTypeEnum.shortDefinition: The _IfcTransformerTypeEnum_ defines the range of different types of transformer that can be specified.

IfcAirTerminalBoxTypeEnum.name: IfcAirTerminalBoxTypeEnum
IfcAirTerminalBoxTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration identifies different types of air terminal boxes.

IfcAirTerminalTypeEnum.name: IfcAirTerminalTypeEnum
IfcAirTerminalTypeEnum.shortDefinition: Enumeration defining the functional types of air terminals.
history: HISTORY New enumeration in IFC2x2. Modified in IFC4 to add LOUVRE and remove EYEBALL, IRIS, LINEARGRILLE, LINEARDIFFUSER.

IfcAirToAirHeatRecoveryTypeEnum.name: IfcAirToAirHeatRecoveryTypeEnum
IfcAirToAirHeatRecoveryTypeEnum.shortDefinition: Defines general types of air-to-air heat recovery devices.

IfcBoilerTypeEnum.name: IfcBoilerTypeEnum
IfcBoilerTypeEnum.shortDefinition: Enumeration defining the typical types of boilers.

IfcBurnerTypeEnum.name: IfcBurnerTypeEnum
IfcBurnerTypeEnum.shortDefinition: Enumeration defining the functional type of burner.
history: HISTORY New enumeration in IFC4. No specific values are defined for this release.

IfcChillerTypeEnum.name: IfcChillerTypeEnum
IfcChillerTypeEnum.shortDefinition: Enumeration defining the typical types of Chillers classified by their method of heat rejection.

IfcCoilTypeEnum.name: IfcCoilTypeEnum
IfcCoilTypeEnum.shortDefinition: Enumeration defining the typical types of coils.

IfcCompressorTypeEnum.name: IfcCompressorTypeEnum
IfcCompressorTypeEnum.shortDefinition: Enumeration defining the typical types of compressors.

IfcCondenserTypeEnum.name: IfcCondenserTypeEnum
IfcCondenserTypeEnum.shortDefinition: Enumeration defining the typical types of condensers. Air is used as the cooling medium for AIRCOOLED; water is used as the cooling medium for all other types.
history: HISTORY New enumeration in IFC2x2. WATERCOOLED added in IFC4.

IfcCooledBeamTypeEnum.name: IfcCooledBeamTypeEnum
IfcCooledBeamTypeEnum.shortDefinition: There are two general types of cooled or chilled beams: passive and active. An active Cooled Beam uses a fan or other auxiliary device to aid in air recirculation, while a passive Cooled Beam relies solely on convection to cool the space.

IfcCoolingTowerTypeEnum.name: IfcCoolingTowerTypeEnum
IfcCoolingTowerTypeEnum.shortDefinition: Enumeration defining the typical types of cooling towers.

IfcDamperTypeEnum.name: IfcDamperTypeEnum
IfcDamperTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration defines the various types of damper

IfcDuctFittingTypeEnum.name: IfcDuctFittingTypeEnum
IfcDuctFittingTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration is used to identify the primary purpose of a duct fitting. This is a very basic categorization mechanism to generically identify the duct fitting type. Subcategories of duct fittings are not enumerated.

IfcDuctSegmentTypeEnum.name: IfcDuctSegmentTypeEnum
IfcDuctSegmentTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration is used to identify the primary purpose of a duct segment. This is a very basic categorization mechanism to generically identify the duct segment type. Subcategories of duct segments are not enumerated.

IfcDuctSilencerTypeEnum.name: IfcDuctSilencerTypeEnum
IfcDuctSilencerTypeEnum.shortDefinition: Enumeration defining the typical types of duct silencers.

IfcEngineTypeEnum.name: IfcEngineTypeEnum
IfcEngineTypeEnum.shortDefinition: Enumeration defining the typical types of engines.

IfcEvaporativeCoolerTypeEnum.name: IfcEvaporativeCoolerTypeEnum
IfcEvaporativeCoolerTypeEnum.shortDefinition: Enumeration defining the typical types of evaporative coolers.

IfcEvaporatorTypeEnum.name: IfcEvaporatorTypeEnum
IfcEvaporatorTypeEnum.shortDefinition: Enumeration defining the typical types of evaporators.

IfcFanTypeEnum.name: IfcFanTypeEnum
IfcFanTypeEnum.shortDefinition: Enumeration defining the typical types of fans.

IfcFilterTypeEnum.name: IfcFilterTypeEnum
IfcFilterTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration defines the various types of filter typically used within building services distribution systems:
history: HISTORY New enumeration in IFC2x. COMPRESSEDAIRFILTER added in IFC4.

IfcFlowMeterTypeEnum.name: IfcFlowMeterTypeEnum
IfcFlowMeterTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration defines various types of flow meter:
history: IFC4 CHANGE ELECTRICMETER and FLOWMETER removed.

IfcHeatExchangerTypeEnum.name: IfcHeatExchangerTypeEnum
IfcHeatExchangerTypeEnum.shortDefinition: Enumeration defining the typical types of heat exchangers.

IfcHumidifierTypeEnum.name: IfcHumidifierTypeEnum
IfcHumidifierTypeEnum.shortDefinition: Enumeration defining the typical types of humidifiers.

IfcMedicalDeviceTypeEnum.name: IfcMedicalDeviceTypeEnum
IfcMedicalDeviceTypeEnum.shortDefinition: Enumeration defining the functional type of medical device.

IfcPipeFittingTypeEnum.name: IfcPipeFittingTypeEnum
IfcPipeFittingTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration is used to identify the primary purpose of a pipe fitting. This is a very basic categorization mechanism to generically identify the pipe fitting type. Subcategories of pipe fittings are not enumerated.

IfcPipeSegmentTypeEnum.name: IfcPipeSegmentTypeEnum
IfcPipeSegmentTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration is used to identify the primary purpose of a pipe segment. This is a very basic categorization mechanism to generically identify the pipe segment type. Subcategories of pipe segments are not enumerated.

IfcPumpTypeEnum.name: IfcPumpTypeEnum
history: HISTORY New enumeration in IFC2x. SUBMERSIBLEPUMP and SUMPPUMP added in IFC4.

IfcSpaceHeaterTypeEnum.name: IfcSpaceHeaterTypeEnum
IfcSpaceHeaterTypeEnum.shortDefinition: Enumeration defining the functional type of space heater.

IfcTankTypeEnum.name: IfcTankTypeEnum
IfcTankTypeEnum.shortDefinition: Enumeration defining the typical types of tanks.
history: HISTORY New enumeration in IFC2x2. BASIN and VESSEL added in IFC4.

IfcTubeBundleTypeEnum.name: IfcTubeBundleTypeEnum
IfcTubeBundleTypeEnum.shortDefinition: Enumeration defining the typical types of tube bundles.

IfcUnitaryEquipmentTypeEnum.name: IfcUnitaryEquipmentTypeEnum
IfcUnitaryEquipmentTypeEnum.shortDefinition: Enumeration defining the functional type of unitary equipment.
history: HISTORY New enumeration in IFC2x. DEHUMIDIFIER added in IFC4.

IfcValveTypeEnum.name: IfcValveTypeEnum
IfcValveTypeEnum.shortDefinition: The _IfcValveTypeEnum_ defines the range of different types of valve that can be specified. These are typically used in conjunction with Pset_ValveTypeCommon, which contains common properties for all valve types.

IfcVibrationIsolatorTypeEnum.name: IfcVibrationIsolatorTypeEnum
IfcVibrationIsolatorTypeEnum.shortDefinition: Enumeration defining the typical types of vibration isolators.

IfcFireSuppressionTerminalTypeEnum.name: IfcFireSuppressionTerminalTypeEnum
IfcFireSuppressionTerminalTypeEnum.shortDefinition: The _IfcFireSuppressionTerminalTypeEnum_ defines the range of different types of fire suppression terminal that can be specified.
history: IFC4.3.0.0 DEPRECATION The value is deprecated and shall no longer be used.

IfcInterceptorTypeEnum.name: IfcInterceptorTypeEnum
IfcInterceptorTypeEnum.shortDefinition: The _IfcInterceptorTypeEnum_ defines the range of different types of interceptor that can be specified.

IfcSanitaryTerminalTypeEnum.name: IfcSanitaryTerminalTypeEnum
IfcSanitaryTerminalTypeEnum.shortDefinition: The _IfcSanitaryTerminalTypeEnum_ defines the range of different types of sanitary terminal that can be specified.

IfcStackTerminalTypeEnum.name: IfcStackTerminalTypeEnum
IfcStackTerminalTypeEnum.shortDefinition: An _IfcStackTerminalTypeEnum_ defines the range of different types of stack terminal that can be specified for use at the top of a vertical stack subsystem.

IfcWasteTerminalTypeEnum.name: IfcWasteTerminalTypeEnum
IfcWasteTerminalTypeEnum.shortDefinition: The _IfcWasteTerminalTypeEnum_ defines the range of different types of waste terminal that can be specified.
history: HISTORY New type in IFC2x2. GREASEINTERCEPTOR, OILINTERCEPTOR, PETROLINTERCEPTOR moved to IfcInterceptorTypeEnum in IFC4.

IfcConveyorSegmentTypeEnum.name: IfcConveyorSegmentTypeEnum
IfcConveyorSegmentTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This container defines the different predefined types of conveyor segments that can further specify an _IfcConveyorSegment_ or _IfcConveyorSegmentType_.

IfcLiquidTerminalTypeEnum.name: IfcLiquidTerminalTypeEnum
IfcLiquidTerminalTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This container defines the different predefined types of liquid terminals that can further specify an _IfcLiquidTerminal_ or _IfcLiquidTerminalType_.

IfcMarineFacilityTypeEnum.name: IfcMarineFacilityTypeEnum
IfcMarineFacilityTypeEnum.shortDefinition: The predefined type container that collects all possible marine facility types together into the implemented enumeration.

IfcMarinePartTypeEnum.name: IfcMarinePartTypeEnum
IfcMarinePartTypeEnum.shortDefinition: The predefined type container that collects all possible marine facility part types together into the implemented enumeration.

IfcMooringDeviceTypeEnum.name: IfcMooringDeviceTypeEnum
IfcMooringDeviceTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This container defines the different predefined types of mooring elements that can further specify an _IfcMooringDevice_ _ or _IfcMooringDeviceType_.

IfcNavigationElementTypeEnum.name: IfcNavigationElementTypeEnum
IfcNavigationElementTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This container defines the different predefined types of navigation elements that can further specify an _IfcNavigationElement_ or _IfcNavigationElementType_.

IfcRailTypeEnum.name: IfcRailTypeEnum
IfcRailTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration defines the different predefined types of an IfcRail or IfcRailType object.

IfcRailwayPartTypeEnum.name: IfcRailwayPartTypeEnum
IfcRailwayPartTypeEnum.shortDefinition: The _IfcRailwayPartTypeEnum_ defines the range of different types of railway part that can be specified.

IfcKerbTypeEnum.name: IfcKerbTypeEnum
IfcKerbTypeEnum.shortDefinition: The predefined type container that collects kerb types together into the implemented enumeration.

IfcRoadPartTypeEnum.name: IfcRoadPartTypeEnum
IfcRoadPartTypeEnum.shortDefinition: The predefined type container that collects all possible road facility part types together into the implemented enumeration.

IfcRoadTypeEnum.name: IfcRoadTypeEnum
IfcRoadTypeEnum.shortDefinition: The predefined type container that collects all possible road facility types together into the implemented enumeration.

IfcActionSourceTypeEnum.name: IfcActionSourceTypeEnum
IfcActionSourceTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration type contains possible action sources.

IfcActionTypeEnum.name: IfcActionTypeEnum
IfcActionTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration type is used to distinguish between possible action types at a high level. It can be used for an automated definition of load combinations and for dimensioning. The contained items and their acronyms are adopted from the Eurocode standard.

IfcAnalysisModelTypeEnum.name: IfcAnalysisModelTypeEnum
IfcAnalysisModelTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This type definition is used to distinguish between different types of structural analysis models. The analysis models are differentiated by their dimensionality.

IfcAnalysisTheoryTypeEnum.name: IfcAnalysisTheoryTypeEnum
IfcAnalysisTheoryTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration is used to distinguish between different types of structural analysis methods, including first order theory, second order theory (small deformations), third order theory (large deformations) and the full nonlinear theory (geometric nonlinearity together with other nonlinearities such as plasticity).

IfcLoadGroupTypeEnum.name: IfcLoadGroupTypeEnum
IfcLoadGroupTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration is used to distinguish between different levels of load grouping. It allows to differentiate between load groups, load cases, and load combinations.
history: IFC4 CHANGE LOAD_COMBINATION_GROUP deprecated. Load cases are directly assigned to load combinations with different factors for each load case—load combination pair by means of _IfcRelAssignsToGroupByFactor_.

IfcProjectedOrTrueLengthEnum.name: IfcProjectedOrTrueLengthEnum
IfcProjectedOrTrueLengthEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration type is needed for load definition and is only considered if the load values are given as global actions and if they define linear or planar loads (that is, one- or two-dimensionally distributed loads).

IfcStructuralActivityAssignmentSelect.name: IfcStructuralActivityAssignmentSelect
IfcStructuralActivityAssignmentSelect.shortDefinition: This type definition shall be used to distinguish between a reference to an instance either of _IfcStructuralItem_ or _IfcElement_. The _IfcStructuralActivityAssignmentSelect_ type is referenced by the entity _IfcRelConnectsStructuralActivity_ which defines the connection between activities (_IfcStructuralActivity_) and the loaded element.

IfcStructuralCurveActivityTypeEnum.name: IfcStructuralCurveActivityTypeEnum
IfcStructuralCurveActivityTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration defines the distribution of load values in a curve action or reaction.

IfcStructuralCurveMemberTypeEnum.name: IfcStructuralCurveMemberTypeEnum
IfcStructuralCurveMemberTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration distinguishes between different types of structural 'curve' members, such as cables.

IfcStructuralSurfaceActivityTypeEnum.name: IfcStructuralSurfaceActivityTypeEnum
IfcStructuralSurfaceActivityTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration defines the distribution of load values in a surface action or reaction.

IfcStructuralSurfaceMemberTypeEnum.name: IfcStructuralSurfaceMemberTypeEnum
IfcStructuralSurfaceMemberTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration distinguishes between different types of structural surface members, such as the typical mechanical function of walls, slabs and shells.

IfcBendingParameterSelect.name: IfcBendingParameterSelect
IfcBendingParameterSelect.shortDefinition: A select type for selecting between simple measure types for reinforcement bending parameters.

IfcFootingTypeEnum.name: IfcFootingTypeEnum
IfcFootingTypeEnum.shortDefinition: Enumeration defining the generic footing type.
history: IFC4x2 CHANGE Enum made optional and deprecated. Use the dedicated class _IfcCaissonFoundation_ instead.

IfcPileConstructionEnum.name: IfcPileConstructionEnum
IfcPileConstructionEnum.shortDefinition: Enumeration defining the construction type for piles. The type is mainly based on how the piles are used and manufactured. Some material information is mixed in because this affects the way the piles are used.

IfcPileTypeEnum.name: IfcPileTypeEnum
history: IFC 2x4 CHANGE: Items BORED, DRIVEN, JETGROUTING added.

IfcReinforcingBarTypeEnum.name: IfcReinforcingBarTypeEnum
IfcReinforcingBarTypeEnum.shortDefinition: Enumeration defining standard types for the role, purpose or usage of the bar, i.e. the kind of loads and stresses they are intended to carry.
history: IFC4 CHANGE Item ANCHORING added. Enumeration renamed in IFC4 from _IfcReinforcingBarRoleEnum_ without changes to the range of enumeration items.

IfcReinforcingMeshTypeEnum.name: IfcReinforcingMeshTypeEnum
IfcReinforcingMeshTypeEnum.shortDefinition: Enumeration defining the reinforcing mesh type.

IfcSurfaceFeatureTypeEnum.name: IfcSurfaceFeatureTypeEnum
IfcSurfaceFeatureTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration indicates the type of a surface feature.

IfcTendonAnchorTypeEnum.name: IfcTendonAnchorTypeEnum
IfcTendonAnchorTypeEnum.shortDefinition: Enumeration defining the types of tendon anchors.

IfcTendonTypeEnum.name: IfcTendonTypeEnum
IfcTendonTypeEnum.shortDefinition: Enumeration defining the types of tendons.

IfcVoidingFeatureTypeEnum.name: IfcVoidingFeatureTypeEnum
IfcVoidingFeatureTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration qualifies a voiding feature regarding its shape and configuration relative to the voided element.

IfcActorSelect.name: IfcActorSelect
IfcActorSelect.shortDefinition: The actor select type allows a person, or an organization, or a person associated with an organization to be referenced.

IfcAddressTypeEnum.name: IfcAddressTypeEnum
IfcAddressTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration identifies the logical location of the address.

IfcRoleEnum.name: IfcRoleEnum
IfcRoleEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration defines roles which may be played by an actor.
history: IFC4 CHANGE Spelling of COMMISSIONINGENGINEER corrected.

IfcBenchmarkEnum.name: IfcBenchmarkEnum
IfcBenchmarkEnum.shortDefinition: _IfcBenchmarkEnum_ is an enumeration used to identify the logical comparators that can be applied in conjunction with constraint values.
history: IFC4 CHANGE Extended to include comparators for item-set and set-item comparisons: INCLUDES, NOTINCLUDES, INCLUDEDIN and NOTINCLUDEDIN, to test if an individual item is a member of a given aggregation, or if an aggregation has a given individual item as a member.

IfcConstraintEnum.name: IfcConstraintEnum
IfcConstraintEnum.shortDefinition: _IfcConstraintEnum_ is an enumeration used to qualify a constraint.

IfcLogicalOperatorEnum.name: IfcLogicalOperatorEnum
IfcLogicalOperatorEnum.shortDefinition: _IfcLogicalOperatorEnum_ is an enumeration that defines the logical operators that may be applied for the satisfaction of one or more operands (_IfcConstraint_) at a time.
history: IFC4 CHANGE Extended to include LOGICALXOR, LOGICALNOTAND and LOGICALNOTOR.

IfcMetricValueSelect.name: IfcMetricValueSelect
IfcMetricValueSelect.shortDefinition: _IfcMetricValueSelect_ is a select type that enables selection of the data type for the value component of an _IfcMetric_.
history: IFC4 CHANGE IfcValue added, which includes removed IfcDateTime and IfcText; IfcReference added.

IfcObjectiveEnum.name: IfcObjectiveEnum
IfcObjectiveEnum.shortDefinition: _IfcObjectiveEnum_ is an enumeration used to determine the objective for which purpose the constraint needs to be satisfied.
history: IFC4 CHANGE Extended to include CODEWAIVER.

IfcAppliedValueSelect.name: IfcAppliedValueSelect
IfcAppliedValueSelect.shortDefinition: _IfcAppliedValueSelect_ defines a value to be calculated within a formula.
history: HISTORY New select type in IFC2x2.

IfcArithmeticOperatorEnum.name: IfcArithmeticOperatorEnum
IfcArithmeticOperatorEnum.shortDefinition: _IfcArithmeticOperatorEnum_ specifies the form of arithmetic operation implied by the relationship.

IfcDataOriginEnum.name: IfcDataOriginEnum
IfcDataOriginEnum.shortDefinition: _IfcDataOriginEnum_ identifies the origin of time data.

IfcDate.name: IfcDate
IfcDate.shortDefinition: The _IfcDate_ identifies a particular calendar day, expressed by year, calendar month and day in month. It is expressed by a string value following a particular lexical representation.

IfcDateTime.name: IfcDateTime
IfcDateTime.shortDefinition: The _IfcDateTime_ identifies a particular point in time, expressed by hours, minutes and optional seconds elapsed within a calendar day, expressed by year, calendar month and day in month. It is expressed by a string value following a particular lexical representation.

IfcDayInMonthNumber.name: IfcDayInMonthNumber
IfcDayInMonthNumber.shortDefinition: _IfcDayInMonthNumber_ is an integer that defines the position of the specified day in a month.

IfcDayInWeekNumber.name: IfcDayInWeekNumber
IfcDayInWeekNumber.shortDefinition: The _IfcDayInWeekNumber_ is an integer that defines the position of the specified day in a week. The positions have the following meaning that assigns the ordinal day number in the week to the Calendar day name.

IfcDuration.name: IfcDuration
IfcDuration.shortDefinition: The _IfcDuration_ identifies a quantity of time (or a "length" of an event occurring in time).

IfcMonthInYearNumber.name: IfcMonthInYearNumber
IfcMonthInYearNumber.shortDefinition: _IfcMonthInYearNumber_ is an integer that defines the position of the specified month in a year.

IfcRecurrenceTypeEnum.name: IfcRecurrenceTypeEnum
IfcRecurrenceTypeEnum.shortDefinition: _IfcRecurrenceTypeEnum_ enumerates the recurring pattern type, with valid combinations as indicated.

IfcTaskDurationEnum.name: IfcTaskDurationEnum
IfcTaskDurationEnum.shortDefinition: _IfcTaskDurationEnum_ identifies how a time duration is measured.

IfcTime.name: IfcTime
IfcTime.shortDefinition: The _IfcTime_ identifies a time within a day, expressed by hours, minutes and second. It is expressed by a string value following a particular lexical representation.

IfcTimeOrRatioSelect.name: IfcTimeOrRatioSelect
IfcTimeOrRatioSelect.shortDefinition: _IfcTimeOrRatioSelect_ allows a value to be selected as being either a ratio or a time measure.
history: HISTORY New select type in IFC4

IfcTimeSeriesDataTypeEnum.name: IfcTimeSeriesDataTypeEnum
IfcTimeSeriesDataTypeEnum.shortDefinition: _IfcTimeSeriesDataTypeEnum_ describes a type of time series data and is used to determine a value during the time series which is not explicitly specified.

IfcTimeStamp.name: IfcTimeStamp
IfcTimeStamp.shortDefinition: _IfcTimeStamp_ is an indication of date and time by measuring the number of seconds which have elapsed since 1 January 1970, 00:00:00 UTC.

IfcClassificationReferenceSelect.name: IfcClassificationReferenceSelect
IfcClassificationReferenceSelect.shortDefinition: The _IfcClassificationReferenceSelect_ enables selection of whether a classification reference is a subset of another classification reference or is a top level entry of a classification source.
history: HISTORY New Select Type in IFC2x

IfcClassificationSelect.name: IfcClassificationSelect
IfcClassificationSelect.shortDefinition: The _IfcClassificationSelect_ enables selection of whether a classification reference is to be referenced from an external source, or whether a classification is referenced as such.
history: HISTORY New select type in IFC2x
IFC4 CHANGE Select renamed from IfcClassificationNotationSelect.

IfcDocumentConfidentialityEnum.name: IfcDocumentConfidentialityEnum
IfcDocumentConfidentialityEnum.shortDefinition: _IfcDocumentConfidentialityEnum_ enables selection of the level of confidentiality of document information from a list of choices.

IfcDocumentSelect.name: IfcDocumentSelect
IfcDocumentSelect.shortDefinition: The _IfcDocumentSelect_ enables selection of whether document information is to be contained within an IFC model or is to be referenced from an external source.
history: HISTORY New select type in IFC2x

IfcDocumentStatusEnum.name: IfcDocumentStatusEnum
IfcDocumentStatusEnum.shortDefinition: _IfcDocumentStatusEnum_ enables selection of the status of document information from a list of choices.

IfcLanguageId.name: IfcLanguageId
IfcLanguageId.shortDefinition: The _IfcLanguageId_ identifies the language in which a natural language text is expressed. It uses a language tag to identify the language.
history: HISTORY New defined datatype in IFC4.

IfcLibrarySelect.name: IfcLibrarySelect
IfcLibrarySelect.shortDefinition: The _IfcLibrarySelect_ enables selection of whether library information is to be contained within an IFC model or is to be referenced from an external source.
history: HISTORY New select type in IFC2x

IfcResourceObjectSelect.name: IfcResourceObjectSelect
IfcResourceObjectSelect.shortDefinition: The _IfcResourceObjectSelect_ enables selection of resource level objects that are to be related to an resource level relationship object. The use of _IfcResourceObjectSelect_ includes the ability to assign an external reference entity (library, classification, or documentation reference) to entities within the resource level.
history: HISTORY New select type in IFC4.

IfcURIReference.name: IfcURIReference
