IfcURIReference.shortDefinition: The _IfcURIReference_ provides for identifying a Uniform Resource Identifier (URI). A URI can be classified as a locator or a name or both, that is it may comprise a Uniform Resource Locator (URL) and/or a Uniform Resource Name (URN).
history: HISTORY New defined datatype in IFC4.

IfcAlignmentCantSegmentTypeEnum.name: IfcAlignmentCantSegmentTypeEnum
IfcAlignmentCantSegmentTypeEnum.shortDefinition: The IfcAlignmentCantSegmentTypeEnum indicates the type of a segment of a cant alignment segment (IfcAlignmentCantSegment).

IfcAlignmentHorizontalSegmentTypeEnum.name: IfcAlignmentHorizontalSegmentTypeEnum
IfcAlignmentHorizontalSegmentTypeEnum.shortDefinition: The IfcAlignmentHorizontalSegmentTypeEnum indicates the type of a segment of a horizontal alignment segment (IfcAlignmentHorizontalSegment). Horizontal segments can be viewed from a geometric perspective and from a kinematic perspective. In recent times the kinematic perspective gained importance. The enumerations are detailed according to this development especially in modern track design.

IfcAlignmentVerticalSegmentTypeEnum.name: IfcAlignmentVerticalSegmentTypeEnum
IfcAlignmentVerticalSegmentTypeEnum.shortDefinition: The IfcAlignmentVerticalSegmentTypeEnum indicates the type of a segment of a vertical alignment segment (IfcAlignmentVerticalSegment).

IfcCurveOrEdgeCurve.name: IfcCurveOrEdgeCurve
IfcCurveOrEdgeCurve.shortDefinition: _IfcCurveOrEdgeCurve_ provides the option to either select a geometric curve (_IfcCurve_ and subtypes) within a geometric model, or a curve with associated geometry and coordinates (_IfcEdgeCurve_) within a topological model.
history: HISTORY New select type in IFC2x3.

IfcGridPlacementDirectionSelect.name: IfcGridPlacementDirectionSelect
IfcGridPlacementDirectionSelect.shortDefinition: _IfcGridPlacementDirectionSelect_ enables the choice of defining a grid placement be either an explicit direction, or by referencing a second grid intersection to provide the direction.
history: HISTORY   New select type in IFC4.

IfcPointOrVertexPoint.name: IfcPointOrVertexPoint
IfcPointOrVertexPoint.shortDefinition: _IfcPointOrVertexPoint_ provides the option to either select a geometric point (_IfcPoint_ and subtypes) within a geometric model, or a vertex with associated point coordinates (_IfcVertexPoint_) within a topological model.
history: HISTORY New select type in IFC2x3.

IfcSolidOrShell.name: IfcSolidOrShell
IfcSolidOrShell.shortDefinition: The _IfcSolidOrShell_ provides the option to either select a geometric volume (_IfcSolidModel_ and subtypes) within a geometric model, or a shell (_IfcClosedShell_) within a topological model.
history: HISTORY   New select type in IFC4.

IfcSurfaceOrFaceSurface.name: IfcSurfaceOrFaceSurface
IfcSurfaceOrFaceSurface.shortDefinition: _IfcSurfaceOrFaceSurface_ provides the option to either select a geometric surface (_IfcSurface_ and subtypes) within a geometric model, or a face with associated surface geometry and coordinates (_IfcFaceSurface_) within a topological model.
history: HISTORY New select type in IFC2x3.

IfcBooleanOperand.name: IfcBooleanOperand
IfcBooleanOperand.shortDefinition: Select type including all geometric representation items which may participate in a Boolean operation to form a CSG solid. It includes solid models, half space solids and CSG primitives. Boolean results can also be used as operands thus enabling nested Boolean operations.
history: IFC4 CHANGE The item _IfcTessellatedFaceSet_ has been added to the select.

IfcBooleanOperator.name: IfcBooleanOperator
IfcBooleanOperator.shortDefinition: Boolean operators that apply to the first and second Boolean operands.

IfcCsgSelect.name: IfcCsgSelect
IfcCsgSelect.shortDefinition: Select type enabling the choice between _IfcBooleanResult_ and subtypes of _IfcCsgPrimitive3D_ as potential root tree expression at _IfcCsgSolid_.

IfcGeometricSetSelect.name: IfcGeometricSetSelect
IfcGeometricSetSelect.shortDefinition: The _IfcGeometricSetSelect_ includes the geometric representation items applicable to be part of the geometric set.

IfcArcIndex.name: IfcArcIndex
IfcArcIndex.shortDefinition: The _IfcArcIndex_ describes a single circular arc segment within a poly curve by providing a list on indices. The first index is the start point of the circular arc, the second index is a point on arc, the third index is the end point of the circular arc. The three points shall not be co-linear.
history: HISTORY New Type in IFC4 ADD1

IfcAxis2Placement.name: IfcAxis2Placement
IfcAxis2Placement.shortDefinition: The _IfcAxis2Placement_ allows for the choice of various placement entities.

IfcBSplineCurveForm.name: IfcBSplineCurveForm
IfcBSplineCurveForm.shortDefinition: The _IfcBSplineCurveForm_ represents a part of a curve of some sppecific form.

IfcBSplineSurfaceForm.name: IfcBSplineSurfaceForm
IfcBSplineSurfaceForm.shortDefinition: The _IfcBSplineSurfaceForm_ represents a part of a surface of some specific form.

IfcCurveOnSurface.name: IfcCurveOnSurface
IfcCurveOnSurface.shortDefinition: The _IfcCurveOnSurface_ enables the choice of curve types on parametric surface.

IfcDimensionCount.name: IfcDimensionCount
IfcDimensionCount.shortDefinition: The _IfcDimensionCount_ defines the dimensionality of the coordinate space. It is restricted to have the dimensionality of either 1, 2, or 3 for the purpose of this specification.

IfcKnotType.name: IfcKnotType
IfcKnotType.shortDefinition: The _IfcKnotType_ indicates the particular form of b-spline knots.

IfcLineIndex.name: IfcLineIndex
IfcLineIndex.shortDefinition: The _IfcLineIndex_ describes a single or multiple straight segments within a poly curve by providing a list on indices. The first index is the start point of the line segment, the last index is the end point of the line segment. If more than two indices are included, then all intermediate indices define intermediate points of the poly line segment connected in the order of appearance of the list of indices.
history: HISTORY New Type in IFC4 ADD1

IfcPreferredSurfaceCurveRepresentation.name: IfcPreferredSurfaceCurveRepresentation
IfcPreferredSurfaceCurveRepresentation.shortDefinition: The _IfcPreferredSurfaceCurveRepresentation_ indicates the preferred form of an edge curve representation.
history: HISTORY New type in IFC4 Addendum 2.

IfcSegmentIndexSelect.name: IfcSegmentIndexSelect
IfcSegmentIndexSelect.shortDefinition: The _IfcSegmentIndexSelect_ provides a choice of different list of indices into a point list.
history: HISTORY New Type in IFC4 ADD1

IfcTransitionCode.name: IfcTransitionCode
IfcTransitionCode.shortDefinition: _IfcTransitionCode_ indicates the continuity between consecutive segments of a curve or surface.

IfcTrimmingPreference.name: IfcTrimmingPreference
IfcTrimmingPreference.shortDefinition: The _IfcTrimmingPreference_ indicates the preferred way of trimming.

IfcTrimmingSelect.name: IfcTrimmingSelect
IfcTrimmingSelect.shortDefinition: The IfcTrimmingSelect allows for a choice between two ways of trimming a curve.

IfcVectorOrDirection.name: IfcVectorOrDirection
IfcVectorOrDirection.shortDefinition: The _IfcVectorOrDirection_ enables a choice between _IfcVector_ and _IfcDirection_ for vector functions.

IfcCardinalPointReference.name: IfcCardinalPointReference
IfcCardinalPointReference.shortDefinition: An _IfcCardinalPointReference_ is an index reference to significant points of a section profile. This index is used to describe the spatial relationship between the section of a member and a reference axis of the same member.

IfcDirectionSenseEnum.name: IfcDirectionSenseEnum
IfcDirectionSenseEnum.shortDefinition: _IfcDirectionSenseEnum_ is an enumeration denoting whether sense of direction is positive or negative along the given axis.

IfcLayerSetDirectionEnum.name: IfcLayerSetDirectionEnum
IfcLayerSetDirectionEnum.shortDefinition: _IfcLayerSetDirectionEnum_ provides identification of the axis of element geometry, denoting the layer set thickness direction, or direction of layer offsets.

IfcMaterialSelect.name: IfcMaterialSelect
IfcMaterialSelect.shortDefinition: _IfcMaterialSelect_ provides selection of either a material definition or a material usage definition that can be assigned to an element, a resource or another entity within this specification.
history: IFC4 CHANGE The select now includes two new abstract entities _IfcMaterialDefinition_ and _IfcMaterialUsageDefinition_ with upward compatibility. The use of _IfcMaterialList_ is deprecated from IFC4 onwards.

IfcAbsorbedDoseMeasure.name: IfcAbsorbedDoseMeasure
IfcAbsorbedDoseMeasure.shortDefinition: _IfcAbsorbedDoseMeasure_ is a measure of the absorbed radioactivity dose.

IfcAmountOfSubstanceMeasure.name: IfcAmountOfSubstanceMeasure
IfcAmountOfSubstanceMeasure.shortDefinition: An amount of substance measure is the value for the quantity of a substance when compared with the number of atoms in 0.012 kg of carbon 12.

IfcAngularVelocityMeasure.name: IfcAngularVelocityMeasure
IfcAngularVelocityMeasure.shortDefinition: _IfcAngularVelocityMeasure_ is a measure of the velocity of a body measured in terms of angle subtended per unit time.

IfcAreaDensityMeasure.name: IfcAreaDensityMeasure
IfcAreaDensityMeasure.shortDefinition: _IfcAreaDensityMeasure_ is a measure of the density of a two-dimensional object and is calculated as the mass per unit area.

IfcAreaMeasure.name: IfcAreaMeasure
IfcAreaMeasure.shortDefinition: An area measure is the value of the extent of a surface.

IfcBinary.name: IfcBinary
IfcBinary.shortDefinition: _IfcBinary_ is a defined type of simple data type BINARY which may be used to encode binary data such as embedded textures.

IfcBoolean.name: IfcBoolean
IfcBoolean.shortDefinition: _IfcBoolean_ is a defined data type of simple data type Boolean. It is required since a select type (_IfcSimpleValue_) cannot directly include simple types in its select list. A Boolean type can have value TRUE or FALSE.

IfcComplexNumber.name: IfcComplexNumber
IfcComplexNumber.shortDefinition: _IfcComplexNumber_ is a representation of a complex number expressed as an array with two elements. The first element (index 1) denotes the real component which is the numerical component of a complex number whose square roots can be calculated explicitly. The second element (index 2) denotes the imaginary component which is the numerical component of a complex number whose square roots cannot be determined other than through the provision of the square of the imaginary number j where j\^2 = -1. Note that the imaginary component may be referred to as i in certain references.

IfcCompoundPlaneAngleMeasure.name: IfcCompoundPlaneAngleMeasure
IfcCompoundPlaneAngleMeasure.shortDefinition: _IfcCompoundPlaneAngleMeasure_ is a compound measure of plane angle in degrees, minutes, seconds, and optionally millionth-seconds of arc.

IfcContextDependentMeasure.name: IfcContextDependentMeasure
IfcContextDependentMeasure.shortDefinition: The value of a physical quantity as defined within the exchange context.

IfcCountMeasure.name: IfcCountMeasure
IfcCountMeasure.shortDefinition: A count measure is the value of a count of items.
history: HISTORY IFC4.3.0.0 Type changed from NUMBER to INTEGER

IfcCurvatureMeasure.name: IfcCurvatureMeasure
IfcCurvatureMeasure.shortDefinition: _IfcCurvatureMeasure_ is a measure for curvature, which is defined as the change of slope per length. This is typically a computed value in structural analysis. It is usually measured in rad/m.

IfcDerivedMeasureValue.name: IfcDerivedMeasureValue
IfcDerivedMeasureValue.shortDefinition: _IfcDerivedMeasureValue_ is a select type for selecting between derived measure types.

IfcDerivedUnitEnum.name: IfcDerivedUnitEnum
IfcDerivedUnitEnum.shortDefinition: _IfcDerivedUnitEnum_ is an enumeration type for allowed types of derived units.
history: IFC 2x4 change: added AREADENSITYUNIT, SOUNDPOWERLEVELUNIT, SOUNDPRESSURELEVELUNIT and TEMPERATURERATEOFCHANGEUNIT.

IfcDescriptiveMeasure.name: IfcDescriptiveMeasure
IfcDescriptiveMeasure.shortDefinition: A descriptive measure is a human interpretable definition of a quantifiable value. The mode of interpretation has to be established for the exchange context.

IfcDoseEquivalentMeasure.name: IfcDoseEquivalentMeasure
IfcDoseEquivalentMeasure.shortDefinition: _IfcDoseEquivalentMeasure_ is a measure of the radioactive dose equivalent.

IfcDynamicViscosityMeasure.name: IfcDynamicViscosityMeasure
IfcDynamicViscosityMeasure.shortDefinition: _IfcDynamicViscosityMeasure_ is a measure of the viscous resistance of a medium.

IfcElectricCapacitanceMeasure.name: IfcElectricCapacitanceMeasure
IfcElectricCapacitanceMeasure.shortDefinition: _IfcElectricCapacitanceMeasure_ is a measure of the electric capacitance.

IfcElectricChargeMeasure.name: IfcElectricChargeMeasure
IfcElectricChargeMeasure.shortDefinition: _IfcElectricChargeMeasure_ is a measure of the electric charge.

IfcElectricConductanceMeasure.name: IfcElectricConductanceMeasure
IfcElectricConductanceMeasure.shortDefinition: _IfcElectricConductanceMeasure_ is a measure of the electric conductance.

IfcElectricCurrentMeasure.name: IfcElectricCurrentMeasure
IfcElectricCurrentMeasure.shortDefinition: The value for the movement of electrically charged particles.

IfcElectricResistanceMeasure.name: IfcElectricResistanceMeasure
IfcElectricResistanceMeasure.shortDefinition: _IfcElectricResistanceMeasure_ is a measure of the electric resistance.

IfcElectricVoltageMeasure.name: IfcElectricVoltageMeasure
IfcElectricVoltageMeasure.shortDefinition: _IfcElectricVoltageMeasure_ is a measure of electromotive force.

IfcEnergyMeasure.name: IfcEnergyMeasure
IfcEnergyMeasure.shortDefinition: _IfcEnergyMeasure_ is a measure of energy required or used.

IfcForceMeasure.name: IfcForceMeasure
IfcForceMeasure.shortDefinition: _IfcForceMeasure_ is a measure of the force.

IfcFrequencyMeasure.name: IfcFrequencyMeasure
IfcFrequencyMeasure.shortDefinition: _IfcFrequencyMeasure_ is a measure of the number of times that an item vibrates in unit time.

IfcHeatFluxDensityMeasure.name: IfcHeatFluxDensityMeasure
IfcHeatFluxDensityMeasure.shortDefinition: IfcHeatFluxDensityMeasure is a measure of the density of heat flux within a body.

IfcHeatingValueMeasure.name: IfcHeatingValueMeasure
IfcHeatingValueMeasure.shortDefinition: _IfcHeatingValueMeasure_ defines the amount of energy released (usually in MJ/kg) when a fuel is burned.
history: HISTORY This is new type in IFC2x2.

IfcIdentifier.name: IfcIdentifier
IfcIdentifier.shortDefinition: An identifier is an alphanumeric string which allows an individual thing to be identified. It may not provide natural-language meaning.
history: IFC 2x4 CHANGE Previously recommended size restriction of 255 characters is now mandatory.

IfcIlluminanceMeasure.name: IfcIlluminanceMeasure
IfcIlluminanceMeasure.shortDefinition: _IfcIlluminanceMeasure_ is a measure of the illuminance.

IfcInductanceMeasure.name: IfcInductanceMeasure
IfcInductanceMeasure.shortDefinition: _IfcInductanceMeasure_ is a measure of the inductance.

IfcInteger.name: IfcInteger
IfcInteger.shortDefinition: _IfcInteger_ is a defined type of simple data type Integer. It is required since a select type (_IfcSimpleValue_) cannot include directly simple types in its select list.

IfcIntegerCountRateMeasure.name: IfcIntegerCountRateMeasure
IfcIntegerCountRateMeasure.shortDefinition: _IfcIntegerCountRateMeasure_ is a measure of the integer number of units flowing per unit time.

IfcIonConcentrationMeasure.name: IfcIonConcentrationMeasure
IfcIonConcentrationMeasure.shortDefinition: _IfcIonConcentrationMeasure_ is a measure of particular ion concentration in a liquid, given in mol/m3.
history: HISTORY Changed from mg/L to mol/m3 in IFC 4.3 to be in line with international usage.

IfcIsothermalMoistureCapacityMeasure.name: IfcIsothermalMoistureCapacityMeasure
IfcIsothermalMoistureCapacityMeasure.shortDefinition: _IfcIsothermalMoistureCapacityMeasure_ is a measure of isothermal moisture capacity.

IfcKinematicViscosityMeasure.name: IfcKinematicViscosityMeasure
IfcKinematicViscosityMeasure.shortDefinition: _IfcKinematicViscosityMeasure_ is a measure of the viscous resistance of a medium to a moving body.

IfcLabel.name: IfcLabel
IfcLabel.shortDefinition: A label is the term by which something may be referred to. It is a string which represents the human-interpretable name of something and shall have a natural-language meaning.
history: IFC4 CHANGE Previously recommended size restriction of 255 characters is now mandatory.

IfcLengthMeasure.name: IfcLengthMeasure
IfcLengthMeasure.shortDefinition: An _IfcLengthMeasure_ is the value of a distance.

IfcLinearForceMeasure.name: IfcLinearForceMeasure
IfcLinearForceMeasure.shortDefinition: _IfcLinearForceMeasure_ is a measure of linear force.

IfcLinearMomentMeasure.name: IfcLinearMomentMeasure
IfcLinearMomentMeasure.shortDefinition: _IfcLinearMomentMeasure_ is a measure of linear moment.

IfcLinearStiffnessMeasure.name: IfcLinearStiffnessMeasure
IfcLinearStiffnessMeasure.shortDefinition: _IfcLinearStiffnessMeasure_ is a measure of linear stiffness.

IfcLinearVelocityMeasure.name: IfcLinearVelocityMeasure
IfcLinearVelocityMeasure.shortDefinition: _IfcLinearVelocityMeasure_ is a measure of the velocity of a body measured in terms of distance moved per unit time.

IfcLogical.name: IfcLogical
IfcLogical.shortDefinition: _IfcLogical_IfcSimpleValue_) cannot directly include simple types in its select list). Logical datatype can have values TRUE, FALSE or UNKNOWN._

IfcLuminousFluxMeasure.name: IfcLuminousFluxMeasure
IfcLuminousFluxMeasure.shortDefinition: _IfcLuminousFluxMeasure_ is a measure of the luminous flux.

IfcLuminousIntensityDistributionMeasure.name: IfcLuminousIntensityDistributionMeasure
IfcLuminousIntensityDistributionMeasure.shortDefinition: _IfcLuminousIntensityDistributionMeasure_ is a measure of the luminous intensity of a light source that changes according to the direction of the ray. It is normally based on some standardized distribution light distribution curves.

IfcLuminousIntensityMeasure.name: IfcLuminousIntensityMeasure
IfcLuminousIntensityMeasure.shortDefinition: An _IfcLuminousIntensityMeasure_ is the value for the brightness of a body.

IfcMagneticFluxDensityMeasure.name: IfcMagneticFluxDensityMeasure
IfcMagneticFluxDensityMeasure.shortDefinition: _IfcMagneticFluxDensityMeasure_ is a measure of the magnetic flux density.

IfcMagneticFluxMeasure.name: IfcMagneticFluxMeasure
IfcMagneticFluxMeasure.shortDefinition: _IfcMagneticFluxMeasure_ is a measure of the magnetic flux.

IfcMassDensityMeasure.name: IfcMassDensityMeasure
IfcMassDensityMeasure.shortDefinition: _IfcMassDensityMeasure_ is a measure of the density of a medium.

IfcMassFlowRateMeasure.name: IfcMassFlowRateMeasure
IfcMassFlowRateMeasure.shortDefinition: _IfcMassFlowRateMeasure_ is a measure of the mass of a medium flowing per unit time.

IfcMassMeasure.name: IfcMassMeasure
IfcMassMeasure.shortDefinition: An _IfcMassMeasure_ is the value of the amount of matter that a body contains.

IfcMassPerLengthMeasure.name: IfcMassPerLengthMeasure
IfcMassPerLengthMeasure.shortDefinition: _IfcMassPerLengthMeasure_ is a measure for mass per length. For example for rolled steel profiles the weight of an imaginary beam is usually expressed by kg/m length for cost calculation and structural analysis purposes.

IfcModulusOfElasticityMeasure.name: IfcModulusOfElasticityMeasure
IfcModulusOfElasticityMeasure.shortDefinition: _IfcModulusOfElasticityMeasure_ is a measure of modulus of elasticity.

IfcModulusOfLinearSubgradeReactionMeasur.name: IfcModulusOfLinearSubgradeReactionMeasure
IfcModulusOfLinearSubgradeReactionMeasur.shortDefinition: _IfcModulusOfLinearSubgradeReactionMeasure_ is a measure for modulus of linear subgrade reaction, which expresses the elastic bedding of a linear structural element per length, such as for a beam. It is typically measured in N/m\^2.

IfcModulusOfRotationalSubgradeReactionMe.name: IfcModulusOfRotationalSubgradeReactionMeasure
IfcModulusOfRotationalSubgradeReactionMe.shortDefinition: _IfcModulusOfRotationalSubgradeReactionMeasure_ is a measure for modulus of rotational subgrade reaction, which expresses the rotational elastic bedding of a linear structural element per length, such as for a beam. It is typically measured in Nm/(m\*rad).

IfcModulusOfSubgradeReactionMeasure.name: IfcModulusOfSubgradeReactionMeasure
IfcModulusOfSubgradeReactionMeasure.shortDefinition: _IfcModulusOfSubgradeReactionMeasure_ is a geotechnical measure describing interaction between foundation structures and the soil. May also be known as bedding measure.

IfcMoistureDiffusivityMeasure.name: IfcMoistureDiffusivityMeasure
IfcMoistureDiffusivityMeasure.shortDefinition: _IfcMoistureDiffusivityMeasure_ is a measure of moisture diffusivity.

IfcMolecularWeightMeasure.name: IfcMolecularWeightMeasure
IfcMolecularWeightMeasure.shortDefinition: _IfcMolecularWeightMeasure_ is a measure of molecular weight of material (typically gas).

IfcMomentOfInertiaMeasure.name: IfcMomentOfInertiaMeasure
IfcMomentOfInertiaMeasure.shortDefinition: _IfcMomentOfInertiaMeasure_ is a measure of moment of inertia.

IfcMonetaryMeasure.name: IfcMonetaryMeasure
IfcMonetaryMeasure.shortDefinition: A monetary measure is the value of an amount of money without regard to its currency.

IfcNonNegativeLengthMeasure.name: IfcNonNegativeLengthMeasure
IfcNonNegativeLengthMeasure.shortDefinition: A non-negative length measure is a length measure that is greater than or equal to zero.

IfcNormalisedRatioMeasure.name: IfcNormalisedRatioMeasure
IfcNormalisedRatioMeasure.shortDefinition: _IfcNormalisedRatioMeasure_ is a dimensionless measure to express ratio values ranging from 0.0 to 1.0.

IfcNumericMeasure.name: IfcNumericMeasure
IfcNumericMeasure.shortDefinition: An _IfcNumericMeasure_ is the numeric value of a physical quantity.

IfcPHMeasure.name: IfcPHMeasure
IfcPHMeasure.shortDefinition: _IfcPHMeasure_ is a measure of the molar hydrogen ion concentration in a liquid (usually defined as the measure of acidity) in a range from 0 to 14.

IfcParameterValue.name: IfcParameterValue
IfcParameterValue.shortDefinition: An _IfcParameterValue_ is the value which specifies the amount of a parameter in some parameter space.

IfcPlanarForceMeasure.name: IfcPlanarForceMeasure
IfcPlanarForceMeasure.shortDefinition: _IfcPlanarForceMeasure_ is a measure of force on an area.

IfcPlaneAngleMeasure.name: IfcPlaneAngleMeasure
IfcPlaneAngleMeasure.shortDefinition: An _IfcPlaneAngleMeasure_ is the value of an angle in a plane.

IfcPositiveInteger.name: IfcPositiveInteger
IfcPositiveInteger.shortDefinition: _IfcPositiveInteger_ is a defined type based on simple data type Integer with the additional restriction to positive integers (excluding zero).
history: HISTORY New type in IFC4 ADD1

IfcPositiveLengthMeasure.name: IfcPositiveLengthMeasure
IfcPositiveLengthMeasure.shortDefinition: An _IfcPositiveLengthMeasure_ is a length measure that is greater than zero.

IfcPositivePlaneAngleMeasure.name: IfcPositivePlaneAngleMeasure
IfcPositivePlaneAngleMeasure.shortDefinition: An _IfcPositivePlaneAngleMeasure_ is a plane angle measure that is greater than zero.

IfcPositiveRatioMeasure.name: IfcPositiveRatioMeasure
IfcPositiveRatioMeasure.shortDefinition: An _IfcPositiveRatioMeasure_ is a ratio measure that is greater than zero.

IfcPowerMeasure.name: IfcPowerMeasure
IfcPowerMeasure.shortDefinition: _IfcPowerMeasure_ is a measure of power required or used.

IfcPressureMeasure.name: IfcPressureMeasure
IfcPressureMeasure.shortDefinition: _IfcPressureMeasure_ is a measure of the quantity of a medium acting on a unit area.

IfcRadioActivityMeasure.name: IfcRadioActivityMeasure
IfcRadioActivityMeasure.shortDefinition: _IfcRadioActivityMeasure_ is a measure of activity of radionuclide.

IfcRatioMeasure.name: IfcRatioMeasure
IfcRatioMeasure.shortDefinition: An _IfcRatioMeasure_ is the value of the relation between two physical quantities that are of the same kind.

IfcReal.name: IfcReal
IfcReal.shortDefinition: _IfcReal_ is a defined type of simple data type REAL. It is required since a select type (_IfcSimpleValue_), cannot directly include simple types in its select list.

IfcRotationalFrequencyMeasure.name: IfcRotationalFrequencyMeasure
IfcRotationalFrequencyMeasure.shortDefinition: _IfcRotationalFrequencyMeasure_ is a measure of the number of cycles that an item revolves in unit time.

IfcRotationalMassMeasure.name: IfcRotationalMassMeasure
IfcRotationalMassMeasure.shortDefinition: The rotational mass measure denotes the inertia of a body with respect to angular acceleration.

IfcRotationalStiffnessMeasure.name: IfcRotationalStiffnessMeasure
IfcRotationalStiffnessMeasure.shortDefinition: _IfcRotationalStiffnessMeasure_ is a measure of rotational stiffness.

IfcSectionModulusMeasure.name: IfcSectionModulusMeasure
IfcSectionModulusMeasure.shortDefinition: _IfcSectionModulusMeasure_ is a measure for the resistance of a cross section against bending or torsional moment. It is usually measured in m\^3.

IfcSectionalAreaIntegralMeasure.name: IfcSectionalAreaIntegralMeasure
IfcSectionalAreaIntegralMeasure.shortDefinition: The sectional area integral measure is typically used in torsional analysis. It is usually measured in m\^5.

IfcShearModulusMeasure.name: IfcShearModulusMeasure
IfcShearModulusMeasure.shortDefinition: _IfcShearModulusMeasure_ is a measure of shear modulus.

IfcSimpleValue.name: IfcSimpleValue
IfcSimpleValue.shortDefinition: _IfcSimpleValue_ is a select type for selecting between simple value types.

IfcSolidAngleMeasure.name: IfcSolidAngleMeasure
IfcSolidAngleMeasure.shortDefinition: An _IfcSolidAngleMeasure_ is the value of an angle in a solid.

IfcSoundPowerLevelMeasure.name: IfcSoundPowerLevelMeasure
IfcSoundPowerLevelMeasure.shortDefinition: A sound power level measure is a measure of total radiated noise with units of decibels with a reference value of picowatts.

IfcSoundPowerMeasure.name: IfcSoundPowerMeasure
IfcSoundPowerMeasure.shortDefinition: A sound power measure is a measure of total radiated noise with units of watts (sonic energy per time unit).
history: HISTORY New type in IFC2x2, changed in IFC4. See also _IfcSoundPowerLevelMeasure_ for using the unit decibel.

IfcSoundPressureLevelMeasure.name: IfcSoundPressureLevelMeasure
IfcSoundPressureLevelMeasure.shortDefinition: A sound pressure level measure is a measure of the pressure fluctuations superimposed over the ambient pressure level with units of decibels with a reference value of micropascals.

IfcSoundPressureMeasure.name: IfcSoundPressureMeasure
IfcSoundPressureMeasure.shortDefinition: A sound pressure measure is a measure of the pressure fluctuations superimposed over the ambient pressure level with units of pascals.
history: HISTORY New type in IFC2x2, changed in IFC4. See also _IfcSoundPressureLevelMeasure_ for using the unit decibel, i.e. relative to a reference value.

IfcSpecificHeatCapacityMeasure.name: IfcSpecificHeatCapacityMeasure
IfcSpecificHeatCapacityMeasure.shortDefinition: _IfcSpecificHeatCapacityMeasure_ defines the specific heat of material: The heat energy absorbed per temperature unit.

IfcTemperatureGradientMeasure.name: IfcTemperatureGradientMeasure
IfcTemperatureGradientMeasure.shortDefinition: The temperature gradient measures the difference of a temperature per length, as for instance used in an external wall or its layers. It is usually measured in K/m.

IfcTemperatureRateOfChangeMeasure.name: IfcTemperatureRateOfChangeMeasure
IfcTemperatureRateOfChangeMeasure.shortDefinition: The temperature rate of change measures the difference of a temperature per time (positive: rise, negative: fall), as for instance used with heat sensors. It is for example measured in K/s (Kelvin per second).

IfcText.name: IfcText
IfcText.shortDefinition: An _IfcText_ is an alphanumeric string of characters which is intended to be read and understood by a human being. It is for information purposes only.

IfcThermalAdmittanceMeasure.name: IfcThermalAdmittanceMeasure
IfcThermalAdmittanceMeasure.shortDefinition: _IfcThermalAdmittanceMeasure_ is the measure of the ability of a surface to smooth out temperature variations.

IfcThermalConductivityMeasure.name: IfcThermalConductivityMeasure
IfcThermalConductivityMeasure.shortDefinition: _IfcThermalConductivityMeasure_ is a measure of thermal conductivity.

IfcThermalExpansionCoefficientMeasure.name: IfcThermalExpansionCoefficientMeasure
IfcThermalExpansionCoefficientMeasure.shortDefinition: _IfcThermalExpansionCoefficientMeasure_ is a measure of the thermal expansion coefficient of a material, which expresses its elongation (as a ratio) per temperature difference. It is usually measured in 1/K. A positive elongation per (positive) rise of temperature is expressed by a positive value.

IfcThermalResistanceMeasure.name: IfcThermalResistanceMeasure
IfcThermalResistanceMeasure.shortDefinition: _IfcThermalResistanceMeasure_ is a measure of the resistance offered by a body to the flow of energy.

IfcThermalTransmittanceMeasure.name: IfcThermalTransmittanceMeasure
IfcThermalTransmittanceMeasure.shortDefinition: _IfcThermalTransmittanceMeasure_ is a measure of the rate at which energy is transmitted through a body.

IfcThermodynamicTemperatureMeasure.name: IfcThermodynamicTemperatureMeasure
IfcThermodynamicTemperatureMeasure.shortDefinition: **Definition from ISO/CD 10303-41:1992**: A thermodynamic temperature measure is the value for the degree of heat of a body.

IfcTimeMeasure.name: IfcTimeMeasure
IfcTimeMeasure.shortDefinition: An _IfcTimeMeasure_ is the value of the duration of periods.

IfcTorqueMeasure.name: IfcTorqueMeasure
IfcTorqueMeasure.shortDefinition: _IfcTorqueMeasure_ is a measure of the torque or moment of a couple.

IfcUnitEnum.name: IfcUnitEnum
IfcUnitEnum.shortDefinition: _IfcUnitEnum_ is an enumeration type for allowed unit types of _IfcNamedUnit_.

IfcValue.name: IfcValue
IfcValue.shortDefinition: _IfcValue_ is a select type for selecting between more specialised select types _IfcSimpleValue_, _IfcMeasureValue_ and _IfcDerivedMeasureValue_.

IfcVaporPermeabilityMeasure.name: IfcVaporPermeabilityMeasure
IfcVaporPermeabilityMeasure.shortDefinition: _IfcVaporPermeabilityMeasure_ is a measure of vapor permeability.

IfcVolumeMeasure.name: IfcVolumeMeasure
IfcVolumeMeasure.shortDefinition: An _IfcVolumeMeasure_ is the value of the solid content of a body.

IfcVolumetricFlowRateMeasure.name: IfcVolumetricFlowRateMeasure
IfcVolumetricFlowRateMeasure.shortDefinition: _IfcVolumetricFlowRateMeasure_ is a measure of the volume of a medium flowing per unit time.

IfcWarpingConstantMeasure.name: IfcWarpingConstantMeasure
IfcWarpingConstantMeasure.shortDefinition: _IfcWarpingConstantMeasure_ is a measure for the warping constant or warping resistance of a cross section under torsional loading. It is usually measured in m\^6.

IfcWarpingMomentMeasure.name: IfcWarpingMomentMeasure
IfcWarpingMomentMeasure.shortDefinition: The warping moment measure is a measure for the warping moment, which occurs in warping torsional analysis. It is usually measured in kN\*m\^2.

IfcColour.name: IfcColour
IfcColour.shortDefinition: The _IfcColour_ is a select between different definitions of colour used for presentation styles.
history: HISTORY New select type in IFC2x2.

IfcColourOrFactor.name: IfcColourOrFactor
IfcColourOrFactor.shortDefinition: The _IfcColourOrFactor_ enables the selection of either a RGB colour value or a scalar factor value for the use as values of the reflectance components.
history: HISTORY New select type in IFC2x2.

IfcCurveFontOrScaledCurveFontSelect.name: IfcCurveFontOrScaledCurveFontSelect
IfcCurveFontOrScaledCurveFontSelect.shortDefinition: The _IfcCurveFontOrScaledCurveFontSelect_ provides a selection between a curve font and a scaled curve font.
history: HISTORY New select type in IFC2x2.

IfcCurveStyleFontSelect.name: IfcCurveStyleFontSelect
IfcCurveStyleFontSelect.shortDefinition: The _IfcCurveStyleFontSelect_ provides a selection between an explicitly defined and a predefined curve style font.
history: HISTORY New select type in IFC2x2.

IfcFillStyleSelect.name: IfcFillStyleSelect
IfcFillStyleSelect.shortDefinition: The _IfcFillStyleSelect_ provides a selection between a simple fill colour, a hatching, a tiling or an externally defined hatch style as presentation styles for a styled item.
history: HISTORY New select type in IFC2x2.

IfcFontStyle.name: IfcFontStyle
IfcFontStyle.shortDefinition: The _IfcFontStyle_ type defines whether the normal, the italic or the oblique faces within a font family shall be used. Values are: * normal * italic * oblique

IfcFontVariant.name: IfcFontVariant
IfcFontVariant.shortDefinition: The _IfcFontVariant_ type defines whether the normal or the small-caps faces within a font family shall be used. Values are: * normal * small-caps

IfcFontWeight.name: IfcFontWeight
IfcFontWeight.shortDefinition: The _IfcFontWeight_ type defines the weight of the font. Values are: * normal * bold * 100 | 200 | 300 | 400 | 500 | 600 | 700 | 800 | 900
history: HISTORY New type in IFC2x2 Add2.

IfcHatchLineDistanceSelect.name: IfcHatchLineDistanceSelect
IfcHatchLineDistanceSelect.shortDefinition: The _IfcHatchLineDistanceSelect_ is a selection between different ways to determine the distance and optionally the start point of hatch lines, either by an offset distance measure or by a vector.
history: HISTORY New select type in IFC2x3

IfcPresentableText.name: IfcPresentableText
IfcPresentableText.shortDefinition: _IfcPresentableText_ is a text string used to capture the content of a text literal for the purpose of presentation. The _IfcPresentableText_ can include multiple lines of text, for which the line feed character LF, 0x0A, should be used to separate lines.

IfcReflectanceMethodEnum.name: IfcReflectanceMethodEnum
IfcReflectanceMethodEnum.shortDefinition: The _IfcReflectanceMethodEnum_ defines the range of different reflectance methods available.
history: HISTORY New enumeration type in IFC2x2.

IfcSizeSelect.name: IfcSizeSelect
IfcSizeSelect.shortDefinition: The _IfcSizeSelect_ provides for the selection between different measure types used for provision of a length measure.
history: HISTORY New select type in IFC2x2.
IFC2x3 CHANGE The SELECT item _IfcMeasureWithUnit_ has been removed from the _IfcSizeSelect_, the _IfcRatioMeasure_ and _IfcDescriptiveMeasure_ have been added.

IfcSpecularExponent.name: IfcSpecularExponent
IfcSpecularExponent.shortDefinition: The _IfcSpecularExponent_ defines the datatype for exponent determining the sharpness of the 'reflection'. The reflection is made sharper with large values of the exponent, such as 10.0. Small values, such as 1.0, decrease the specular fall-off.

IfcSpecularHighlightSelect.name: IfcSpecularHighlightSelect
IfcSpecularHighlightSelect.shortDefinition: The _IfcSpecularHighlightSelect_ defines the selectable types of value for specular highlight sharpness.
history: HISTORY New select type in IFC2x2.

IfcSpecularRoughness.name: IfcSpecularRoughness
IfcSpecularRoughness.shortDefinition: The _IfcSpecularRoughness_ defines the datatype for the reflection resulting from the roughness of a surface through the height of surface impurities where the specular highlight is made sharper with small values for the roughness, such as 0.1. Applies to "glass", "metal", "mirror" and "plastic" reflection models. Larger values, close to 1.0 decrease the specular fall-off.

IfcSurfaceSide.name: IfcSurfaceSide
IfcSurfaceSide.shortDefinition: _IfcSurfaceSide_ is a denotion of whether negative, positive or both sides of a surface are being referenced.
history: HISTORY New enumeration type in IFC2.0

IfcSurfaceStyleElementSelect.name: IfcSurfaceStyleElementSelect
IfcSurfaceStyleElementSelect.shortDefinition: The _IfcSurfaceStyleElementSelect_ provides a selection between different surface styles, including _IfcSurfaceStyleRendering_ for rendering properties, _IfcSurfaceStyleLighting_, which holds the exact physically based lighting properties for lighting based calculation algorithms (as the opposite to the rendering based calculation), the _IfcSurfaceStyleRefraction_ (for more advanced refraction indices) and _IfcSurfaceStyleWithTextures_ to allow for image textures applied to surfaces. In addition an _IfcExternallyDefinedSurfaceStyle_ can be selected that points into an external rendering material library.
history: HISTORY New select type in IFC2x2.

IfcTextAlignment.name: IfcTextAlignment
IfcTextAlignment.shortDefinition: The _IfcTextAlignment_ describes how text is aligned within the element. Values are: * left * right * center * justify

IfcTextDecoration.name: IfcTextDecoration
IfcTextDecoration.shortDefinition: The _IfcTextDecoration_ describes decorations that are added to the text of an element. Values are: * none * underline * overline * line-through

IfcTextFontName.name: IfcTextFontName
IfcTextFontName.shortDefinition: The _IfcTextFontName_ is a list of font family names and/or generic family name.
history: HISTORY New type in IFC2x2 Add2.

IfcTextFontSelect.name: IfcTextFontSelect
IfcTextFontSelect.shortDefinition: _IfcTextFontSelect_ allows for either a predefined text font, a text font model or an externally defined text font to be used to describe the font of a text literal.
history: HISTORY New select type in IFC2x2.
IFC2x3 CHANGE The select type has been renamed from IfcFontSelect.

IfcTextTransformation.name: IfcTextTransformation
IfcTextTransformation.shortDefinition: The _IfcTextTransformation_ describes how the cases of characters are handled. Values are: * capitalize: uppercases the first character of each word * uppercase: uppercases all letters of the element * lowercase: lowercases all letters of the element * none

IfcBoxAlignment.name: IfcBoxAlignment
IfcBoxAlignment.shortDefinition: The box alignment specifies the alignment of the text box relative to its position. The following string values shall be used: * top-left * top-middle * top-right * middle-left * center * middle-right * bottom-left * bottom-middle * bottom-right
history: HISTORY New type in IFC2x2 Addendum2.
IFC2x3 CHANGE The _IfcBoxAlignment_ has been added.

IfcTextPath.name: IfcTextPath
IfcTextPath.shortDefinition: The text path determines the direction of the text characters in respect to each other.

IfcLayeredItem.name: IfcLayeredItem
IfcLayeredItem.shortDefinition: The _IfcLayeredItem_ is the collection of all those items, that are assigned to a single layer. These items are representation items or complete representations (_IfcRepresentationItem, IfcRepresentation_). If an _IfcRepresentation_ is referenced, all _IfcRepresentationItem_ within its set of _Items_ are assigned to the same layer.

IfcLightDistributionCurveEnum.name: IfcLightDistributionCurveEnum
IfcLightDistributionCurveEnum.shortDefinition: There are three kinds of light distribution curves, see Figure 1.

IfcLightDistributionDataSourceSelect.name: IfcLightDistributionDataSourceSelect
IfcLightDistributionDataSourceSelect.shortDefinition: A goniometric light gets its intensity distribution function (how much light goes in any one direction) from one of two sources: (i) an industry-standard file, (ii) from distribution data passed directly via the _IfcLightIntensityDistribution_.

IfcLightEmissionSourceEnum.name: IfcLightEmissionSourceEnum
IfcLightEmissionSourceEnum.shortDefinition: _IfcLightEmissionSourceEnum_ defines the range of different types of light emitter available.

IfcProfileTypeEnum.name: IfcProfileTypeEnum
IfcProfileTypeEnum.shortDefinition: The enumeration defines whether the definition of a profile shape shall be geometrically resolved into a curve or into a surface.

IfcReinforcingBarRoleEnum.name: IfcReinforcingBarRoleEnum
IfcReinforcingBarRoleEnum.shortDefinition: Enumeration defining standard types for the role, purpose or usage of the bar, i.e. the kind of loads and stresses they are intended to carry.

IfcReinforcingBarSurfaceEnum.name: IfcReinforcingBarSurfaceEnum
IfcReinforcingBarSurfaceEnum.shortDefinition: Enumeration indicating whether the bar has a plain or textured (ribbed) surface.

IfcSectionTypeEnum.name: IfcSectionTypeEnum
IfcSectionTypeEnum.shortDefinition: An enumeration indicating whether a specific piece of a cross section is uniform or tapered in longitudinal direction.

IfcCurveInterpolationEnum.name: IfcCurveInterpolationEnum
IfcCurveInterpolationEnum.shortDefinition: _IfcCurveInterpolationEnum_ specifies the possible methods for the interpolation of property values given as a curve.

IfcObjectReferenceSelect.name: IfcObjectReferenceSelect
IfcObjectReferenceSelect.shortDefinition: _IfcObjectReferenceSelect_ is a select type, that holds a list of resource level entities that can be used as property values for an _IfcPropertyReferenceValue_ being a property within an _IfcPropertySet_.
history: HISTORY New select type in IFC2.0.
IFC4 CHANGE _IfcTable_ added to the select.

IfcCoordinateReferenceSystemSelect.name: IfcCoordinateReferenceSystemSelect
IfcCoordinateReferenceSystemSelect.shortDefinition: _IfcCoordinateReferenceSystemSelect_ is a select between either the local engineering coordinate system, represented by the _IfcGeometricRepresentationContext_, or another coordinate reference system, represented by _IfcCoordinateReferenceSystem_, to be the source of a coordinate operation.
history: HISTORY New select type in IFC4.

IfcGeometricProjectionEnum.name: IfcGeometricProjectionEnum
IfcGeometricProjectionEnum.shortDefinition: _IfcGeometricProjectionEnum_ defines the various representation types that can be semantically distinguished. Often different levels of detail of the shape representation are controlled by the representation type.

IfcGlobalOrLocalEnum.name: IfcGlobalOrLocalEnum
IfcGlobalOrLocalEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration type defines if the local object coordinate system or the global world coordinate system for the project is used to describe the measure values of entities which have a reference to this type.

IfcProductRepresentationSelect.name: IfcProductRepresentationSelect
IfcProductRepresentationSelect.shortDefinition: The _IfcProductRepresentationSelect_ selects an _IfcProductDefinitionShape_ and an _IfcRepresentationMap_ to be targets of _IfcShapeAspect_ definitions, i.e. both product representations may be further defined using shape aspects..
history: HISTORY New select type in IFC4.

IfcWellKnownTextLiteral.name: IfcWellKnownTextLiteral
IfcWellKnownTextLiteral.shortDefinition: A Well Known Text (WKT) literal is a structured textual representation of the definition of a coordinate reference systems according to ISO 19125-1:2004 or ISO 19162:2019.

IfcModulusOfRotationalSubgradeReactionSe.name: IfcModulusOfRotationalSubgradeReactionSelect
IfcModulusOfRotationalSubgradeReactionSe.shortDefinition: A measure for modulus of rotational subgrade reaction which expresses the rotational bedding of a structural curve item per length. TRUE denotes infinite stiffness (rigidity). FALSE denotes no stiffness (a release). A numeric value denotes finite linear-elastic stiffness.

IfcModulusOfSubgradeReactionSelect.name: IfcModulusOfSubgradeReactionSelect
IfcModulusOfSubgradeReactionSelect.shortDefinition: Bedding measure which expresses the bedding of a structural face item per area. TRUE denotes infinite stiffness (rigidity). FALSE denotes no stiffness (a release). A numeric value denotes finite linear-elastic stiffness.

IfcModulusOfTranslationalSubgradeReactio.name: IfcModulusOfTranslationalSubgradeReactionSelect
IfcModulusOfTranslationalSubgradeReactio.shortDefinition: A measure for modulus of translational subgrade reaction which expresses the translational bedding of a structural curve item per length. TRUE denotes infinite stiffness (rigidity). FALSE denotes no stiffness (a release). A numeric value denotes finite linear-elastic stiffness.

IfcRotationalStiffnessSelect.name: IfcRotationalStiffnessSelect
IfcRotationalStiffnessSelect.shortDefinition: A measure of rotational stiffness. TRUE denotes infinite stiffness (rigidity). FALSE denotes no stiffness (a release). A numeric value denotes finite linear-elastic stiffness.

IfcTranslationalStiffnessSelect.name: IfcTranslationalStiffnessSelect
IfcTranslationalStiffnessSelect.shortDefinition: A measure of linear stiffness. TRUE denotes infinite stiffness (rigidity). FALSE denotes no stiffness (a release). A numeric value denotes finite linear-elastic stiffness.

IfcWarpingStiffnessSelect.name: IfcWarpingStiffnessSelect
IfcWarpingStiffnessSelect.shortDefinition: A measure of warping stiffness. TRUE denotes infinite stiffness (rigidity). FALSE denotes no stiffness (a release). A numeric value denotes finite linear-elastic stiffness.

IfcShell.name: IfcShell
IfcShell.shortDefinition: A type comprising different kinds of shell.

IfcChangeActionEnum.name: IfcChangeActionEnum
IfcChangeActionEnum.shortDefinition: _IfcChangeActionEnum_ identifies the type of change that might have occurred to the object during the last session (for example, added, modified, deleted). This information is required in a partial model exchange scenario so that an application or model server will know how an object might have been affected by the previous application. Valid enumerations are:
history: IFC4 CHANGE Enumerators MODIFIEDADDED and MODIFIEDDELETED have been removed

IfcGloballyUniqueId.name: IfcGloballyUniqueId
IfcGloballyUniqueId.shortDefinition: An _IfcGloballyUniqueId_ holds an encoded string identifier that is used to uniquely identify an IFC object. An _IfcGloballyUniqueId_ is a Globally Unique Identifier (GUID) which is an auto-generated 128-bit number. Since this identifier is required for all IFC object instances, it is desirable to compress it to reduce overhead. The encoding of the base 64 character set is shown below:

IfcStateEnum.name: IfcStateEnum
IfcStateEnum.shortDefinition: The _IfcStateEnum_ enumeration identifies the state or accessibility of the object (for example, read/write, locked).
history: IFC2x3 CHANGE This concept was initially introduced in IFC2.0 as _IfcModifiedFlag_ of type BINARY(3) FIXED and has been modified in R2x3 to an enumeration. It was initially introduced as a first step towards providing facilities for partial model exchange and is intended for use primarily by a model server so that an application can identify the state of the object.

IfcBeamTypeEnum.name: IfcBeamTypeEnum
IfcBeamTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration defines the different predefined types of beams that can further specify an _IfcBeam_ or _IfcBeamType_.
history: HISTORY New enumeration type in IFC2x2.
IFC4 CHANGE The enumerators HOLLOWCORE and SPANDREL have been added.

IfcBuildingElementProxyTypeEnum.name: IfcBuildingElementProxyTypeEnum
IfcBuildingElementProxyTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration defines the available generic types for _IfcBuildingElementProxy_ or _IfcBuildingElementProxyType_.
history: IFC4.3.0.0 CHANGE Enumerators PROVISIONFORVOID and PROVISIONFORSPACE deprecated. Use an _IfcVirtualElement_ with PROVISIONFORVOID and CLEARANCE at _IfcVirtualElementTypeEnum_ instead.
IFC4 CHANGE Enumerators PROVISIONFORVOID and PROVISIONFORSPACE added.
IFC4.3.0.0 DEPRECATION Use IfcVirtualElement with PROVISIONFORVOID instead.
IFC4.3.0.0 DEPRECATION Use IfcVirtualElement with CLEARANCE instead.

IfcBuildingSystemTypeEnum.name: IfcBuildingSystemTypeEnum
IfcBuildingSystemTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration identifies different types of building systems.

IfcChimneyTypeEnum.name: IfcChimneyTypeEnum
IfcChimneyTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration defines the valid types of chimneys that can be predefined using the enumeration values.

IfcColumnTypeEnum.name: IfcColumnTypeEnum
IfcColumnTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration defines the different predefined types of columns that can further specify an _IfcColumn_ or _IfcColumnType_.

IfcConnectionTypeEnum.name: IfcConnectionTypeEnum
IfcConnectionTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration defines the different ways how path based elements (such as layered _IfcWall_ elements) can connect, as shown in Figure 1.

IfcCoveringTypeEnum.name: IfcCoveringTypeEnum
IfcCoveringTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration defines the range of different types of covering that can further specify an _IfcCovering_ or an _IfcCoveringType_.
history: IFC4 CHANGE The following enumerators have been added _MOLDING_, and _SKIRTINGBOARD_.

IfcCurtainWallTypeEnum.name: IfcCurtainWallTypeEnum
IfcCurtainWallTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration defines the valid types of curtain wall that can be predefined using the enumeration values.

IfcDoorTypeEnum.name: IfcDoorTypeEnum
IfcDoorTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration defines the different predefined types of an _IfcDoor_ or _IfcDoorType_ object.

IfcDoorTypeOperationEnum.name: IfcDoorTypeOperationEnum
IfcDoorTypeOperationEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration defines the basic ways to describe how an _IfcDoor_ or _IfcDoorType_ operate, as shown in the figures below. It combines the partitioning of the access barrier into single or multiple panels and the operation types of those panels.
history: IFC4 CHANGE The new _IfcDoorTypeOperationEnum_ replaces the use of _IfcDoorStyleOperationEnum_ that is deprecated from IFC4 onwards.

IfcMemberTypeEnum.name: IfcMemberTypeEnum
IfcMemberTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration defines the different types of linear elements an _IfcMember_ or _IfcMemberType_ object can fulfill.
history: HISTORY New enumeration type in IFC2x2.
IFC2x2 CHANGE The additional identifiers CHORD, PLATE, STUD are added.
IFC2x3 CHANGE The additional identifier MULLION are added.

IfcPlateTypeEnum.name: IfcPlateTypeEnum
IfcPlateTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration defines the different types of planar elements an _IfcPlate_ or _IfcPlateType_ object can fulfill.
history: IFC2x3 CHANGE The additional identifiers CURTAIN_PANEL, SHEET have been added.

IfcRailingTypeEnum.name: IfcRailingTypeEnum
IfcRailingTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration defines the different types of _IfcRailing_ or _IfcRailingType_ that can be predefined using the enumeration values.
history: HISTORY New enumeration type in IFC2.0

IfcRampFlightTypeEnum.name: IfcRampFlightTypeEnum
IfcRampFlightTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration defines the different types an _IfcRampFlight_ or _IfcRampFlightType_ object can fulfill.

IfcRampTypeEnum.name: IfcRampTypeEnum
IfcRampTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration defines the basic configuration of the ramp type in terms of the number and shape of ramp flights. The type also distinguished turns by landings. In addition the subdivision of the straight and changing direction ramps is included. The ramp configurations are given for ramps without and with one and two landings.

IfcRoofTypeEnum.name: IfcRoofTypeEnum
IfcRoofTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration defines the basic configuration of the roof in terms of the different roof shapes.

IfcShadingDeviceTypeEnum.name: IfcShadingDeviceTypeEnum
IfcShadingDeviceTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration defines the valid types of _IfcShadingDevice_ or _IfcShadingDeviceType_ that can be predefined using the enumeration values.

IfcSlabTypeEnum.name: IfcSlabTypeEnum
IfcSlabTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration defines the available predefined types of slabs that can further specify an _IfcSlab_ or _IfcSlabType_.

IfcStairFlightTypeEnum.name: IfcStairFlightTypeEnum
IfcStairFlightTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration defines the different types of stair flights that can further specify an _IfcStairFlight_ or _IfcStairFlightType_.

IfcStairTypeEnum.name: IfcStairTypeEnum
IfcStairTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration defines the basic configuration of the stair type in terms of the number of stair flights and the number of landings. The type also distinguished turns by windings or by landings. In addition the subdivision of the straight and changing direction stairs is included. The stair configurations are given for stairs without and with one, two or three landings.

IfcWallTypeEnum.name: IfcWallTypeEnum
IfcWallTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration defines the different types of walls that can further specify an _IfcWall_ or _IfcWallType_.
history: IFC2x2 CHANGE The enumerator _POLYGON_ has been changed to _POLYGONAL_.
IFC2x3 CHANGE The enumerators _ELEMENTEDWALL_ and _PLUMBINGWALL_ have been added.
IFC4 CHANGE New enumerators MOVABLE, PARAPET, PARTITIONING, and SOLIDWALL have been added.
IFC4 DEPRECATION The value is deprecated, it is expressed by using an _IfcMaterialLayerSet_ with _IfcMaterialLayerSetUsage_ in occurrences.
IFC4 DEPRECATION The value is deprecated and shall no longer be used.
IFC4.3.2.0 CHANGE This enumeration value is no longer deprecated.

IfcWindowTypeEnum.name: IfcWindowTypeEnum
IfcWindowTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration defines the different predefined types of windows that can further specify an _IfcWindow_ or _IfcWindowType_.

IfcWindowTypePartitioningEnum.name: IfcWindowTypePartitioningEnum
IfcWindowTypePartitioningEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration defines the basic configuration of the window type in terms of the number of window panels and the subdivision of the total window. The window configurations are given for windows with one, two or three panels (including fixed panels).
history: HISTORY New Enumeration in IFC4. The new _IfcWindowTypePartitioningEnum_ replaces the use of _IfcWindowStyleOperationEnum_ that is deprecated from IFC4 onwards.

IfcDistributionChamberElementTypeEnum.name: IfcDistributionChamberElementTypeEnum
IfcDistributionChamberElementTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration identifies different types of distribution chambers.

IfcDistributionPortTypeEnum.name: IfcDistributionPortTypeEnum
IfcDistributionPortTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration identifies different types of distribution ports. It is used to designate ports by their general function, which determines applicable property sets and compatible systems.

IfcDistributionSystemEnum.name: IfcDistributionSystemEnum
IfcDistributionSystemEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration identifies different types of distribution systems. It is used to designate systems by their function as well as ports of devices within such systems to restrict connectivity to compatible connections.

IfcFlowDirectionEnum.name: IfcFlowDirectionEnum
IfcFlowDirectionEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration defines the flow direction at a distribution port.

IfcBuildingElementPartTypeEnum.name: IfcBuildingElementPartTypeEnum
IfcBuildingElementPartTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration defines the different types of building element parts.

IfcDiscreteAccessoryTypeEnum.name: IfcDiscreteAccessoryTypeEnum
IfcDiscreteAccessoryTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration defines the different types of discrete accessories.

IfcFastenerTypeEnum.name: IfcFastenerTypeEnum
IfcFastenerTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration defines the different types of fasteners, except for mechanical fasteners.

IfcMechanicalFastenerTypeEnum.name: IfcMechanicalFastenerTypeEnum
IfcMechanicalFastenerTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration defines the different types of mechanical fasteners.

IfcFurnitureTypeEnum.name: IfcFurnitureTypeEnum
IfcFurnitureTypeEnum.shortDefinition: _IfcFurnitureTypeEnum_ defines the types of furniture from which the type required can be selected.

IfcInventoryTypeEnum.name: IfcInventoryTypeEnum
IfcInventoryTypeEnum.shortDefinition: _IfcInventoryTypeEnum_ defines the types of inventory that can be defined.

IfcOccupantTypeEnum.name: IfcOccupantTypeEnum
IfcOccupantTypeEnum.shortDefinition: _IfcOccupantTypeEnum_ defines the types of occupant from which the type required can be selected.

IfcSystemFurnitureElementTypeEnum.name: IfcSystemFurnitureElementTypeEnum
IfcSystemFurnitureElementTypeEnum.shortDefinition: _IfcSystemFurnitureElementTypeEnum_ defines the types of system furniture from which the type required can be selected.

IfcCourseTypeEnum.name: IfcCourseTypeEnum
IfcCourseTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This container defines the different predefined types of course elements that can further specify an _IfcCourse_ or _IfcCourseType_.

IfcEarthworksCutTypeEnum.name: IfcEarthworksCutTypeEnum
IfcEarthworksCutTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This container defines the different predefined types of earthworks cut elements that can specify an _IfcEarthworksCut_.

IfcEarthworksFillTypeEnum.name: IfcEarthworksFillTypeEnum
IfcEarthworksFillTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This container defines the different predefined types of earthworks fill elements that can specify an _IfcEarthworksFill_.

IfcGeotechnicalStratumTypeEnum.name: IfcGeotechnicalStratumTypeEnum
IfcGeotechnicalStratumTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This container defines the different predefined types of stratum elements that can further specify an IfcGeotechnicalStratum.

IfcImpactProtectionDeviceTypeEnum.name: IfcImpactProtectionDeviceTypeEnum
IfcImpactProtectionDeviceTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This container defines the different predefined types of kinetic impact protectors that can specify an _IfcImpactProtectionDevice_ or _IfcImpactProtectionDeviceType_.

IfcPavementTypeEnum.name: IfcPavementTypeEnum
IfcPavementTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This container defines the different predefined types of course elements that can further specify an _IfcPavement_ or _IfcPavementType_.

IfcReinforcedSoilTypeEnum.name: IfcReinforcedSoilTypeEnum
IfcReinforcedSoilTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This container defines the different predefined types of soil reinforcement that can specify an _IfcReinforcedSoil_.

IfcSignTypeEnum.name: IfcSignTypeEnum
IfcSignTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This container defines the different predefined types of signs that can specify an _IfcSign_ or _IfcSignType_.

IfcSignalTypeEnum.name: IfcSignalTypeEnum
IfcSignalTypeEnum.shortDefinition: This container defines the different predefined types of signals that can specify an _IfcSignal_ or _IfcSignalType_.

IfcActionRequestTypeEnum.name: IfcActionRequestTypeEnum
IfcActionRequestTypeEnum.shortDefinition: _IfcActionRequestTypeEnum_ defines the types of sources through which a request can be made.

IfcCostItemTypeEnum.name: IfcCostItemTypeEnum
IfcCostItemTypeEnum.shortDefinition: An _IfcCostItemTypeEnum_ is a list of the available types of cost items.

IfcCostScheduleTypeEnum.name: IfcCostScheduleTypeEnum
IfcCostScheduleTypeEnum.shortDefinition: An _IfcCostScheduleTypeEnum_ is a list of the available types of cost schedule from which that required may be selected.

IfcPermitTypeEnum.name: IfcPermitTypeEnum
IfcPermitTypeEnum.shortDefinition: _IfcPermitTypeEnum_ defines the types of permits that can be granted.

IfcProjectOrderTypeEnum.name: IfcProjectOrderTypeEnum
IfcProjectOrderTypeEnum.shortDefinition: An _IfcProjectOrderTypeEnum_ is a list of the types of project order that may be identified.

IfcUniqueDefinitionNames.name: IfcUniqueDefinitionNames
IfcUniqueDefinitionNames.shortDefinition: The function gets the set of _IfcRelDefinesByProperties_. It iterates through the _Name_ attribute of the _IfcPropertySet_'s and verifies that no _Name_ appears twice.
history: HISTORY New function in IFC4 ADD1

IfcUniquePropertyName.name: IfcUniquePropertyName
IfcUniquePropertyName.shortDefinition: The function gets the set of names, used by elements in a set (e.g. by individual properties in the set of a property set. It verifies that no name appears twice.

IfcUniquePropertySetNames.name: IfcUniquePropertySetNames
IfcUniquePropertySetNames.shortDefinition: The function gets the set of _IfcPropertySetDefinition_'s. It iterates through the _Name_ attribute of the _IfcPropertySet_'s
history: HISTORY New function in IFC4 ADD1

IfcUniquePropertyTemplateNames.name: IfcUniquePropertyTemplateNames
IfcUniquePropertyTemplateNames.shortDefinition: The function gets the set of _IfcPropertyTemplate_'s. It iterates through the _Name_ attribute of the _IfcPropertyTemplate_'s

IfcCorrectLocalPlacement.name: IfcCorrectLocalPlacement
IfcCorrectLocalPlacement.shortDefinition: The function checks that a relative placement (i.e. relative to another local placement, and not grid placement) of a 3D local placement has to be relative to a 3D parent placement (and not to a 2D parent placement).

IfcPointListDim.name: IfcPointListDim
IfcPointListDim.shortDefinition: This function determines the dimensionality of a cartesian point list.

IfcTaperedSweptAreaProfiles.name: IfcTaperedSweptAreaProfiles
IfcTaperedSweptAreaProfiles.shortDefinition: This function checks whether the start and end profile in a tapered extrusion are topologically similar, i.e. whether both have the same number of vertices and edges.

IfcAssociatedSurface.name: IfcAssociatedSurface
history: HISTORY New function in IFC4 Addendum 2

IfcConsecutiveSegments.name: IfcConsecutiveSegments
IfcConsecutiveSegments.shortDefinition: This function validates if a list of segment indices are connected to represent a consecutive curve. The last index of any, but the last, segment shall be identical with the first index of the next segment.
history: HISTORY New function in IFC4 ADD1

IfcCurveWeightsPositive.name: IfcCurveWeightsPositive
IfcCurveWeightsPositive.shortDefinition: This function checks whether the curve weights of a b-spline are positive.

IfcPointDim.name: IfcPointDim
IfcPointDim.shortDefinition: This function checks the dimensionality of the various subtypes of IfcPoint.

IfcSameAxis2Placement.name: IfcSameAxis2Placement
IfcSameAxis2Placement.shortDefinition: The function compares two IfcAxis2Placement and ensures that they are the same (taking an arbitrary epsilon precision factor into account).

IfcSameCartesianPoint.name: IfcSameCartesianPoint
IfcSameCartesianPoint.shortDefinition: The function compares two IfcCartesianPoint and ensures that they are the same (taking an arbitrary epsilon precision factor into account).

IfcSameDirection.name: IfcSameDirection
IfcSameDirection.shortDefinition: The function compares two _IfcDirection_'s and ensures that they are the same (taking an arbitrary epsilon precision factor into account).

IfcSameValue.name: IfcSameValue
IfcSameValue.shortDefinition: The function compares two numerical values and ensures that they are the same (with an epsilon precision factor).

IfcSegmentDim.name: IfcSegmentDim
IfcSegmentDim.shortDefinition: This function checks the dimensionality of the various subtypes of IfcSegment.

IfcCorrectDimensions.name: IfcCorrectDimensions
IfcCorrectDimensions.shortDefinition: The function returns the dimensional exponents of the given unit.

IfcCorrectUnitAssignment.name: IfcCorrectUnitAssignment
IfcCorrectUnitAssignment.shortDefinition: The function returns true, if the set of _Units_ within an _IfcUnitAssignment_ only include units with different _UnitType_'s (for _IfcNamedUnit_ and _IfcDerivedUnit_), and a maximum of one _IfcMonetaryUnit_.

IfcDeriveDimensionalExponents.name: IfcDeriveDimensionalExponents
IfcDeriveDimensionalExponents.shortDefinition: **Definition from ISO/CD 10303-41:1992**: The function determines the dimensional exponents of a unit. For named units the dimensions attribute is returned and for derived units the dimensional exponents are calculated from its elements.

IfcDimensionsForSIUnit.name: IfcDimensionsForSIUnit
IfcDimensionsForSIUnit.shortDefinition: **Definition from ISO/CD 10303-41:1992**: The function returns the dimensional exponents of the given SI-unit.

IfcCorrectFillAreaStyle.name: IfcCorrectFillAreaStyle
IfcCorrectFillAreaStyle.shortDefinition: This function returns true if the different fill area styles are assigned correctly to the _IfcFillAreaStyle_. Only certain combinations of the entity types provided by the _IfcFillStyleSelect_ are allowed.

IfcUniqueQuantityNames.name: IfcUniqueQuantityNames
IfcUniqueQuantityNames.shortDefinition: The function gets the set of _IfcPhysicalQuantity_'s.

IfcConvertDirectionInto2D.name: IfcConvertDirectionInto2D
IfcConvertDirectionInto2D.shortDefinition: The function returns a two-dimensional direction, using the x/y ratios of a two or three-dimensional direction as input.

IfcSameValidPrecision.name: IfcSameValidPrecision
IfcSameValidPrecision.shortDefinition: The function compares the epsilon values (given as _Precision_ at _IfcGeometricRepresentationContext_ and ensures that they are the same (with a derivation tolerance) and within reasonable min and max values.

IfcShapeRepresentationTypes.name: IfcShapeRepresentationTypes
IfcShapeRepresentationTypes.shortDefinition: The function gets the representation type and the assigned set of representation items as input and verifies whether the correct items are assigned according to the representation type given.
history: IFC2x3 CHANGE The check for _MappedRepresentation_ has been changed to allow multiple mapped items, and the _Annotation2D_ has been added.
IFC2x4 CHANGE The check for _Curve3D_, _Surface2D_, _Surface3D_, _Tessellation_, _AdvancedBrep_, and _AdvancedSweptSolid_ has been added and _CSG_ enhanced.
IFC4.3.0.0 CHANGE The check for _Segment_, and _SectionedSurface_ has been added
IFC4.3.2.0 CHANGE The check for _Point_ has been broadened to also include subtypes of IfcCartesianPointList. The identifier _PointCloud_ has been kept for backwards compatibility.

IfcTopologyRepresentationTypes.name: IfcTopologyRepresentationTypes
IfcTopologyRepresentationTypes.shortDefinition: The function gets the topology representation type and the assigned set of representation items as input and verifies whether the correct items are assigned according to the representation type given.

IfcBooleanChoose.name: IfcBooleanChoose
IfcBooleanChoose.shortDefinition: Returns the first choice, if TRUE, otherwise the second choice.

IfcLoopHeadToTail.name: IfcLoopHeadToTail
IfcLoopHeadToTail.shortDefinition: This function returns TRUE if for the edges of the input edge loop the end vertex of each edge is the same as the start vertex of its successor.

IfcPathHeadToTail.name: IfcPathHeadToTail
IfcPathHeadToTail.shortDefinition: This function returns TRUE if all edges of the input path are consecutive.

Pset_ActorCommon.name: Pset_ActorCommon
Pset_ActorCommon.shortDefinition: A property set that enables further classification of actors, including the ability to give a number of actors to be designated as a population, the number being specified as a property to be dealt with as a single value rather than having to aggregate a number of instances of IfcActor.

Pset_ProjectCommon.name: Pset_ProjectCommon
Pset_ProjectCommon.shortDefinition: Property set for the application of high level project information.

Pset_WorkControlCommon.name: Pset_WorkControlCommon
Pset_WorkControlCommon.shortDefinition: Properties common to the definition of all occurrences of IfcWorkPlan and IfcWorkSchedule (subtypes of IfcWorkControl).

Pset_AlignmentCantSegmentCommon.name: Pset_AlignmentCantSegmentCommon
Pset_AlignmentCantSegmentCommon.shortDefinition: Properties common to the definition of all instances of alignment segment that have designParameters for cant.

Pset_AlignmentVerticalSegmentCommon.name: Pset_AlignmentVerticalSegmentCommon
Pset_AlignmentVerticalSegmentCommon.shortDefinition: Properties common to the definition of all instances of alignment vertical segment.

Pset_AnnotationContourLine.name: Pset_AnnotationContourLine
Pset_AnnotationContourLine.shortDefinition: Specifies properties of a standard curve that has a single, consistent measure value.

Pset_AnnotationLineOfSight.name: Pset_AnnotationLineOfSight
Pset_AnnotationLineOfSight.shortDefinition: Specifies the properties of the line of sight. For example, it can be used to define the line of sight visibility at the junction between two roads (particularly between an access road and a public road); or in the design of a stadium or theatre.

Pset_AnnotationSurveyArea.name: Pset_AnnotationSurveyArea
Pset_AnnotationSurveyArea.shortDefinition: Specifies particular properties of survey methods to be assigned to survey point set or resulting surface patches

Pset_BuildingCommon.name: Pset_BuildingCommon
Pset_BuildingCommon.shortDefinition: Properties common to the definition of all instances of IfcBuilding. Please note that several building attributes are handled directly at the IfcBuilding instance, the building number (or short name) by IfcBuilding.Name, the building name (or long name) by IfcBuilding.LongName, and the description (or comments) by IfcBuilding.Description. Actual building quantities, like building perimeter, building area and building volume are provided by IfcElementQuantity, and the building classification according to national building code by IfcClassificationReference.

Pset_BuildingStoreyCommon.name: Pset_BuildingStoreyCommon
Pset_BuildingStoreyCommon.shortDefinition: Properties common to the definition of all instances of IfcBuildingStorey. Please note that several building attributes are handled directly at the IfcBuildingStorey instance, the building storey number (or short name) by IfcBuildingStorey.Name, the building storey name (or long name) by IfcBuildingStorey.LongName, and the description (or comments) by IfcBuildingStorey.Description. Actual building storey quantities, like building storey perimeter, building storey area and building storey volume are provided by IfcElementQuantity, and the building storey classification according to national building code by IfcClassificationReference.

Pset_BuildingUse.name: Pset_BuildingUse
Pset_BuildingUse.shortDefinition: Provides information on on the real estate context of the building of interest both current and anticipated.

Pset_BuildingUseAdjacent.name: Pset_BuildingUseAdjacent
Pset_BuildingUseAdjacent.shortDefinition: Provides information on adjacent buildings and their uses to enable their impact on the building of interest to be determined. Note that for each instance of the property set used, where there is an existence of risk, there will be an instance of the property set Pset_Risk (q.v).

Pset_CivilElementCommon.name: Pset_CivilElementCommon
Pset_CivilElementCommon.shortDefinition: Properties common to the definition of all occurrence and type objects of civil element.

Pset_ElementAssemblyCommon.name: Pset_ElementAssemblyCommon
Pset_ElementAssemblyCommon.shortDefinition: Properties common to the definition of all occurrence and type objects of element assembly.

Pset_EnvironmentalEmissions.name: Pset_EnvironmentalEmissions
Pset_EnvironmentalEmissions.shortDefinition: Property set for the application of energy emissions produced by facility and physical elements.

Pset_EnvironmentalImpactIndicators.name: Pset_EnvironmentalImpactIndicators
Pset_EnvironmentalImpactIndicators.shortDefinition: Environmental impact indicators are related to a given “functional unit” (ISO 14040 concept). An example of functional unit is a "Double glazing window with PVC frame" and the unit to consider is "one square meter of opening elements filled by this product”.

Pset_EnvironmentalImpactValues.name: Pset_EnvironmentalImpactValues
Pset_EnvironmentalImpactValues.shortDefinition: The following properties capture environmental impact values of an element. They correspond to the indicators defined into Pset_EnvironmentalImpactIndicators.

Pset_LandRegistration.name: Pset_LandRegistration
Pset_LandRegistration.shortDefinition: Specifies the identity of land within a statutory registration system.

Pset_OpeningElementCommon.name: Pset_OpeningElementCommon
Pset_OpeningElementCommon.shortDefinition: Properties common to the definition of all instances of IfcOpeningElement.

Pset_ProcessCapacity.name: Pset_ProcessCapacity
Pset_ProcessCapacity.shortDefinition: Property set for the application of process data to spatial elements and transport assets

Pset_SiteCommon.name: Pset_SiteCommon
Pset_SiteCommon.shortDefinition: Properties common to the definition of all occurrences of IfcSite. Please note that several site attributes are handled directly at the IfcSite instance, the site number (or short name) by IfcSite.Name, the site name (or long name) by IfcSite.LongName, and the description (or comments) by IfcSite.Description. The land title number is also given as an explicit attribute IfcSite.LandTitleNumber. Actual site quantities, like site perimeter, site area and site volume are provided by IfcElementQuantity, and site classification according to national building code by IfcClassificationReference. The global positioning of the site in terms of Northing and Easting and height above sea level datum is given by IfcSite.RefLongitude, IfcSite.RefLatitude, IfcSite.RefElevation and the postal address by IfcSite.SiteAddress.

Pset_SpaceCommon.name: Pset_SpaceCommon
Pset_SpaceCommon.shortDefinition: Properties common to the definition of all occurrences of _IfcSpace_. Please note that several space attributes are handled directly at the _IfcSpace_ instance, the space number (or short name) by _IfcSpace.Name_, the space name (or long name) by _IfcSpace.LongName_, and the description (or comments) by _IfcSpace.Description_. Actual space quantities, like space perimeter, space area and space volume are provided by _IfcElementQuantity_, and space classification according to national building code by _IfcClassificationReference_. The level above zero (relative to the building) for the slab row construction is provided by the _IfcBuildingStorey.Elevation_, the level above zero (relative to the building) for the floor finish is provided by the _IfcSpace_._ElevationWithFlooring_.

Pset_SpaceCoveringRequirements.name: Pset_SpaceCoveringRequirements
Pset_SpaceCoveringRequirements.shortDefinition: Properties common to the definition of covering requirements of IfcSpace. Those properties define the requirements coming from a space program in early project phases and can later be used to define the room book information, if such coverings are not modeled explicitly as covering elements.

Pset_SpaceFireSafetyRequirements.name: Pset_SpaceFireSafetyRequirements
Pset_SpaceFireSafetyRequirements.shortDefinition: Properties related to fire protection of spaces that apply to the occurrences of IfcSpace or IfcZone.

Pset_SpaceHVACDesign.name: Pset_SpaceHVACDesign
Pset_SpaceHVACDesign.shortDefinition: Properties for HVAC requirements for spaces.

Pset_SpaceLightingDesign.name: Pset_SpaceLightingDesign
Pset_SpaceLightingDesign.shortDefinition: Properties for requirements on Lighting of spaces.

Pset_SpaceOccupancyRequirements.name: Pset_SpaceOccupancyRequirements
Pset_SpaceOccupancyRequirements.shortDefinition: Properties concerning work activities occurring or expected to occur within one or a set of similar spatial structure elements.

Pset_SpaceParking.name: Pset_SpaceParking
Pset_SpaceParking.shortDefinition: Properties common to the definition of all occurrences of _IfcSpace_ which have an attribute value for ObjectType = 'Parking'.

Pset_Tolerance.name: Pset_Tolerance
Pset_Tolerance.shortDefinition: Properties expressing the tolerance relating to locating and shaping of an intended element or feature. Range diameters are non-negative describing a linear, rectangular or boxed region .

Pset_TransportElementCommon.name: Pset_TransportElementCommon
Pset_TransportElementCommon.shortDefinition: Properties common to the definition of all occurrences of IfcTransportElement or IfcTransportElementType

Pset_TransportElementElevator.name: Pset_TransportElementElevator
Pset_TransportElementElevator.shortDefinition: Properties common to the definition of all occurrences of IfcTransportElement with the predefined type ="ELEVATOR"

Pset_Uncertainty.name: Pset_Uncertainty
Pset_Uncertainty.shortDefinition: Property set capturing the geometric uncertainty regarding measurements including how the way that uncertainty was assessed.

Pset_VegetationCommon.name: Pset_VegetationCommon
Pset_VegetationCommon.shortDefinition: Properties for vegetation and plants, modelled as instances of IfcGeographicElement with the predefined type set to VEGETATION.

Pset_ZoneCommon.name: Pset_ZoneCommon
Pset_ZoneCommon.shortDefinition: Properties common to the definition of all occurrences of IfcZone.

Pset_DoorLiningProperties.name: Pset_DoorLiningProperties
history: HISTORY New property set in IFC4.3.2.0 to replace the entity IfcDoorLiningProperties

Pset_DoorPanelProperties.name: Pset_DoorPanelProperties
history: HISTORY New property set in IFC4.3.2.0 to replace the entity IfcDoorPanelProperties

Pset_PermeableCoveringProperties.name: Pset_PermeableCoveringProperties
history: HISTORY New property set in IFC4.3.2.0 to replace the entity IfcPermeableCoveringProperties

Pset_WindowLiningProperties.name: Pset_WindowLiningProperties
history: HISTORY New property set in IFC4.3.2.0 to replace the entity IfcWindowLiningProperties

Pset_WindowPanelProperties.name: Pset_WindowPanelProperties
history: HISTORY New property set in IFC4.3.2.0 to replace the entity IfcWindowPanelProperties

Pset_ActuatorTypeElectricActuator.name: Pset_ActuatorTypeElectricActuator
Pset_ActuatorTypeElectricActuator.shortDefinition: A device that electrically actuates a control element.

Pset_ActuatorTypeHydraulicActuator.name: Pset_ActuatorTypeHydraulicActuator
Pset_ActuatorTypeHydraulicActuator.shortDefinition: A device that hydraulically actuates a control element.

Pset_ActuatorTypeLinearActuation.name: Pset_ActuatorTypeLinearActuation
Pset_ActuatorTypeLinearActuation.shortDefinition: Characteristics of linear actuation of an actuator

Pset_ActuatorTypePneumaticActuator.name: Pset_ActuatorTypePneumaticActuator
Pset_ActuatorTypePneumaticActuator.shortDefinition: A device that pneumatically actuates a control element

Pset_ActuatorTypeRotationalActuation.name: Pset_ActuatorTypeRotationalActuation
Pset_ActuatorTypeRotationalActuation.shortDefinition: Characteristics of rotational actuation of an actuator

Pset_AlarmPHistory.name: Pset_AlarmPHistory
Pset_AlarmPHistory.shortDefinition: Properties for history of alarm values.

Pset_ControllerPHistory.name: Pset_ControllerPHistory
Pset_ControllerPHistory.shortDefinition: Properties for history of controller values.

Pset_ControllerTypeFloating.name: Pset_ControllerTypeFloating
Pset_ControllerTypeFloating.shortDefinition: Properties for signal handling for an analog controller taking disparate valued multiple inputs and creating a single valued output.

Pset_ControllerTypeMultiPosition.name: Pset_ControllerTypeMultiPosition
Pset_ControllerTypeMultiPosition.shortDefinition: Properties for discrete inputs, outputs, and values within a programmable logic controller.

Pset_ControllerTypeProgrammable.name: Pset_ControllerTypeProgrammable
Pset_ControllerTypeProgrammable.shortDefinition: Properties for Discrete Digital Control (DDC) or programmable logic controllers.

Pset_ControllerTypeProportional.name: Pset_ControllerTypeProportional
Pset_ControllerTypeProportional.shortDefinition: Properties for signal handling for an proportional controller taking setpoint and feedback inputs and creating a single valued output.

Pset_ControllerTypeTwoPosition.name: Pset_ControllerTypeTwoPosition
Pset_ControllerTypeTwoPosition.shortDefinition: Properties for signal handling for an analog controller taking disparate valued multiple inputs and creating a single valued binary output.

Pset_FlowInstrumentPHistory.name: Pset_FlowInstrumentPHistory
Pset_FlowInstrumentPHistory.shortDefinition: Properties for history of flow instrument values.

Pset_FlowInstrumentTypePressureGauge.name: Pset_FlowInstrumentTypePressureGauge
Pset_FlowInstrumentTypePressureGauge.shortDefinition: A device that reads and displays a pressure value at a point or the pressure difference between two points.
