Pset_FlowInstrumentTypeThermometer.name: Pset_FlowInstrumentTypeThermometer
Pset_FlowInstrumentTypeThermometer.shortDefinition: A device that reads and displays a temperature value at a point.

Pset_SensorPHistory.name: Pset_SensorPHistory
Pset_SensorPHistory.shortDefinition: Properties for history of controller values.

Pset_SensorTypeCO2Sensor.name: Pset_SensorTypeCO2Sensor
Pset_SensorTypeCO2Sensor.shortDefinition: A device that senses or detects carbon dioxide.

Pset_SensorTypeConductanceSensor.name: Pset_SensorTypeConductanceSensor
Pset_SensorTypeConductanceSensor.shortDefinition: A device that senses or detects electrical conductance.

Pset_SensorTypeContactSensor.name: Pset_SensorTypeContactSensor
Pset_SensorTypeContactSensor.shortDefinition: A device that senses or detects contact.

Pset_SensorTypeFireSensor.name: Pset_SensorTypeFireSensor
Pset_SensorTypeFireSensor.shortDefinition: A device that senses or detects the presence of fire.

Pset_SensorTypeFlowSensor.name: Pset_SensorTypeFlowSensor
Pset_SensorTypeFlowSensor.shortDefinition: A device that senses or detects flow.

Pset_SensorTypeFrostSensor.name: Pset_SensorTypeFrostSensor
Pset_SensorTypeFrostSensor.shortDefinition: A device that senses or detects the presence of frost.

Pset_SensorTypeGasSensor.name: Pset_SensorTypeGasSensor
Pset_SensorTypeGasSensor.shortDefinition: A device that senses or detects gas.

Pset_SensorTypeHeatSensor.name: Pset_SensorTypeHeatSensor
Pset_SensorTypeHeatSensor.shortDefinition: A device that senses or detects heat.

Pset_SensorTypeHumiditySensor.name: Pset_SensorTypeHumiditySensor
Pset_SensorTypeHumiditySensor.shortDefinition: A device that senses or detects humidity.

Pset_SensorTypeIdentifierSensor.name: Pset_SensorTypeIdentifierSensor
Pset_SensorTypeIdentifierSensor.shortDefinition: A device that senses identification tags.

Pset_SensorTypeIonConcentrationSensor.name: Pset_SensorTypeIonConcentrationSensor
Pset_SensorTypeIonConcentrationSensor.shortDefinition: A device that senses or detects ion concentration such as water hardness.

Pset_SensorTypeLevelSensor.name: Pset_SensorTypeLevelSensor
Pset_SensorTypeLevelSensor.shortDefinition: A device that senses or detects fill level.

Pset_SensorTypeLightSensor.name: Pset_SensorTypeLightSensor
Pset_SensorTypeLightSensor.shortDefinition: A device that senses or detects light.

Pset_SensorTypeMoistureSensor.name: Pset_SensorTypeMoistureSensor
Pset_SensorTypeMoistureSensor.shortDefinition: A device that senses or detects moisture.

Pset_SensorTypeMovementSensor.name: Pset_SensorTypeMovementSensor
Pset_SensorTypeMovementSensor.shortDefinition: A device that senses or detects movement.

Pset_SensorTypePHSensor.name: Pset_SensorTypePHSensor
Pset_SensorTypePHSensor.shortDefinition: A device that senses or detects acidity.

Pset_SensorTypePressureSensor.name: Pset_SensorTypePressureSensor
Pset_SensorTypePressureSensor.shortDefinition: A device that senses or detects pressure.

Pset_SensorTypeRadiationSensor.name: Pset_SensorTypeRadiationSensor
Pset_SensorTypeRadiationSensor.shortDefinition: A device that senses or detects radiation.

Pset_SensorTypeRadioactivitySensor.name: Pset_SensorTypeRadioactivitySensor
Pset_SensorTypeRadioactivitySensor.shortDefinition: A device that senses or detects atomic decay.

Pset_SensorTypeSmokeSensor.name: Pset_SensorTypeSmokeSensor
Pset_SensorTypeSmokeSensor.shortDefinition: A device that senses or detects smoke.

Pset_SensorTypeSoundSensor.name: Pset_SensorTypeSoundSensor
Pset_SensorTypeSoundSensor.shortDefinition: A device that senses or detects sound.

Pset_SensorTypeTemperatureSensor.name: Pset_SensorTypeTemperatureSensor
Pset_SensorTypeTemperatureSensor.shortDefinition: A device that senses or detects temperature.

Pset_SensorTypeWindSensor.name: Pset_SensorTypeWindSensor
Pset_SensorTypeWindSensor.shortDefinition: A device that senses or detects wind speed and direction.

Pset_UnitaryControlElementPHistory.name: Pset_UnitaryControlElementPHistory
Pset_UnitaryControlElementPHistory.shortDefinition: Properties for history and operating schedules of thermostats.

Pset_UnitaryControlElementTypeCommon.name: Pset_UnitaryControlElementTypeCommon
Pset_UnitaryControlElementTypeCommon.shortDefinition: Unitary control element type common attributes.

Pset_UnitaryControlElementTypeIndicatorP.name: Pset_UnitaryControlElementTypeIndicatorPanel
Pset_UnitaryControlElementTypeIndicatorP.shortDefinition: Unitary control element type indicator panel attributes.

Pset_UnitaryControlElementTypeThermostat.name: Pset_UnitaryControlElementTypeThermostat
Pset_UnitaryControlElementTypeThermostat.shortDefinition: Unitary control element type thermostat attributes.

Pset_ConstructionResource.name: Pset_ConstructionResource
Pset_ConstructionResource.shortDefinition: Properties for tracking resource usage over time.

Pset_AudioVisualAppliancePHistory.name: Pset_AudioVisualAppliancePHistory
Pset_AudioVisualAppliancePHistory.shortDefinition: Captures realtime information for audio-video devices, such as for security camera footage and retail information displays.

Pset_AudioVisualApplianceTypeAmplifier.name: Pset_AudioVisualApplianceTypeAmplifier
Pset_AudioVisualApplianceTypeAmplifier.shortDefinition: An audio-visual amplifier is a device that renders audio from a single external source connected from a port.

Pset_AudioVisualApplianceTypeCamera.name: Pset_AudioVisualApplianceTypeCamera
Pset_AudioVisualApplianceTypeCamera.shortDefinition: An audio-visual camera is a device that captures video, such as for security.

Pset_AudioVisualApplianceTypeCommon.name: Pset_AudioVisualApplianceTypeCommon
Pset_AudioVisualApplianceTypeCommon.shortDefinition: An audio-visual appliance is a device that renders or captures audio and/or video.

Pset_AudioVisualApplianceTypeDisplay.name: Pset_AudioVisualApplianceTypeDisplay
Pset_AudioVisualApplianceTypeDisplay.shortDefinition: An audio-visual display is a device that renders video from a screen.

Pset_AudioVisualApplianceTypePlayer.name: Pset_AudioVisualApplianceTypePlayer
Pset_AudioVisualApplianceTypePlayer.shortDefinition: An audio-visual player is a device that plays stored media into a stream of audio and/or video, such as camera footage in security systems, background audio in retail areas, or media presentations in conference rooms or theatres.

Pset_AudioVisualApplianceTypeProjector.name: Pset_AudioVisualApplianceTypeProjector
Pset_AudioVisualApplianceTypeProjector.shortDefinition: An audio-visual projector is a device that projects video to a surface.

Pset_AudioVisualApplianceTypeReceiver.name: Pset_AudioVisualApplianceTypeReceiver
Pset_AudioVisualApplianceTypeReceiver.shortDefinition: An audio-visual receiver is a device that switches audio and/or video from multiple sources, including external sources connected from ports and internal aggregated sources.

Pset_AudioVisualApplianceTypeSpeaker.name: Pset_AudioVisualApplianceTypeSpeaker
Pset_AudioVisualApplianceTypeSpeaker.shortDefinition: An audio-visual speaker is a device that converts amplified audio signals into sound waves.

Pset_AudioVisualApplianceTypeTuner.name: Pset_AudioVisualApplianceTypeTuner
Pset_AudioVisualApplianceTypeTuner.shortDefinition: An audio-visual tuner is a device that demodulates a signal into a stream of audio and/or video.

Pset_CableCarrierFittingTypeCommon.name: Pset_CableCarrierFittingTypeCommon
Pset_CableCarrierFittingTypeCommon.shortDefinition: Common properties for cable carrier fittings.

Pset_CableCarrierSegmentTypeCableLadderS.name: Pset_CableCarrierSegmentTypeCableLadderSegment
Pset_CableCarrierSegmentTypeCableLadderS.shortDefinition: An open carrier segment on which cables are carried on a ladder structure.

Pset_CableCarrierSegmentTypeCableTraySeg.name: Pset_CableCarrierSegmentTypeCableTraySegment
Pset_CableCarrierSegmentTypeCableTraySeg.shortDefinition: An (typically) open carrier segment onto which cables are laid.

Pset_CableCarrierSegmentTypeCableTrunkin.name: Pset_CableCarrierSegmentTypeCableTrunkingSegment
Pset_CableCarrierSegmentTypeCableTrunkin.shortDefinition: An enclosed carrier segment with one or more compartments into which cables are placed.

Pset_CableCarrierSegmentTypeCommon.name: Pset_CableCarrierSegmentTypeCommon
Pset_CableCarrierSegmentTypeCommon.shortDefinition: Common properties for cable carrier segments.

Pset_CableCarrierSegmentTypeConduitSegme.name: Pset_CableCarrierSegmentTypeConduitSegment
Pset_CableCarrierSegmentTypeConduitSegme.shortDefinition: An enclosed tubular carrier segment through which cables are pulled.

Pset_CableSegmentOccurrence.name: Pset_CableSegmentOccurrence
Pset_CableSegmentOccurrence.shortDefinition: Properties for the occurrence of an electrical cable, core or conductor that conforms to a type as specified by an appropriate type definition within IFC.

Pset_CableSegmentTypeBusBarSegment.name: Pset_CableSegmentTypeBusBarSegment
Pset_CableSegmentTypeBusBarSegment.shortDefinition: Properties specific to busbar cable segments.

Pset_CableSegmentTypeCableSegment.name: Pset_CableSegmentTypeCableSegment
Pset_CableSegmentTypeCableSegment.shortDefinition: Electrical cable with a specific purpose to lead electric current within a circuit or any other electric construction. Includes all types of electric cables, mainly several electrical segments wrapped together, e.g. cable, tube, busbar. Note that the number of conductors within a cable is determined by an aggregation mechanism that aggregates the conductors within the cable. A single-core cable is defined in IEV 461-06-02 as being 'a cable having only one core'; a multiconductor cable is defined in IEV 461-06-03 as b eing 'a cable having more than one conductor, some of which may be uninsulated'; a mulicore cable is defined in IEV 461-06-04 as being 'a cable having more than one core'.

Pset_CableSegmentTypeCommon.name: Pset_CableSegmentTypeCommon
Pset_CableSegmentTypeCommon.shortDefinition: Properties for the definitions of electrical cable segments.

Pset_CableSegmentTypeConductorSegment.name: Pset_CableSegmentTypeConductorSegment
Pset_CableSegmentTypeConductorSegment.shortDefinition: An electrical conductor is a single linear element with the specific purpose to lead electric current. The core of one lead is normally single wired or multiwired which are intertwined. According to IEC 60050: IEV 195-01-07, a conductor is a conductive part intended to carry a specified electric current.

Pset_CableSegmentTypeCoreSegment.name: Pset_CableSegmentTypeCoreSegment
Pset_CableSegmentTypeCoreSegment.shortDefinition: An assembly comprising a conductor with its own insulation (and screens if any)

Pset_CommunicationsAppliancePHistory.name: Pset_CommunicationsAppliancePHistory
Pset_CommunicationsAppliancePHistory.shortDefinition: Captures realtime information for communications devices, such as for server farm energy usage.

Pset_DistributionBoardOccurrence.name: Pset_DistributionBoardOccurrence
Pset_DistributionBoardOccurrence.shortDefinition: Properties that may be applied to electric distribution board occurrences.

Pset_DistributionBoardTypeCommon.name: Pset_DistributionBoardTypeCommon
Pset_DistributionBoardTypeCommon.shortDefinition: Properties that may be applied to electric distribution boards.

Pset_ElectricAppliancePHistory.name: Pset_ElectricAppliancePHistory
Pset_ElectricAppliancePHistory.shortDefinition: Captures realtime information for electric appliances, such as for energy usage.

Pset_ElectricApplianceTypeElectricCooker.name: Pset_ElectricApplianceTypeElectricCooker
Pset_ElectricApplianceTypeElectricCooker.shortDefinition: Common properties for electric cooker appliances.

Pset_ElectricFlowStorageDeviceTypeCommon.name: Pset_ElectricFlowStorageDeviceTypeCommon
Pset_ElectricFlowStorageDeviceTypeCommon.shortDefinition: The characteristics of the supply associated with an electrical device occurrence acting as a source of supply to an electrical distribution system

Pset_ElectricGeneratorTypeCommon.name: Pset_ElectricGeneratorTypeCommon
Pset_ElectricGeneratorTypeCommon.shortDefinition: Defines a particular type of engine that is a machine for converting mechanical energy into electrical energy.

Pset_ElectricMotorTypeCommon.name: Pset_ElectricMotorTypeCommon
Pset_ElectricMotorTypeCommon.shortDefinition: Defines a particular type of engine that is a machine for converting electrical energy into mechanical energy. Note that in cases where a close coupled or monobloc pump or close coupled fan is being driven by the motor, the motor may itself be considered to be directly part of the pump or fan. In this case , motor information may need to be specified directly at the pump or fan and not througfh separate motor/motor connection entities.

Pset_ElectricTimeControlTypeCommon.name: Pset_ElectricTimeControlTypeCommon
Pset_ElectricTimeControlTypeCommon.shortDefinition: Common properties for electric time control devices.

Pset_ElectricalDeviceCommon.name: Pset_ElectricalDeviceCommon
Pset_ElectricalDeviceCommon.shortDefinition: A collection of properties that are commonly used by electrical device types.

Pset_JunctionBoxTypeCommon.name: Pset_JunctionBoxTypeCommon
Pset_JunctionBoxTypeCommon.shortDefinition: A junction box is an enclosure within which cables are connected.

Pset_LampTypeCommon.name: Pset_LampTypeCommon
Pset_LampTypeCommon.shortDefinition: A lamp is a component within a light fixture that is designed to emit light.

Pset_OutletTypeCommon.name: Pset_OutletTypeCommon
Pset_OutletTypeCommon.shortDefinition: Common properties for different outlet types.

Pset_ProtectiveDeviceBreakerUnitI2TCurve.name: Pset_ProtectiveDeviceBreakerUnitI2TCurve
Pset_ProtectiveDeviceBreakerUnitI2TCurve.shortDefinition: A coherent set of attributes representing a curve for let-through energy of a protective device. Note - A protective device may be associated with different instances of this pSet providing information related to different basic characteristics

Pset_ProtectiveDeviceBreakerUnitI2TFuseC.name: Pset_ProtectiveDeviceBreakerUnitI2TFuseCurve
Pset_ProtectiveDeviceBreakerUnitI2TFuseC.shortDefinition: A coherent set of attributes representing curves for melting- and breaking-energy of a fuse. Note - A fuse may be associated with different instances of this property set providing information related to different basic characteristics.

Pset_ProtectiveDeviceBreakerUnitIPICurve.name: Pset_ProtectiveDeviceBreakerUnitIPICurve
Pset_ProtectiveDeviceBreakerUnitIPICurve.shortDefinition: A coherent set of attributes representing curves for let-through currents of a protective device. Note - A protective device may be associated with different instances of this pSet providing information related to different basic characteristics.

Pset_ProtectiveDeviceBreakerUnitTypeMCB.name: Pset_ProtectiveDeviceBreakerUnitTypeMCB
Pset_ProtectiveDeviceBreakerUnitTypeMCB.shortDefinition: A coherent set of attributes representing the breaking capacities of an MCB. Note - A protective device may be associated with different instances of this property set providing information related to different basic characteristics.

Pset_ProtectiveDeviceBreakerUnitTypeMoto.name: Pset_ProtectiveDeviceBreakerUnitTypeMotorProtection
Pset_ProtectiveDeviceBreakerUnitTypeMoto.shortDefinition: A coherent set of attributes representing different capacities of a a motor protection device, defined in accordance with IEC 60947. Note - A protective device may be associated with different instances of this Pset.

Pset_ProtectiveDeviceOccurrence.name: Pset_ProtectiveDeviceOccurrence
Pset_ProtectiveDeviceOccurrence.shortDefinition: Properties that are applied to an occurrence of a protective device.

Pset_ProtectiveDeviceTrippingCurve.name: Pset_ProtectiveDeviceTrippingCurve
Pset_ProtectiveDeviceTrippingCurve.shortDefinition: Tripping curves are applied to thermal, thermal magnetic or MCB_RCD tripping units (i.e. tripping units having type property sets for thermal, thermal magnetic or MCB_RCD tripping defined). They are not applied to electronic tripping units.

Pset_ProtectiveDeviceTrippingFunctionGCu.name: Pset_ProtectiveDeviceTrippingFunctionGCurve
Pset_ProtectiveDeviceTrippingFunctionGCu.shortDefinition: Tripping functions are applied to electronic tripping units (i.e. tripping units having type property sets for electronic tripping defined). They are not applied to thermal, thermal magnetic or RCD tripping units.

Pset_ProtectiveDeviceTrippingFunctionICu.name: Pset_ProtectiveDeviceTrippingFunctionICurve
Pset_ProtectiveDeviceTrippingFunctionICu.shortDefinition: Tripping functions are applied to electronic tripping units (i.e. tripping units having type property sets for electronic tripping defined). They are not applied to thermal, thermal magnetic or RCD tripping units.

Pset_ProtectiveDeviceTrippingFunctionLCu.name: Pset_ProtectiveDeviceTrippingFunctionLCurve
Pset_ProtectiveDeviceTrippingFunctionLCu.shortDefinition: Tripping functions are applied to electronic tripping units (i.e. tripping units having type property sets for electronic tripping defined). They are not applied to thermal, thermal magnetic or RCD tripping units.

Pset_ProtectiveDeviceTrippingFunctionSCu.name: Pset_ProtectiveDeviceTrippingFunctionSCurve
Pset_ProtectiveDeviceTrippingFunctionSCu.shortDefinition: Tripping functions are applied to electronic tripping units (i.e. tripping units having type property sets for electronic tripping defined). They are not applied to thermal, thermal magnetic or RCD tripping units.

Pset_ProtectiveDeviceTrippingUnitCurrent.name: Pset_ProtectiveDeviceTrippingUnitCurrentAdjustment
Pset_ProtectiveDeviceTrippingUnitCurrent.shortDefinition: A set of current adjustment values that may be applied to an electronic or thermal tripping unit type.

Pset_ProtectiveDeviceTrippingUnitTimeAdj.name: Pset_ProtectiveDeviceTrippingUnitTimeAdjustment
Pset_ProtectiveDeviceTrippingUnitTimeAdj.shortDefinition: A set of time adjustment values that may be applied to an electronic or thermal tripping unit type.

Pset_ProtectiveDeviceTrippingUnitTypeCom.name: Pset_ProtectiveDeviceTrippingUnitTypeCommon
Pset_ProtectiveDeviceTrippingUnitTypeCom.shortDefinition: Common information concerning tripping units that area associated with protective devices

Pset_ProtectiveDeviceTrippingUnitTypeEle.name: Pset_ProtectiveDeviceTrippingUnitTypeElectroMagnetic
Pset_ProtectiveDeviceTrippingUnitTypeEle.shortDefinition: Information on tripping units that are electrically or magnetically tripped.

Pset_ProtectiveDeviceTrippingUnitTypeEle.name: Pset_ProtectiveDeviceTrippingUnitTypeElectronic
Pset_ProtectiveDeviceTrippingUnitTypeEle.shortDefinition: Information on tripping units that are electronically tripped.

Pset_ProtectiveDeviceTrippingUnitTypeRes.name: Pset_ProtectiveDeviceTrippingUnitTypeResidualCurrent
Pset_ProtectiveDeviceTrippingUnitTypeRes.shortDefinition: Information on tripping units that are activated by residual current.

Pset_ProtectiveDeviceTrippingUnitTypeThe.name: Pset_ProtectiveDeviceTrippingUnitTypeThermal
Pset_ProtectiveDeviceTrippingUnitTypeThe.shortDefinition: Information on tripping units that are thermally tripped.

Pset_ProtectiveDeviceTypeCircuitBreaker.name: Pset_ProtectiveDeviceTypeCircuitBreaker
Pset_ProtectiveDeviceTypeCircuitBreaker.shortDefinition: A coherent set of attributes representing different capacities of a circuit breaker or of a motor protection device, defined in accordance with IEC 60947. Note - A protective device may be associated with different instances of this property set providing information related to different basic characteristics.

Pset_ProtectiveDeviceTypeCommon.name: Pset_ProtectiveDeviceTypeCommon
Pset_ProtectiveDeviceTypeCommon.shortDefinition: Properties that are applied to a definition of a protective device.

Pset_ProtectiveDeviceTypeEarthLeakageCir.name: Pset_ProtectiveDeviceTypeEarthLeakageCircuitBreaker
Pset_ProtectiveDeviceTypeEarthLeakageCir.shortDefinition: An earth failure device acts to protect people and equipment from the effects of current leakage.

Pset_ProtectiveDeviceTypeFuseDisconnecto.name: Pset_ProtectiveDeviceTypeFuseDisconnector
Pset_ProtectiveDeviceTypeFuseDisconnecto.shortDefinition: A coherent set of attributes representing the breaking capacity of a fuse, defined in accordance with IEC 60269. Note - A protective device may be associated with different instances of this pSet providing information related to different basic characteristics.

Pset_ProtectiveDeviceTypeResidualCurrent.name: Pset_ProtectiveDeviceTypeResidualCurrentCircuitBreaker
Pset_ProtectiveDeviceTypeResidualCurrent.shortDefinition: A residual current circuit breaker opens, closes or isolates a circuit and has short circuit and overload protection.

Pset_ProtectiveDeviceTypeResidualCurrent.name: Pset_ProtectiveDeviceTypeResidualCurrentSwitch
Pset_ProtectiveDeviceTypeResidualCurrent.shortDefinition: A residual current switch opens, closes or isolates a circuit and has no short circuit or overload protection.

Pset_ProtectiveDeviceTypeVaristor.name: Pset_ProtectiveDeviceTypeVaristor
Pset_ProtectiveDeviceTypeVaristor.shortDefinition: A high voltage surge protection device.

Pset_SolarDeviceTypeCommon.name: Pset_SolarDeviceTypeCommon
Pset_SolarDeviceTypeCommon.shortDefinition: Common properties for solar device types.

Pset_SwitchingDeviceTypeCommon.name: Pset_SwitchingDeviceTypeCommon
Pset_SwitchingDeviceTypeCommon.shortDefinition: A switching device is a device designed to make or break the current in one or more electric circuits.

Pset_SwitchingDeviceTypeContactor.name: Pset_SwitchingDeviceTypeContactor
Pset_SwitchingDeviceTypeContactor.shortDefinition: An electrical device used to control the flow of power in a circuit on or off.

Pset_SwitchingDeviceTypeDimmerSwitch.name: Pset_SwitchingDeviceTypeDimmerSwitch
Pset_SwitchingDeviceTypeDimmerSwitch.shortDefinition: A dimmer switch is a switch that adjusts electrical power through a variable position level action.

Pset_SwitchingDeviceTypeEmergencyStop.name: Pset_SwitchingDeviceTypeEmergencyStop
Pset_SwitchingDeviceTypeEmergencyStop.shortDefinition: An emergency stop device acts to remove as quickly as possible any danger that may have arisen unexpectedly.

Pset_SwitchingDeviceTypeKeypad.name: Pset_SwitchingDeviceTypeKeypad
Pset_SwitchingDeviceTypeKeypad.shortDefinition: A keypad is a switch supporting multiple functions.

Pset_SwitchingDeviceTypeMomentarySwitch.name: Pset_SwitchingDeviceTypeMomentarySwitch
Pset_SwitchingDeviceTypeMomentarySwitch.shortDefinition: A momentary switch is a switch that does not hold state.

Pset_SwitchingDeviceTypePHistory.name: Pset_SwitchingDeviceTypePHistory
Pset_SwitchingDeviceTypePHistory.shortDefinition: Indicates switch positions or levels over time, such as for energy management or surveillance.

Pset_SwitchingDeviceTypeSelectorSwitch.name: Pset_SwitchingDeviceTypeSelectorSwitch
Pset_SwitchingDeviceTypeSelectorSwitch.shortDefinition: A selector switch is a switch that adjusts electrical power through a multi-position action.

Pset_SwitchingDeviceTypeStarter.name: Pset_SwitchingDeviceTypeStarter
Pset_SwitchingDeviceTypeStarter.shortDefinition: A starter is a switch which in the closed position controls the application of power to an electrical device.

Pset_SwitchingDeviceTypeSwitchDisconnect.name: Pset_SwitchingDeviceTypeSwitchDisconnector
Pset_SwitchingDeviceTypeSwitchDisconnect.shortDefinition: A switch disconnector is a switch which in the open position satisfies the isolating requirements specified for a disconnector.

Pset_SwitchingDeviceTypeToggleSwitch.name: Pset_SwitchingDeviceTypeToggleSwitch
Pset_SwitchingDeviceTypeToggleSwitch.shortDefinition: A toggle switch is a switch that enables or isolates electrical power through a two position on/off action.

Pset_TransformerTypeCommon.name: Pset_TransformerTypeCommon
Pset_TransformerTypeCommon.shortDefinition: An inductive stationary device that transfers electrical energy from one circuit to another.

Pset_AirTerminalBoxPHistory.name: Pset_AirTerminalBoxPHistory
Pset_AirTerminalBoxPHistory.shortDefinition: Air terminal box performance history attributes.

Pset_AirTerminalBoxTypeCommon.shortDefinition: Air terminal box type common attributes.

Pset_AirTerminalOccurrence.shortDefinition: Air terminal occurrence attributes attached to an instance of IfcAirTerminal.

Pset_AirTerminalPHistory.name: Pset_AirTerminalPHistory
Pset_AirTerminalPHistory.shortDefinition: Air terminal performance history common attributes.

Pset_AirToAirHeatRecoveryPHistory.shortDefinition: Air to Air Heat Recovery performance history common attributes.

Pset_AirToAirHeatRecoveryTypeCommon.shortDefinition: Air to Air Heat Recovery type common attributes.

Pset_DamperOccurrence.shortDefinition: Damper occurrence attributes attached to an instance of IfcDamper

Pset_DamperTypeFireSmokeDamper.name: Pset_DamperTypeFireSmokeDamper
Pset_DamperTypeFireSmokeDamper.shortDefinition: Combination Fire and Smoke damper type attributes.

Pset_DuctFittingPHistory.name: Pset_DuctFittingPHistory
Pset_DuctFittingPHistory.shortDefinition: Duct fitting performance history common attributes.

Pset_DuctSegmentOccurrence.name: Pset_DuctSegmentOccurrence
Pset_DuctSegmentOccurrence.shortDefinition: Duct segment occurrence attributes attached to an instance of IfcDuctSegment.

Pset_DuctSegmentPHistory.name: Pset_DuctSegmentPHistory
Pset_DuctSegmentPHistory.shortDefinition: Duct segment performance history common attributes.

Pset_DuctSilencerPHistory.name: Pset_DuctSilencerPHistory
Pset_DuctSilencerPHistory.shortDefinition: Duct silencer performance history common attributes.

Pset_ElementSize.name: Pset_ElementSize
Pset_ElementSize.shortDefinition: Property set with properties about size of the element.

Pset_FanCentrifugal.name: Pset_FanCentrifugal
Pset_FanCentrifugal.shortDefinition: Centrifugal fan occurrence attributes attached to an instance of IfcFan.

Pset_FanOccurrence.shortDefinition: Fan occurrence attributes attached to an instance of IfcFan.

Pset_FlowMeterTypeCommon.shortDefinition: Common attributes of a flow meter type

Pset_FlowMeterTypeEnergyMeter.name: Pset_FlowMeterTypeEnergyMeter
Pset_FlowMeterTypeEnergyMeter.shortDefinition: Device that measures, indicates and sometimes records, the energy usage in a system.

Pset_FlowMeterTypeGasMeter.name: Pset_FlowMeterTypeGasMeter
Pset_FlowMeterTypeGasMeter.shortDefinition: Device that measures, indicates and sometimes records, the volume of gas that passes through it without interrupting the flow.

Pset_FlowMeterTypeOilMeter.name: Pset_FlowMeterTypeOilMeter
Pset_FlowMeterTypeOilMeter.shortDefinition: Device that measures, indicates and sometimes records, the volume of oil that passes through it without interrupting the flow.

Pset_FlowMeterTypeWaterMeter.name: Pset_FlowMeterTypeWaterMeter
Pset_FlowMeterTypeWaterMeter.shortDefinition: Device that measures, indicates and sometimes records, the volume of water that passes through it without interrupting the flow.

Pset_HeatExchangerTypePlate.name: Pset_HeatExchangerTypePlate
Pset_HeatExchangerTypePlate.shortDefinition: Plate heat exchanger type common attributes.

Pset_PipeConnectionFlanged.name: Pset_PipeConnectionFlanged
Pset_PipeConnectionFlanged.shortDefinition: This property set is used to define the specifics of a flanged pipe connection used between occurrences of pipe segments and fittings.

Pset_PipeFittingOccurrence.name: Pset_PipeFittingOccurrence
Pset_PipeFittingOccurrence.shortDefinition: Pipe segment occurrence attributes attached to an instance of IfcPipeSegment.

Pset_PipeFittingPHistory.shortDefinition: Pipe fitting performance history common attributes.

Pset_PipeSegmentOccurrence.shortDefinition: Pipe segment occurrence attributes attached to an instance of IfcPipeSegment.

Pset_PipeSegmentPHistory.shortDefinition: Pipe segment performance history common attributes.

Pset_PipeSegmentTypeCulvert.name: Pset_PipeSegmentTypeCulvert
Pset_PipeSegmentTypeCulvert.shortDefinition: Covered channel or large pipe that forms a watercourse below ground level, usually under a road or railway (BS6100).

Pset_PumpOccurrence.shortDefinition: Pump occurrence attributes attached to an instance of IfcPump.

Pset_PumpTypeCommon.name: Pset_PumpTypeCommon
Pset_PumpTypeCommon.shortDefinition: Common attributes of a pump type.

Pset_SpaceHeaterPHistory.name: Pset_SpaceHeaterPHistory
Pset_SpaceHeaterPHistory.shortDefinition: Space heater performance history common attributes.

Pset_SpaceThermalPHistory.name: Pset_SpaceThermalPHistory
Pset_SpaceThermalPHistory.shortDefinition: Thermal and air flow conditions of a space or zone.

Pset_TankOccurrence.name: Pset_TankOccurrence
Pset_TankOccurrence.shortDefinition: Properties that relate to a tank. Note that a partial tank may be considered as a compartment within a compartmentalized tank.

Pset_TankTypeCommon.name: Pset_TankTypeCommon
Pset_TankTypeCommon.shortDefinition: Common attributes of a tank type.

Pset_TankTypeExpansion.shortDefinition: Common attributes of an expansion type tank.

Pset_TankTypePreformed.name: Pset_TankTypePreformed
Pset_TankTypePreformed.shortDefinition: Fixed vessel manufactured as a single unit with one or more compartments for storing a liquid.

Pset_TankTypePressureVessel.name: Pset_TankTypePressureVessel
Pset_TankTypePressureVessel.shortDefinition: Common attributes of a pressure vessel.

Pset_TankTypeSectional.name: Pset_TankTypeSectional
Pset_TankTypeSectional.shortDefinition: Fixed vessel constructed from sectional parts with one or more compartments for storing a liquid.

Pset_UnitaryEquipmentTypeAirConditioning.name: Pset_UnitaryEquipmentTypeAirConditioningUnit
Pset_UnitaryEquipmentTypeAirConditioning.shortDefinition: Air conditioning unit equipment type attributes.

Pset_UnitaryEquipmentTypeAirHandler.shortDefinition: Air handler unitary equipment type attributes.

Pset_ValvePHistory.name: Pset_ValvePHistory
Pset_ValvePHistory.shortDefinition: Valve performance history common attributes of a typical 2 port pattern type valve.

Pset_ValveTypeAirRelease.name: Pset_ValveTypeAirRelease
Pset_ValveTypeAirRelease.shortDefinition: Valve used to release air from a pipe or fitting.

Pset_ValveTypeDrawOffCock.name: Pset_ValveTypeDrawOffCock
Pset_ValveTypeDrawOffCock.shortDefinition: A small diameter valve, used to drain water from a cistern or water filled system.

Pset_ValveTypeFaucet.name: Pset_ValveTypeFaucet
Pset_ValveTypeFaucet.shortDefinition: A small diameter valve, with a free outlet, from which water is drawn.

Pset_ValveTypeFlushing.name: Pset_ValveTypeFlushing
Pset_ValveTypeFlushing.shortDefinition: Valve that flushes a predetermined quantity of water to cleanse a WC, urinal or slop hopper.

Pset_ValveTypeGasTap.name: Pset_ValveTypeGasTap
Pset_ValveTypeGasTap.shortDefinition: A small diameter valve, used to discharge gas from a system.

Pset_ValveTypeIsolating.name: Pset_ValveTypeIsolating
Pset_ValveTypeIsolating.shortDefinition: Valve that is used to isolate system components.

Pset_ValveTypeMixing.name: Pset_ValveTypeMixing
Pset_ValveTypeMixing.shortDefinition: A valve where typically the temperature of the outlet is determined by mixing hot and cold water inlet flows.

Pset_ValveTypePressureReducing.name: Pset_ValveTypePressureReducing
Pset_ValveTypePressureReducing.shortDefinition: Valve that reduces the pressure of a fluid immediately downstream of its position in a pipeline to a preselected value or by a predetermined ratio.

Pset_ValveTypePressureRelief.name: Pset_ValveTypePressureRelief
Pset_ValveTypePressureRelief.shortDefinition: Spring or weight loaded valve that automatically discharges to a safe place fluid that has built up to excessive pressure in pipes or fittings.

Pset_FireSuppressionTerminalTypeBreechin.name: Pset_FireSuppressionTerminalTypeBreechingInlet
Pset_FireSuppressionTerminalTypeBreechin.shortDefinition: Symmetrical pipe fitting that unites two or more inlets into a single pipe (BS6100 330 114 adapted).

Pset_FireSuppressionTerminalTypeCommon.name: Pset_FireSuppressionTerminalTypeCommon
Pset_FireSuppressionTerminalTypeCommon.shortDefinition: Common properties for fire suppression terminals.

Pset_FireSuppressionTerminalTypeFireHydr.name: Pset_FireSuppressionTerminalTypeFireHydrant
Pset_FireSuppressionTerminalTypeFireHydr.shortDefinition: Device, fitted to a pipe, through which a temporary supply of water may be provided (BS6100 330 6107)

Pset_FireSuppressionTerminalTypeHoseReel.name: Pset_FireSuppressionTerminalTypeHoseReel
Pset_FireSuppressionTerminalTypeHoseReel.shortDefinition: A supporting framework on which a hose may be wound (BS6100 155 8201).

Pset_FireSuppressionTerminalTypeSprinkle.name: Pset_FireSuppressionTerminalTypeSprinkler
Pset_FireSuppressionTerminalTypeSprinkle.shortDefinition: Device for sprinkling water from a pipe under pressure over an area (BS6100 100 3432)

Pset_SanitaryTerminalTypeBath.name: Pset_SanitaryTerminalTypeBath
Pset_SanitaryTerminalTypeBath.shortDefinition: Sanitary appliance for immersion of the human body or parts of it (BS6100).

Pset_SanitaryTerminalTypeBidet.name: Pset_SanitaryTerminalTypeBidet
Pset_SanitaryTerminalTypeBidet.shortDefinition: Waste water appliance for washing the excretory organs while sitting astride the bowl (BS6100).

Pset_SanitaryTerminalTypeCistern.name: Pset_SanitaryTerminalTypeCistern
Pset_SanitaryTerminalTypeCistern.shortDefinition: A water storage unit attached to a sanitary terminal that is fitted with a device, operated automatically or by the user, that discharges water to cleanse a water closet (toilet) pan, urinal or slop hopper. (BS6100 330 5008)

Pset_SanitaryTerminalTypeSanitaryFountai.name: Pset_SanitaryTerminalTypeSanitaryFountain
Pset_SanitaryTerminalTypeSanitaryFountai.shortDefinition: Asanitary terminal that provides a low pressure jet of water for a specific purpose (IAI).

Pset_SanitaryTerminalTypeShower.name: Pset_SanitaryTerminalTypeShower
Pset_SanitaryTerminalTypeShower.shortDefinition: Installation or waste water appliance that emits a spray of water to wash the human body (BS6100).

Pset_SanitaryTerminalTypeSink.name: Pset_SanitaryTerminalTypeSink
Pset_SanitaryTerminalTypeSink.shortDefinition: Waste water appliance for receiving, retaining or disposing of domestic, culinary, laboratory or industrial process liquids.

Pset_SanitaryTerminalTypeToiletPan.name: Pset_SanitaryTerminalTypeToiletPan

Pset_SanitaryTerminalTypeUrinal.name: Pset_SanitaryTerminalTypeUrinal
Pset_SanitaryTerminalTypeUrinal.shortDefinition: Soil appliance that receives urine and directs it to a waste outlet (BS6100).

Pset_SanitaryTerminalTypeWashHandBasin.name: Pset_SanitaryTerminalTypeWashHandBasin
Pset_SanitaryTerminalTypeWashHandBasin.shortDefinition: Waste water appliance for washing the upper parts of the body.

Pset_WasteTerminalTypeFloorTrap.name: Pset_WasteTerminalTypeFloorTrap
Pset_WasteTerminalTypeFloorTrap.shortDefinition: Pipe fitting, set into the floor, that retains liquid to prevent the passage of foul air.

Pset_WasteTerminalTypeFloorWaste.name: Pset_WasteTerminalTypeFloorWaste
Pset_WasteTerminalTypeFloorWaste.shortDefinition: Pipe fitting, set into the floor, that collects waste water and discharges it to a separate trap.

Pset_WasteTerminalTypeGullySump.name: Pset_WasteTerminalTypeGullySump
Pset_WasteTerminalTypeGullySump.shortDefinition: Pipe fitting or assembly of fittings to receive surface water or waste water, fitted with a grating or sealed cover.

Pset_WasteTerminalTypeGullyTrap.name: Pset_WasteTerminalTypeGullyTrap
Pset_WasteTerminalTypeGullyTrap.shortDefinition: Pipe fitting or assembly of fittings to receive surface water or waste water, fitted with a grating or sealed cover and discharging through a trap (BS6100 330 3504 modified)

Pset_WasteTerminalTypeRoofDrain.name: Pset_WasteTerminalTypeRoofDrain
Pset_WasteTerminalTypeRoofDrain.shortDefinition: Pipe fitting, set into the roof, that collects rainwater for discharge into the rainwater system.

Pset_WasteTerminalTypeWasteDisposalUnit.name: Pset_WasteTerminalTypeWasteDisposalUnit
Pset_WasteTerminalTypeWasteDisposalUnit.shortDefinition: Electrically operated device that reduces kitchen or other waste into fragments small enough to be flushed into a drainage system.

Pset_WasteTerminalTypeWasteTrap.name: Pset_WasteTerminalTypeWasteTrap
Pset_WasteTerminalTypeWasteTrap.shortDefinition: Pipe fitting, set adjacent to a sanitary terminal, that retains liquid to prevent the passage of foul air.

Pset_RevetmentCommon.shortDefinition: Properties common to the definition of all occurrences of _IfcMarineFacility_ with the predefined type set to REVETMENT.

Pset_ShipLockCommon.name: Pset_ShipLockCommon
Pset_ShipLockCommon.shortDefinition: Properties common to the definition of all occurrences of _IfcMarineFacility_ with the predefined type set to SHIPLOCK.

Pset_ShiplockDesignCriteria.name: Pset_ShiplockDesignCriteria
Pset_ShiplockDesignCriteria.shortDefinition: Properties common to the definition of design criteria of all occurrences of IfcMarineFacility with the predefined type set to SHIPLOCK.

Pset_ShipyardCommon.name: Pset_ShipyardCommon
Pset_ShipyardCommon.shortDefinition: Properties common to the definition of all occurrences of IfcMarineFacility with the predefined type set to SHIPYARD.

Pset_CableSegmentTypeFiberTubeSegment.name: Pset_CableSegmentTypeFiberTubeSegment

Pset_CableSegmentTypeStitchWire.shortDefinition: Properties of stitch wires. This property set is applicable to a type or occurrence of _IfcCableSegment_ with predefined type STICHWIRE.

The main function of instrument transformers is to operate instruments or metering from high voltage or high current circuits, safely isolating secondary control circuitry from the high voltages or currents. Combination instrument transformers are metering current.

Pset_DiscreteAccessoryTypeInsulator.name: Pset_DiscreteAccessoryTypeInsulator

Pset_MobileTelecommunicationsApplianceTy.name: Pset_MobileTelecommunicationsApplianceTypeMasterUnit
Pset_MobileTelecommunicationsApplianceTy.shortDefinition: Properties common to the definition of all occurrences of _IfcMobileTelecommunicationsAppliance_ and types of _IfcMobileTelecommunicationsApplianceType_ with the predefined type set to MASTERUNIT.

Pset_MobileTelecommunicationsApplianceTy.name: Pset_MobileTelecommunicationsApplianceTypeMobileSwitchingCenter
Pset_MobileTelecommunicationsApplianceTy.shortDefinition: Properties common to the definition of all occurrences of _IfcMobileTelecommunicationsAppliance_ and types of _IfcMobileTelecommunicationsApplianceType_ with the predefined type set to MOBILESWITCHINGCENTER.

Pset_MobileTelecommunicationsApplianceTy.name: Pset_MobileTelecommunicationsApplianceTypeRemoteUnit

Pset_RailTypeStockRail.name: Pset_RailTypeStockRail
Pset_RailTypeStockRail.shortDefinition: Properties common to IfcRail types and occurrences with PredefinedType set to STOCKRAIL.

Pset_RailwayCableCarrier.name: Pset_RailwayCableCarrier

Pset_RepairOccurrence.shortDefinition: Properties defining repair information for occurrences of element, asset or system.

Pset_SectionInsulator.name: Pset_SectionInsulator
Pset_SectionInsulator.shortDefinition: Properties applicable to the insulator type of discrete accessory, indicated that the insulator is a section insulator used in the overhead contact line system.

Pset_SectioningDevice.name: Pset_SectioningDevice
Pset_SectioningDevice.shortDefinition: Properties of sectioning device used in railway. The property set can be used by the predefined type INSULATOR of IfcDiscreteAccessory.

Pset_SensorTypeEarthquakeSensor.name: Pset_SensorTypeEarthquakeSensor
Pset_SensorTypeEarthquakeSensor.shortDefinition: Properties that are applicable for IfcSensor with predefined type EARTHQUAKESENSOR.

Pset_SensorTypeForeignObjectDetectionSen.name: Pset_SensorTypeForeignObjectDetectionSensor
Pset_SensorTypeForeignObjectDetectionSen.shortDefinition: Properties that are applicable for IfcSensor with predefined type FOREIGNOBJECTDETECTIONSENSOR.

Pset_SensorTypeRainSensor.name: Pset_SensorTypeRainSensor
Pset_SensorTypeRainSensor.shortDefinition: Properties that are applicable for IfcSensor with predefined type RAINSENSOR.

Pset_SensorTypeSnowSensor.name: Pset_SensorTypeSnowSensor
Pset_SensorTypeSnowSensor.shortDefinition: Properties that are applicable for IfcSensor with predefined type SNOWDEPTHSENSOR.

Pset_SensorTypeTurnoutClosureSensor.name: Pset_SensorTypeTurnoutClosureSensor
Pset_SensorTypeTurnoutClosureSensor.shortDefinition: Properties that are applicable for IfcSensor with predefined type TURNOUTCLOSURESENSOR.

Pset_SignalFrame.name: Pset_SignalFrame
Pset_SignalFrame.shortDefinition: Properties that define signal frame parameters for occurrences and types of _IfcSignal_ applied in railways.

Pset_SlabTypeTrackSlab.name: Pset_SlabTypeTrackSlab
Pset_SlabTypeTrackSlab.shortDefinition: Properties in this property set are generally applicable slabs used in railway tracks, modelled as IfcSlab with PredefinedType TRACKSLAB.

Pset_SpringTensioner.name: Pset_SpringTensioner
Pset_SpringTensioner.shortDefinition: Properties of spring tensioner used in railway. The property set can be used by the predefined type TENSIONINGEQUIPMENT of IfcDiscreteAccessory.

Pset_SwitchingDeviceTypeRelay.name: Pset_SwitchingDeviceTypeRelay
Pset_SwitchingDeviceTypeRelay.shortDefinition: Properties in this property set are applicable for _IfcSwitchingDevice_ with PredefinedType _RELAY_.

Pset_SymmetricPairCable.name: Pset_SymmetricPairCable
Pset_SymmetricPairCable.shortDefinition: Properties applicable to a symmetric pair cable, which is is a copper cable with a variable number of copper twisted symmetric pair conductors used to transmit data by means of electrical signals. this property set is applicable to type or occurrence of _IfcCableSegment_ with predefined type CABLESEGMENT

Pset_SystemFurnitureElementTypeSubrack.name: Pset_SystemFurnitureElementTypeSubrack
Pset_SystemFurnitureElementTypeSubrack.shortDefinition: Properties of subrack used in railway telecom. The property set can be used by the predefined type SUBRACK of IfcSystemFurnitureElement

Pset_TelecomCableGeneral.name: Pset_TelecomCableGeneral
Pset_TelecomCableGeneral.shortDefinition: Properties common to occurrences and types of IfcCableSegment and IfcCableFitting applied in telecommunication domain.

Pset_TicketProcessing.name: Pset_TicketProcessing
Pset_TicketProcessing.shortDefinition: Properties for indicating performance ratings for ticket processing of entry elements (e.g. turnstile, boom barrier).

Pset_TicketVendingMachine.name: Pset_TicketVendingMachine
Pset_TicketVendingMachine.shortDefinition: Properties of ticket vending machine. The property set can be used by _IfcElectricAppliance_ with PredefinedType VENDINGMACHINE.

Pset_TrackBase.name: Pset_TrackBase
Pset_TrackBase.shortDefinition: Properties in this property set are applicable for IfcSlab with PredefinedType BASESLAB, indicated that the base slab is a track base slab.

Pset_TrackElementOccurrenceSleeper.name: Pset_TrackElementOccurrenceSleeper
Pset_TrackElementOccurrenceSleeper.shortDefinition: Properties common to the definition to all occurrences of IfcTrackElement with PredefinedType set to SLEEPER.

Pset_TrackElementPHistoryDerailer.name: Pset_TrackElementPHistoryDerailer
Pset_TrackElementPHistoryDerailer.shortDefinition: Indicates derailer information over time for operation management.

Pset_TrackElementTypeDerailer.name: Pset_TrackElementTypeDerailer
Pset_TrackElementTypeDerailer.shortDefinition: Properties common to the definition to all occurrences and types of IfcTrackElement with PredefinedType set to DERAILER.

Pset_TrackElementTypeSleeper.name: Pset_TrackElementTypeSleeper
Pset_TrackElementTypeSleeper.shortDefinition: Properties common to the definition to all occurrences and types of IfcTrackElement with PredefinedType set to SLEEPER.

Pset_TractionPowerSystem.name: Pset_TractionPowerSystem
Pset_TractionPowerSystem.shortDefinition: Properties of a traction power system. The property is associated to the predefined type ELECTRICAL of _IfcDistributionSystem_, and is used to characterise systems such as railway electrical distribution networks used to provide energy for rolling stock.

Pset_TransportEquipmentOTN.name: Pset_TransportEquipmentOTN
Pset_TransportEquipmentOTN.shortDefinition: Properties in this property set are applied to transport equipment that act in optical transport network (OTN) system.

Pset_UnitaryControlElementBaseStationCon.name: Pset_UnitaryControlElementBaseStationController
Pset_UnitaryControlElementBaseStationCon.shortDefinition: Properties that are applicable to _IfcUnitaryControlElement_ with the predefined type set to BASESTATIONCONTROLLER.

Pset_UnitaryControlElementTypeControlPan.name: Pset_UnitaryControlElementTypeControlPanel
Pset_UnitaryControlElementTypeControlPan.shortDefinition: Properties that are applicable to _IfcUnitaryControlElement_ with the predefined type set to CONTROLPANEL.

Pset_VoltageInstrumentTransformer.name: Pset_VoltageInstrumentTransformer
Pset_VoltageInstrumentTransformer.shortDefinition: Instrument transformers are high accuracy class electrical devices used to isolate or transform voltage or current levels. The main function of instrument transformers is to operate instruments or metering from high voltage or high current circuits, safely isolating secondary control circuitry from the high voltages or currents. Combination instrument transformers are metering voltage.

Pset_WiredCommunicationPortCommon.name: Pset_WiredCommunicationPortCommon
Pset_WiredCommunicationPortCommon.shortDefinition: Properties used for wired communication port.

Pset_CourseApplicationConditions.name: Pset_CourseApplicationConditions
Pset_CourseApplicationConditions.shortDefinition: Properties regarding the conditions when applying a course.

Pset_OnSiteCastKerb.name: Pset_OnSiteCastKerb
Pset_OnSiteCastKerb.shortDefinition: Properties for an on site cast kerb.

Pset_PavementCommon.name: Pset_PavementCommon
Pset_PavementCommon.shortDefinition: Describes the common properties and nominal dimensions of pavement.

Pset_RadiiKerbStone.name: Pset_RadiiKerbStone
Pset_RadiiKerbStone.shortDefinition: Properties describing the keb stone radii.

Pset_RoadDesignCriteriaCommon.name: Pset_RoadDesignCriteriaCommon
Pset_RoadDesignCriteriaCommon.shortDefinition: Road design criteria that may be attached to road parts.

Pset_RoadGuardElement.name: Pset_RoadGuardElement
Pset_RoadGuardElement.shortDefinition: Properties assigned to IfcWall/PARAPET or IfcRailing/GUARDRAIL when assigned as road guard elements.

Pset_Superelevation.name: Pset_Superelevation
Pset_Superelevation.shortDefinition: Specifies the general properties for a Superelevation event.

Pset_TrafficCalmingDeviceCommon.name: Pset_TrafficCalmingDeviceCommon
Pset_TrafficCalmingDeviceCommon.shortDefinition: Properties for a traffic calming device.

Pset_Width.name: Pset_Width
Pset_Width.shortDefinition: Specifies the general properties for a Width event.

Pset_StructuralSurfaceMemberVaryingThick.name: Pset_StructuralSurfaceMemberVaryingThickness
Pset_StructuralSurfaceMemberVaryingThick.shortDefinition: Thickness parameters of a surface member (structural analysis item) with varying thickness, particularly with linearly varying thickness. The thickness is interpolated/ extrapolated from three points. The locations of these points are given either in local x,y coordinates of the surface member or in global X,Y,Z coordinates. Either way, these points are required to be located within the face or at the bounds of the face of the surface member, and they must not be located on a common line. Local and global coordinates shall not be mixed within the same property set instance.

Pset_ConcreteElementGeneral.name: Pset_ConcreteElementGeneral
Pset_ConcreteElementGeneral.shortDefinition: General properties common to different types of concrete elements, including reinforced concrete elements. The property set can be used by a number of subtypes of IfcBuiltElement, indicated that such element is designed or constructed using a concrete construction method.

Pset_FootingCommon.name: Pset_FootingCommon
Pset_FootingCommon.shortDefinition: Properties common to the definition of all occurrences of IfcFooting.

Pset_PileCommon.name: Pset_PileCommon
Pset_PileCommon.shortDefinition: Properties common to the definition of all occurrences of IfcPile.

Pset_PrecastConcreteElementFabrication.name: Pset_PrecastConcreteElementFabrication
Pset_PrecastConcreteElementFabrication.shortDefinition: Production and manufacturing related properties common to different types of precast concrete elements. The Pset applies to manufactured pieces. It can be used by a number of subtypes of IfcBuiltElement. If the precast concrete ele

Pset_PrecastConcreteElementGeneral.name: Pset_PrecastConcreteElementGeneral
Pset_PrecastConcreteElementGeneral.shortDefinition: Production and manufacturing related properties common to different types of precast concrete elements. The Pset can be used by a number of subtypes of IfcBuiltElement. If the precast concrete element is a sandwich wall panel each structural layer or shell represented by an IfcBuildingElementPart may be attached to a separate Pset of this type, if needed. Some of the properties apply only for specific types of precast concrete elements.

Pset_PrecastSlab.name: Pset_PrecastSlab
Pset_PrecastSlab.shortDefinition: Layout and component information defining how prestressed slab components are laid out in a precast slab assembly. The values are global defaults for the slab as a whole, but can be overridden by local placements of the individual com

Pset_ReinforcementBarCountOfIndependentF.name: Pset_ReinforcementBarCountOfIndependentFooting
Pset_ReinforcementBarCountOfIndependentF.shortDefinition: Reinforcement Concrete parameter [ST-2]: The amount number information of reinforcement bar with the independent footing. The X and Y direction are based on the local coordinate system of building storey. The X and Y direction of the reinforcement bar are parallel to the X and Y axis of the IfcBuildingStorey's local coordinate system, respectively.

Pset_ReinforcementBarPitchOfBeam.name: Pset_ReinforcementBarPitchOfBeam
Pset_ReinforcementBarPitchOfBeam.shortDefinition: The pitch length information of reinforcement bar with the beam.

Pset_ReinforcementBarPitchOfColumn.name: Pset_ReinforcementBarPitchOfColumn
Pset_ReinforcementBarPitchOfColumn.shortDefinition: The pitch length information of reinforcement bar with the column. The X and Y direction are based on the local coordinate system of building storey. The X and Y direction of the reinforcement bar are parallel to the X and Y axis of the IfcBuildingStorey's local coordinate system, respectively.

Pset_ReinforcementBarPitchOfContinuousFo.name: Pset_ReinforcementBarPitchOfContinuousFooting
Pset_ReinforcementBarPitchOfContinuousFo.shortDefinition: Reinforcement Concrete parameter [ST-2]: The pitch length information of reinforcement bar with the continuous footing.

Pset_ReinforcementBarPitchOfSlab.name: Pset_ReinforcementBarPitchOfSlab
Pset_ReinforcementBarPitchOfSlab.shortDefinition: The pitch length information of reinforcement bar with the slab.

Pset_ReinforcementBarPitchOfWall.name: Pset_ReinforcementBarPitchOfWall
Pset_ReinforcementBarPitchOfWall.shortDefinition: The pitch length information of reinforcement bar with the wall.

Pset_Address.name: Pset_Address
Pset_Address.shortDefinition: This Property Set represents an address for delivery of paper based mail and other postal deliveries.

Pset_MaterialCombustion.name: Pset_MaterialCombustion
Pset_MaterialCombustion.shortDefinition: A set of extended material properties of products of combustion generated by elements typically used within the context of building services and flow distribution systems.

Pset_MaterialCommon.name: Pset_MaterialCommon
Pset_MaterialCommon.shortDefinition: A set of general material properties.

Pset_MaterialConcrete.name: Pset_MaterialConcrete
Pset_MaterialConcrete.shortDefinition: A set of extended mechanical properties related to concrete materials.

Pset_MaterialEnergy.name: Pset_MaterialEnergy
Pset_MaterialEnergy.shortDefinition: A set of extended material properties for energy calculation purposes.

Pset_MaterialFuel.name: Pset_MaterialFuel
Pset_MaterialFuel.shortDefinition: A set of extended material properties of fuel energy typically used within the context of building services and flow distribution systems.

Pset_MaterialHygroscopic.name: Pset_MaterialHygroscopic
Pset_MaterialHygroscopic.shortDefinition: A set of hygroscopic properties of materials.

Pset_MaterialMechanical.name: Pset_MaterialMechanical
Pset_MaterialMechanical.shortDefinition: A set of mechanical material properties normally used for structural analysis purpose. It contains all properties which are independent of the actual material type.

Pset_MaterialOptical.name: Pset_MaterialOptical
Pset_MaterialOptical.shortDefinition: A set of optical properties of materials.

Pset_MaterialSteel.name: Pset_MaterialSteel
Pset_MaterialSteel.shortDefinition: A set of extended mechanical properties related to steel (or other metallic and isotropic) materials.

Pset_MaterialThermal.name: Pset_MaterialThermal
Pset_MaterialThermal.shortDefinition: A set of thermal material properties.

Pset_MaterialWater.name: Pset_MaterialWater
Pset_MaterialWater.shortDefinition: A set of extended material properties for of water typically used within the context of building services and flow distribution systems.

Pset_MaterialWood.name: Pset_MaterialWood
Pset_MaterialWood.shortDefinition: This is a collection of properties applicable to wood-based materials that specify kind and grade of material as well as moisture related parameters.

Pset_MaterialWoodBasedStructure.name: Pset_MaterialWoodBasedStructure
Pset_MaterialWoodBasedStructure.shortDefinition: Properties about Material of Wood Based Structure.

Pset_MechanicalBeamInPlane.name: Pset_MechanicalBeamInPlane
Pset_MechanicalBeamInPlane.shortDefinition: Properties about Mechanical Beam in Plane.

Pset_MechanicalBeamInPlaneNegative.name: Pset_MechanicalBeamInPlaneNegative
Pset_MechanicalBeamInPlaneNegative.shortDefinition: Properties about Mechanical Beam in Plane Negative.

Pset_MechanicalBeamOutOfPlane.name: Pset_MechanicalBeamOutOfPlane
Pset_MechanicalBeamOutOfPlane.shortDefinition: Properties about Mechanical Beam Out Of Plane.

Pset_MechanicalPanelInPlane.name: Pset_MechanicalPanelInPlane
Pset_MechanicalPanelInPlane.shortDefinition: Properties for Mechanical Panels In Plane.

Pset_MechanicalPanelOutOfPlane.name: Pset_MechanicalPanelOutOfPlane
Pset_MechanicalPanelOutOfPlane.shortDefinition: Properties for Mechanica lPanels Out Of Plane.

Pset_MechanicalPanelOutOfPlaneNegative.name: Pset_MechanicalPanelOutOfPlaneNegative
Pset_MechanicalPanelOutOfPlaneNegative.shortDefinition: Properties for Mechanical Panels Out Of Plane Negative.

Pset_ProfileArbitraryDoubleT.name: Pset_ProfileArbitraryDoubleT
Pset_ProfileArbitraryDoubleT.shortDefinition: This is a collection of geometric properties of double-T section profiles of precast concrete elements, to be used in conjunction with IfcArbitraryClosedProfileDef when profile designation alone does not fulfill the information requirements.

Pset_ProfileArbitraryHollowCore.name: Pset_ProfileArbitraryHollowCore
Pset_ProfileArbitraryHollowCore.shortDefinition: This is a collection of geometric properties of hollow core section profiles of precast concrete elements, to be used in conjunction with IfcArbitraryProfileDefWithVoids when profile designation alone does not fulfill the information requirements.

Pset_ProfileMechanical.name: Pset_ProfileMechanical
Pset_ProfileMechanical.shortDefinition: This is a collection of mechanical properties that are applicable to virtually all profile classes. Most of these properties are especially used in structural analysis.

Pset_BeamCommon.name: Pset_BeamCommon
Pset_BeamCommon.shortDefinition: Properties common to the definition of all occurrence and type objects of beam.

Pset_BuildingElementProxyCommon.name: Pset_BuildingElementProxyCommon
Pset_BuildingElementProxyCommon.shortDefinition: Common properties for built elements that don't have a specific entity name.

Pset_BuildingSystemCommon.name: Pset_BuildingSystemCommon
Pset_BuildingSystemCommon.shortDefinition: Properties common to the definition of building systems.

Pset_ChimneyCommon.name: Pset_ChimneyCommon
Pset_ChimneyCommon.shortDefinition: Properties common to the definition of all occurrence and type objects of chimneys.

Pset_ColumnCommon.name: Pset_ColumnCommon
Pset_ColumnCommon.shortDefinition: Properties common to the definition of all occurrence and type objects of column.

Pset_CoveringCommon.name: Pset_CoveringCommon
Pset_CoveringCommon.shortDefinition: Properties common to the definition of all occurrence and type objects of covering

Pset_CoveringFlooring.name: Pset_CoveringFlooring
Pset_CoveringFlooring.shortDefinition: Properties common to the definition of all occurrence and type objects of covering with the predefined type set to FLOORING.

Pset_CurtainWallCommon.name: Pset_CurtainWallCommon
Pset_CurtainWallCommon.shortDefinition: Properties common to the definition of all occurrences of IfcCurtainWall.

Pset_DoorCommon.name: Pset_DoorCommon
Pset_DoorCommon.shortDefinition: Properties common to the definition of all occurrences of IfcDoor.

Pset_DoorWindowGlazingType.name: Pset_DoorWindowGlazingType
Pset_DoorWindowGlazingType.shortDefinition: Properties common to the definition of the glazing component of occurrences of IfcDoor and IfcWindow, used for thermal and lighting calculations.

Pset_MemberCommon.name: Pset_MemberCommon
Pset_MemberCommon.shortDefinition: Properties common to the definition of all occurrences of IfcMember.

Pset_PlateCommon.name: Pset_PlateCommon
Pset_PlateCommon.shortDefinition: Properties common to the definition of all occurrences of IfcPlate.

Pset_RailingCommon.name: Pset_RailingCommon
Pset_RailingCommon.shortDefinition: Properties common to the definition of all occurrences of IfcRailing.

Pset_RampCommon.name: Pset_RampCommon
Pset_RampCommon.shortDefinition: Properties common to the definition of all occurrences of IfcRamp.

Pset_RampFlightCommon.name: Pset_RampFlightCommon
Pset_RampFlightCommon.shortDefinition: Properties common to the definition of all occurrences of IfcRampFlight.

Pset_RoofCommon.name: Pset_RoofCommon
Pset_RoofCommon.shortDefinition: Properties common to the definition of all occurrences of IfcRoof.

Pset_ShadingDeviceCommon.name: Pset_ShadingDeviceCommon
Pset_ShadingDeviceCommon.shortDefinition: Shading device properties associated with an element that represents a shading device

Pset_SlabCommon.name: Pset_SlabCommon
Pset_SlabCommon.shortDefinition: Properties common to the definition of all occurrences of IfcSlab.

Pset_StairCommon.name: Pset_StairCommon
Pset_StairCommon.shortDefinition: Properties common to the definition of all occurrences of IfcStair.

Pset_StairFlightCommon.name: Pset_StairFlightCommon
Pset_StairFlightCommon.shortDefinition: Properties common to the definition of all occurrences of IfcStairFlight.

Pset_WallCommon.name: Pset_WallCommon
Pset_WallCommon.shortDefinition: Properties common to the definition of all occurrences of IfcWall.

Pset_WindowCommon.name: Pset_WindowCommon
Pset_WindowCommon.shortDefinition: Properties common to the definition of all occurrences of Window.

Pset_AirSideSystemInformation.name: Pset_AirSideSystemInformation
Pset_AirSideSystemInformation.shortDefinition: Attributes that apply to an air side HVAC system.
history: HISTORY New property set in IFC Release 1.0.

Pset_DistributionChamberElementCommon.name: Pset_DistributionChamberElementCommon
Pset_DistributionChamberElementCommon.shortDefinition: Common properties of all occurrences of IfcDistributionChamberElement.

Pset_DistributionChamberElementTypeForme.name: Pset_DistributionChamberElementTypeFormedDuct
Pset_DistributionChamberElementTypeForme.shortDefinition: Space formed in the ground for the passage of pipes, cables, ducts.

Pset_DistributionChamberElementTypeInspe.name: Pset_DistributionChamberElementTypeInspectionChamber
Pset_DistributionChamberElementTypeInspe.shortDefinition: Chamber constructed on a drain, sewer or pipeline and with a removable cover, that permits visible inspection.

Pset_DistributionChamberElementTypeInspe.name: Pset_DistributionChamberElementTypeInspectionPit
Pset_DistributionChamberElementTypeInspe.shortDefinition: Recess or chamber formed to permit access for inspection of substructure and services (definition modified from BS6100 221 4128).

Pset_DistributionChamberElementTypeManho.name: Pset_DistributionChamberElementTypeManhole
Pset_DistributionChamberElementTypeManho.shortDefinition: Chamber constructed on a drain, sewer or pipeline and with a removable cover, that permits the entry of a person.

Pset_DistributionChamberElementTypeMeter.name: Pset_DistributionChamberElementTypeMeterChamber
Pset_DistributionChamberElementTypeMeter.shortDefinition: Chamber that houses a meter(s) (definition modified from BS6100 250 6224).

Pset_DistributionChamberElementTypeSump.name: Pset_DistributionChamberElementTypeSump
Pset_DistributionChamberElementTypeSump.shortDefinition: Recess or small chamber into which liquid is drained to facilitate its removal.

Pset_DistributionChamberElementTypeTrenc.name: Pset_DistributionChamberElementTypeTrench
Pset_DistributionChamberElementTypeTrenc.shortDefinition: Excavation, the length of which greatly exceeds the width.

Pset_DistributionPortCommon.name: Pset_DistributionPortCommon
Pset_DistributionPortCommon.shortDefinition: Common attributes attached to an instance of IfcDistributionPort.

Pset_DistributionPortPHistoryCable.name: Pset_DistributionPortPHistoryCable
Pset_DistributionPortPHistoryCable.shortDefinition: Log of electrical activity attached to an instance of IfcPerformanceHistory having an assigned IfcDistributionPort of type CABLE.

Pset_DistributionPortPHistoryDuct.name: Pset_DistributionPortPHistoryDuct
Pset_DistributionPortPHistoryDuct.shortDefinition: Fluid flow performance history attached to an instance of IfcPerformanceHistory assigned to IfcDistributionPort. This replaces the deprecated IfcFluidFlowProperties for performance values.

Pset_DistributionPortPHistoryPipe.name: Pset_DistributionPortPHistoryPipe
Pset_DistributionPortPHistoryPipe.shortDefinition: Log of substance usage attached to an instance of IfcPerformanceHistory having an assigned IfcDistributionPort of type PIPE.

Pset_DistributionPortTypeCable.name: Pset_DistributionPortTypeCable
Pset_DistributionPortTypeCable.shortDefinition: Cable port occurrence attributes attached to an instance of IfcDistributionPort.

Pset_DistributionPortTypeDuct.name: Pset_DistributionPortTypeDuct
Pset_DistributionPortTypeDuct.shortDefinition: Duct port occurrence attributes attached to an instance of IfcDistributionPort.

Pset_DistributionPortTypePipe.name: Pset_DistributionPortTypePipe
Pset_DistributionPortTypePipe.shortDefinition: Pipe port occurrence attributes attached to an instance of IfcDistributionPort.

Pset_DistributionSystemCommon.name: Pset_DistributionSystemCommon
Pset_DistributionSystemCommon.shortDefinition: Distribution system occurrence attributes attached to an instance of IfcDistributionSystem.

Pset_DistributionSystemTypeVentilation.name: Pset_DistributionSystemTypeVentilation
Pset_DistributionSystemTypeVentilation.shortDefinition: This property set is used to define the general characteristics of the duct design parameters within a system.

Pset_OutsideDesignCriteria.name: Pset_OutsideDesignCriteria
Pset_OutsideDesignCriteria.shortDefinition: Outside air conditions used as the basis for calculating thermal loads at peak conditions, as well as the weather data location from which these conditions were obtained.

Pset_SoundAttenuation.name: Pset_SoundAttenuation
Pset_SoundAttenuation.shortDefinition: Common definition to capture sound pressure at a point on behalf of a device typically used within the context of building services and flow distribution systems.  To indicate sound values from an instance of IfcDistributionFlowElement at a particular location, IfcAnnotation instance(s) should be assigned to the IfcDistributionFlowElement through the IfcRelAssignsToProduct relationship. The IfcAnnotation should specify ObjectType of 'Sound' and geometric representation of 'Annotation Point' consisting of a single IfcPoint subtype as described at IfcAnnotation. This property set is instantiated multiple times on an object for each frequency band.

Pset_SoundGeneration.name: Pset_SoundGeneration
Pset_SoundGeneration.shortDefinition: Common definition to capture the properties of sound typically used within the context of building services and flow distribution systems. This property set is instantiated multiple times on an object for each frequency band.

Pset_SpaceThermalLoad.name: Pset_SpaceThermalLoad
Pset_SpaceThermalLoad.shortDefinition: The space thermal load defines all thermal losses and gains occurring within a space or zone. The thermal load source attribute defines an enumeration of possible sources of the thermal load. The maximum, minimum, time series and app

Pset_SpaceThermalLoadPHistory.name: Pset_SpaceThermalLoadPHistory
Pset_SpaceThermalLoadPHistory.shortDefinition: This property set defines actual measured thermal losses and gains occurring within a space or zone. The thermal load source attribute defines an enumeration of possible sources of the thermal load.

Pset_ThermalLoad.name: Pset_ThermalLoad
Pset_ThermalLoad.shortDefinition: Properties for thermal loads of elements.

Pset_UtilityConsumptionPHistory.name: Pset_UtilityConsumptionPHistory
Pset_UtilityConsumptionPHistory.shortDefinition: Consumption of utility resources, typically applied to the IfcBuilding instance, used to identify how much was consumed on I.e., a monthly basis.

Pset_DiscreteAccessoryColumnShoe.name: Pset_DiscreteAccessoryColumnShoe
Pset_DiscreteAccessoryColumnShoe.shortDefinition: Shape properties common to column shoes.

Pset_DiscreteAccessoryCornerFixingPlate.name: Pset_DiscreteAccessoryCornerFixingPlate
Pset_DiscreteAccessoryCornerFixingPlate.shortDefinition: Properties specific to corner fixing plates.

Pset_DiscreteAccessoryDiagonalTrussConne.name: Pset_DiscreteAccessoryDiagonalTrussConnector
Pset_DiscreteAccessoryDiagonalTrussConne.shortDefinition: Shape properties specific to connecting accessories in truss form with diagonal cross-bars.

Pset_DiscreteAccessoryEdgeFixingPlate.name: Pset_DiscreteAccessoryEdgeFixingPlate
Pset_DiscreteAccessoryEdgeFixingPlate.shortDefinition: Properties specific to edge fixing plates.

Pset_DiscreteAccessoryLadderTrussConnect.name: Pset_DiscreteAccessoryLadderTrussConnector
Pset_DiscreteAccessoryLadderTrussConnect.shortDefinition: Shape properties specific to connecting accessories in truss form with straight cross-bars in ladder shape.

Pset_DiscreteAccessoryStandardFixingPlat.name: Pset_DiscreteAccessoryStandardFixingPlate
Pset_DiscreteAccessoryStandardFixingPlat.shortDefinition: Properties specific to standard fixing plates.

Pset_DiscreteAccessoryWireLoop.name: Pset_DiscreteAccessoryWireLoop
Pset_DiscreteAccessoryWireLoop.shortDefinition: Shape properties common to wire loop joint connectors.

Pset_ElementComponentCommon.name: Pset_ElementComponentCommon
Pset_ElementComponentCommon.shortDefinition: Set of common properties of component elements (especially discrete accessories, but also fasteners, reinforcement elements, or other types of components).

Pset_MechanicalFastenerAnchorBolt.name: Pset_MechanicalFastenerAnchorBolt
Pset_MechanicalFastenerAnchorBolt.shortDefinition: Properties common to different types of anchor bolts.

Pset_MechanicalFastenerBolt.name: Pset_MechanicalFastenerBolt
Pset_MechanicalFastenerBolt.shortDefinition: Properties related to bolt-type fasteners. The properties of a whole set with bolt, washers and nut may be provided. Note, it is usually not necessary to transmit these properties in case of standardized bolts. Instead, the standard is referred to.

Pset_Asset.name: Pset_Asset
Pset_Asset.shortDefinition: An asset is a uniquely identifiable element which has a financial value and against which maintenance actions are recorded.

Pset_Condition.name: Pset_Condition
Pset_Condition.shortDefinition: Determines the state or condition of an element at a particular point in time.

Pset_ConstructionAdministration.name: Pset_ConstructionAdministration
Pset_ConstructionAdministration.shortDefinition: Properties for Construction Administration. Often used for facility and asset management.

Pset_FurnitureTypeChair.name: Pset_FurnitureTypeChair
Pset_FurnitureTypeChair.shortDefinition: A set of specific properties for furniture type chair.

Pset_FurnitureTypeCommon.name: Pset_FurnitureTypeCommon
Pset_FurnitureTypeCommon.shortDefinition: Common properties for all types of furniture such as chair, desk, table, and file cabinet.

Pset_FurnitureTypeDesk.name: Pset_FurnitureTypeDesk
Pset_FurnitureTypeDesk.shortDefinition: A set of specific properties for furniture type desk.

Pset_FurnitureTypeFileCabinet.name: Pset_FurnitureTypeFileCabinet
Pset_FurnitureTypeFileCabinet.shortDefinition: A set of specific properties for furniture type file cabinet

Pset_MaintenanceStrategy.name: Pset_MaintenanceStrategy
Pset_MaintenanceStrategy.shortDefinition: Property set for the association of a maintenance strategy to an element, asset of system.

Pset_MaintenanceTriggerCondition.name: Pset_MaintenanceTriggerCondition
Pset_MaintenanceTriggerCondition.shortDefinition: Trigger levels for an asset that has an inspection-based maintenance strategy

Pset_MaintenanceTriggerDuration.name: Pset_MaintenanceTriggerDuration
Pset_MaintenanceTriggerDuration.shortDefinition: Trigger levels for an asset that has an PPM based maintenance strategy.

Pset_MaintenanceTriggerPerformance.name: Pset_MaintenanceTriggerPerformance
Pset_MaintenanceTriggerPerformance.shortDefinition: Properties for performance based maintenance policies

Pset_ManufacturerOccurrence.name: Pset_ManufacturerOccurrence
Pset_ManufacturerOccurrence.shortDefinition: Defines properties of individual instances of manufactured products that may be given by the manufacturer.

Pset_ManufacturerTypeInformation.name: Pset_ManufacturerTypeInformation
Pset_ManufacturerTypeInformation.shortDefinition: Defines characteristics of types (ranges) of manufactured products that may be given by the manufacturer. Note that the term 'manufactured' may also be used to refer to products that are supplied and identified by the supplier or that are assembled off site by a third party provider.

Pset_PropertyAgreement.name: Pset_PropertyAgreement
Pset_PropertyAgreement.shortDefinition: A property agreement is an agreement that enables the occupation of a property for a period of time.

Pset_Risk.name: Pset_Risk
Pset_Risk.shortDefinition: An indication of exposure to mischance, peril, menace, hazard or loss. Documentation of a potential hazard, likilihood and consequence aligned with AS/NZS 4360 and BS PAS 1192-6:2017, which can be assigned to or associated with a product, activity and/or location. Alternatively it may be assigned to an ISO 3864 annotation symbol.
history: HISTORY Extended in IFC2x3, Revised IFC4x3

Pset_ServiceLife.name: Pset_ServiceLife
Pset_ServiceLife.shortDefinition: Captures the period of time that an artifact will last.

Pset_ServiceLifeFactors.name: Pset_ServiceLifeFactors
Pset_ServiceLifeFactors.shortDefinition: Captures various factors that impact the expected service life of elements within the system or zone.

Pset_SystemFurnitureElementTypeCommon.name: Pset_SystemFurnitureElementTypeCommon
Pset_SystemFurnitureElementTypeCommon.shortDefinition: Common properties for all systems furniture (I.e. modular furniture) element types (e.g. vertical panels, work surfaces, and storage).

Pset_SystemFurnitureElementTypePanel.name: Pset_SystemFurnitureElementTypePanel
Pset_SystemFurnitureElementTypePanel.shortDefinition: A set of specific properties for vertical panels that assembly workstations..

Pset_SystemFurnitureElementTypeWorkSurfa.name: Pset_SystemFurnitureElementTypeWorkSurface
Pset_SystemFurnitureElementTypeWorkSurfa.shortDefinition: A set of specific properties for work surfaces used in workstations.

Pset_Warranty.name: Pset_Warranty
Pset_Warranty.shortDefinition: An assurance given by the seller or provider of an artefact that the artefact is without defects and will operate as described for a defined period of time without failure and that if a defect does arise during that time, that it will be corrected by the seller or provider.

Pset_BoreholeCommon.name: Pset_BoreholeCommon
Pset_BoreholeCommon.shortDefinition: Properties describing the features of a borehole (if not modelled separately).

Pset_ElementKinematics.name: Pset_ElementKinematics
Pset_ElementKinematics.shortDefinition: Information confirming that the element has cyclic and/or pathed kinematic behaviour. The resulting envelope may be available as a 'clearance' shape representation.

Pset_GeotechnicalAssemblyCommon.name: Pset_GeotechnicalAssemblyCommon
Pset_GeotechnicalAssemblyCommon.shortDefinition: Properties describing the characteristics of any geotechnical model. A Status of "New" should not be associated to a _IfcGeotechnicalAssembly_ or _IfcGeotechnicalStratum_, as other entities are used for earthworks and courses.

Pset_GeotechnicalStratumCommon.name: Pset_GeotechnicalStratumCommon
Pset_GeotechnicalStratumCommon.shortDefinition: Properties describing the characteristics of any solid, water or void stratum. A status of "New" should not be associated to a _IfcGeotechnicalAssembly_ as other entities are used for earthworks and courses.

Pset_LinearReferencingMethod.name: Pset_LinearReferencingMethod
Pset_LinearReferencingMethod.shortDefinition: Describes the manner in which measurements are made along (and optionally offset from) a linear element.

Pset_SolidStratumCapacity.name: Pset_SolidStratumCapacity
Pset_SolidStratumCapacity.shortDefinition: Properties expressing the capacity of a stratum using physical measures. Regional and National conventions should be captured through classification and specific property sets.

Pset_SolidStratumComposition.name: Pset_SolidStratumComposition
Pset_SolidStratumComposition.shortDefinition: Properties expressing the composition of a stratum using volume measures, implementing ISO14688 Part 2 Table 1 Primary fractions and composite fractions. Regional and National conventions should be captured through classification and specific property sets. Zero values may be omitted.

Pset_WaterStratumCommon.name: Pset_WaterStratumCommon
Pset_WaterStratumCommon.shortDefinition: Properties expressing the composition and any variability in the height of the body of water. Ranges are non-negative describing a spread.

Pset_ActionRequest.name: Pset_ActionRequest
Pset_ActionRequest.shortDefinition: An action request is a request for an action to fulfill a need.

Pset_PackingInstructions.name: Pset_PackingInstructions
Pset_PackingInstructions.shortDefinition: Packing instructions are specific instructions relating to the packing that is required for an artifact in the event of a move (or transport).

Pset_Permit.name: Pset_Permit
Pset_Permit.shortDefinition: A permit is a document that allows permission to gain access to an area or carry out work in a situation where security or other access restrictions apply.

Pset_ProjectOrderChangeOrder.name: Pset_ProjectOrderChangeOrder
Pset_ProjectOrderChangeOrder.shortDefinition: A change order is an instruction to make a change to a product or work being undertake. Note that the change order status is defined in the same way as a work order status since a change order implies a work requirement.

Pset_ProjectOrderMaintenanceWorkOrder.name: Pset_ProjectOrderMaintenanceWorkOrder
Pset_ProjectOrderMaintenanceWorkOrder.shortDefinition: A MaintenanceWorkOrder is a detailed description of maintenance work that is to be performed. Note that the Scheduled Frequency property of the maintenance work order is used when the order is required as an instance of a scheduled work order.

Pset_ProjectOrderMoveOrder.name: Pset_ProjectOrderMoveOrder
Pset_ProjectOrderMoveOrder.shortDefinition: Defines the requirements for move orders. Note that the move order status is defined in the same way as a work order status since a move order implies a work requirement.

Pset_ProjectOrderPurchaseOrder.name: Pset_ProjectOrderPurchaseOrder
Pset_ProjectOrderPurchaseOrder.shortDefinition: Defines the requirements for purchase orders in a project.

Pset_ProjectOrderWorkOrder.name: Pset_ProjectOrderWorkOrder
Pset_ProjectOrderWorkOrder.shortDefinition: Defines the requirements for purchase orders in a project.

Qto_BodyGeometryValidation.name: Qto_BodyGeometryValidation
Qto_BodyGeometryValidation.shortDefinition: Quantities supplied for validating the correct interpretation of the body shape representation at import. In case of multiple representation items, the quantities are summed for each of the items (irrespective of any overlap). Choosing a suitable tolerance value for comparing the supplied numbers to the numbers calculated from the reconstructed geometry is at the discretion of the importing application.

PEnum_ProjectType.name: PEnum_ProjectType
PEnum_ProjectType.shortDefinition: Enumeration describing the typing of a project

PEnum_ProcessItem.name: PEnum_ProcessItem
PEnum_ProcessItem.shortDefinition: Enumeration for the type of cargo (and its measurement method) being modelled within a process.

PEnum_DoorPanelOperationEnum.name: PEnum_DoorPanelOperationEnum
PEnum_DoorPanelOperationEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration defines the basic ways how individual door panels operate.
history: HISTORY New property enumeration in IFC4.3.2.0 to replace the enumeration IfcDoorPanelOperationEnum

PEnum_DoorPanelPositionEnum.name: PEnum_DoorPanelPositionEnum
PEnum_DoorPanelPositionEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration defines the basic ways to describe the location of a door panel within a door lining.
history: HISTORY New property enumeration in IFC4.3.2.0 to replace the enumeration IfcDoorPanelPositionEnum

PEnum_PermeableCoveringOperationEnum.name: PEnum_PermeableCoveringOperationEnum
PEnum_PermeableCoveringOperationEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration defines the valid types of permeable coverings.

PEnum_WindowPanelOperationEnum.name: PEnum_WindowPanelOperationEnum
PEnum_WindowPanelOperationEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration defines the basic ways to describe how window panels operate, as shown in Figure 2.

PEnum_WindowPanelPositionEnum.name: PEnum_WindowPanelPositionEnum
PEnum_WindowPanelPositionEnum.shortDefinition: This enumeration defines the basic configuration of the window type in terms of the location of window panels. The window configurations are given for windows with one, two or three panels (including fixed panels) as shown in Figure 1. It corresponds to the _OperationType_ of the _IfcWindowType_ definition, which references the _IfcWindowPanelProperties_.

PEnum_PressureGaugeType.name: PEnum_PressureGaugeType
PEnum_PressureGaugeType.shortDefinition: Closed section which blocks the flow of fluid through the section/structure

PEnum_ComplementaryWorks.name: PEnum_ComplementaryWorks
PEnum_ComplementaryWorks.shortDefinition: Enumeration of the complementary function possible for the drain channel.

PEnum_BathType.name: PEnum_BathType
PEnum_BathType.shortDefinition: The property enumeration defines the types of bath that may be specified within the property set where.

PEnum_AddedMassCoefficientMethod.name: PEnum_AddedMassCoefficientMethod
